Micah1:5 Tsena tsohle di bakilwe ke dibe tsa Jakobo, di bakilwe ke dibe tsa ntlo ya Iseraele. Dibe tsa Jakobo di bakilwe ke mang? Di bakilwe ke baahi ba Samaria. Ho kgumamela medingwana ho bakilwe ke mang Judea? ho bakilwe ke baahi ba Jerusalema." 
Matthew1:1 Leloko la Jesu Kreste, mora Davida, mora Aborahama." 
Matthew1:2 Aborahama a tswala Isaka, Isaka a tswala Jakobo, Jakobo a tswala Juda le bana babo," 
Matthew1:3 Juda a tswala Farese le Sara ka Tamare, Farese a tswala Heserone, Heserone a tswala Arame," 
Matthew1:4 Arame a tswala Aminadabe, Aminadabe a tswala Nashone, Nashone a tswala Salema," 
Matthew1:5 Salema a tswala Boase ka Rahaba, Boase a tswala Obede ka Ruthe, Obede a tswala Jese," 
Matthew1:6 Jese a tswala kgosi Davida. Davida a tswala Solomone ka mohatsa Uriya," 
Matthew1:7 Solomone a tswala Roboame, Roboame a tswala Abiya, Abiya a tswala Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa a tswala Jehoshafate, Jehoshafate a tswala Jorame, Jorame a tswala Usiya," 
Matthew1:9 Usiya a tswala Jotame, Jotame a tswala Akase, Akase a tswala Hesekia," 
Matthew1:10 Hesekia a tswala Manase, Manase a tswala Amose, Amose a tswala Josiya," 
Matthew1:11 Josiya a tswala Jekoneya le bana babo ka nako ya ho fallisetswa ha Bajuda Babilona. 
Matthew1:12 Jwale, kamora ho fallisetswa ha bona Babilona, Jekoneya a tswala Salatiele, Salatiele a tswala Sorobabele," 
Matthew1:13 Sorobabele a tswala Abihude, Abihude a tswala Eliakime, Eliakime a tswala Asore," 
Matthew1:14 Asore a tswala Sadoke, Sadoke a tswala Akime, Akime a tswala Eleude," 
Matthew1:15 Eleude a tswala Eleasare, Eleasare a tswala Matane, Matane a tswala Jakobo," 
Matthew1:16 Jakobo a tswala Josefa, mohatsa Maria, mosadi ya ileng a tswala Jesu ya bitswang Kreste." 
Matthew1:17 Ha ho le jwalo, meloko yohle, ho tloha ho Aborahama ho isa ho Davida e bile leshome le metso e mene; ho tloha ho Davida ho isa nakong ya ho fallisetswa ha Bajuda Babilona, meloko e leshome le metso e mene; mme ho tloha nakong ya ho fallisetswa ha bona Babilona ho isa ho Kreste, meloko e leshome le metso e mene." 
Matthew1:18 Tswalo ya Jesu Kreste e bile jwaana: Mmae Maria, ha a se a lebeleditswe ke Josefa, ba eso ka ba phela mmoho, a fumaneha e le moimana ka matla a Moya o Halalelang." 
Matthew1:19 Erekaha Josefa, mohatsa Maria, a ne a lokile, mme a sa rate ho mo hobosa, a rera ho mo hlala ka lekunutu." 
Matthew1:20 Yare a sa hopotse jwalo, lengeloi la Morena la iponahatsa ho yena torong, la re: “Josefa, mora Davida, o se ke wa tshaba ho inkela Maria mohatsa hao, hobane se emotsweng ke yena se tswa ho Moya o Halalelang;" 
Matthew1:21 o tla tswala mora, mme o tla mo rea lebitso la Jesu, hobane o tla pholosa setjhaba sa hae dibeng tsa sona.”" 
Matthew1:22 Jwale tsena tsohle di etsahetse hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke Morena ka moporofeta, ha a re:" 
Matthew1:23 “Bonang, morwetsana o tla emola, a tswale mora, mme mora eo o tla rewa lebitso la Emmanuele,” e leng ho re: Modimo o na le rona." 
Matthew1:24 Ha Josefa a tsoha borokong, a etsa kamoo lengeloi la Morena le mo laetseng kateng, a inkela mohatsa hae;" 
Matthew1:25 mme ha a a ka a kena dikobong tsa hae ho fihlela a beleha mora; Josefa a mo rea lebitso la Jesu. 
Matthew2:1 Hoba Jesu a tswallwe Betlelehema e Judea, mehleng ya kgosi Heroda, ha fihla Jerusalema Ba Bohlale ba tswang botjhabela," 
Matthew2:1 Hoba Jesu a tswallwe Betlelehema e Judea, mehleng ya kgosi Heroda, ha fihla Jerusalema Ba Bohlale ba tswang botjhabela," 
Matthew2:2 ba re: “E kae kgosi ya Bajuda e tswetsweng? Re bone naledi ya yona ha e hlaha, mme re tlilo e kgumamela.”" 
Matthew2:3 Yare ha kgosi Heroda a utlwa, a ferekana hammoho le ba Jerusalema kaofela," 
Matthew2:4 mme hoba a bokelle baprista ba baholo bohle le Ditsebi tsa Molao tsa setjhaba, a ba botsa moo Kreste a loketseng ho tswallwa teng." 
Matthew2:5 Ba re ho yena: “Betlelehema e Judea, hobane ho ngotswe jwalo ke moporofeta, ha a re:" 
Matthew2:5 Ba re ho yena: “Betlelehema e Judea, hobane ho ngotswe jwalo ke moporofeta, ha a re:" 
Matthew2:6 “ Ha e le wena, Betlelehema, e naheng ya Juda, ha o hlile ha o monyenyane haholo, ha o monyenyane hara batsamaisi ba Juda, hobane ho wena ho tla tswa motsamaisi ya tla alosa Iseraele, setjhaba sa ka. ”" 
Matthew2:7 Yaba Heroda o bitsa Ba Bohlale bao ka lekunutu, a ba botsisisa nako eo naledi e hlahileng ka yona," 
Matthew2:8 a nto ba romela Betlelehema, a re: “Eyang, le batlisise tsa ngwana ka hloko; ere ha le se le mo fumane, le ntsebise, le nna ke tle ke yo mo kgumamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Yare hoba ba utlwe puo ya kgosi ba tsamaya, mme naledi eo ba e boneng e hlaha ya ba etella pele ho fihlela e ema hodima moo ngwana a neng a le hona teng." 
Matthew2:10 Jwale ha ba bona naledi ba thaba haholo. 
Matthew2:11 Ha ba fihla ka tlung, ba bona ngwana le mmae Maria; ba itihela fatshe, mme ba kgumamela ngwana, ba nto bula matlole a bona, ba mo nyehella ka dimpho: kgauta, mokubetso, le mmira." 
Matthew2:12 Hoba ba lemoswe torong hore ba se ke ba boela ho Heroda, ba kgutlela naheng ya habo bona ka tsela esele." 
Matthew2:13 Hoba Ba Bohlale ba kgutle, lengeloi la Morena la iponahatsa ho Josefa torong, la re: “Tsoha, o nke ngwana le mmae, o balehele Egepeta, o hlole teng ho fihlela ke o bolella, hobane Heroda o makgatheng a ho batla ngwana hore a mmolaye.”" 
Matthew2:14 A tsoha, a nka ngwana le mmae bosiu, a tshabela Egepeta," 
Matthew2:15 mme a hlola teng ho fihlela Heroda a eshwa; e le hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke Morena ka moporofeta, ha a re: “Ke bitsitse mora wa ka hore a tswe Egepeta.”" 
Matthew2:16 Yare ha Heroda a lemoha hore o phomilwe ke Ba Bohlale, a halefa haholo, a laela hore ho bolawe masea wohle a bashanyana a Betlelehema le a tikolohong yohle ya teng, a dilemo di pedi le katlase, ho ya ka nako eo a e botsisisitseng ho Ba Bohlale." 
Matthew2:17 Ya eba moo ho phethahalang ho boletsweng ke moporofeta Jeremia, ha a re:" 
Matthew2:18 “Mohoo o utlwahetse Rama: seboko le sello sa mmokotsane; Ragele o llela bana ba hae, mme o hana ho tshediseha, hobane ha ba sa le yo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Hoba Heroda a shwe, lengeloi la Morena la iponahatsa ho Josefa, torong, Egepeta," 
Matthew2:20 la re: “Tsoha, o nke ngwana le mmae, o boele naheng ya Iseraele, hobane ba neng ba batla bophelo ba ngwana ba shwele.”" 
Matthew2:21 Josefa a tsoha, a nka ngwana le mmae, a boela naheng ya Iseraele." 
Matthew2:22 Empa ha a utlwa hore Arekelaose o hlahlamile ntatae Heroda boreneng ba Judea, a tshaba ho ya teng. Hoba a lemoswe torong, a tshabela seterekeng sa Galelea," 
Matthew2:22 Empa ha a utlwa hore Arekelaose o hlahlamile ntatae Heroda boreneng ba Judea, a tshaba ho ya teng. Hoba a lemoswe torong, a tshabela seterekeng sa Galelea," 
Matthew2:23 a ya aha motseng o bitswang Nasaretha, e le hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke baporofeta hore o tla bitswa Monasaretha." 
Matthew3:1 Mehleng eo ha hlaha Johanne Mokolobetsi; a ruta feelleng la Judea," 
Matthew3:1 Mehleng eo ha hlaha Johanne Mokolobetsi; a ruta feelleng la Judea," 
Matthew3:2 a re: “Bakang, hobane Mmuso wa mahodimo o atametse!”" 
Matthew3:3 Ke yena ya boletsweng ke moporofeta Esaya, ha a re: “Lentswe la ya howang feelleng le re: Lokisang mmila wa Morena, le otlolle ditsela tsa hae! ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johanne o ne a apara seaparo se entsweng ka boya ba kamele, a itlama ka leqhama la letlalo thekeng; dijo tsa hae e ne e le ditsie le mahe a dinotshi tsa naha." 
Matthew3:5 Jwale batho ba Jerusalema, le ba Judea yohle, le ba phuleng yohle ya Jorodane ba tswela ho yena," 
Matthew3:5 Jwale batho ba Jerusalema, le ba Judea yohle, le ba phuleng yohle ya Jorodane ba tswela ho yena," 
Matthew3:6 ba kolobetswa ke yena nokeng ya Jorodane, ba ntse ba ipolela dibe tsa bona." 
Matthew3:7 Empa ha a bona Bafarisi le Basaduke ba bangata ba etla ho kolobetswa, a re ho bona: “Madinyane a marabe, ke mang ya le boleletseng hore le ka baleha bohale bo tlang?" 
Matthew3:8 Bontshang ka diketso hore le bakile," 
Matthew3:9 mme le se ke la nahana, la re: Ntata rona ke Aborahama, hobane ke a le bolella hore Modimo o na le matla a ho hlahisetsa Aborahama bana ka majwe ana." 
Matthew3:10 Selepe se se se beilwe metsong ya difate; sefate sefe kapa sefe se sa beheng ditholwana tse monate se tla rengwa, se lahlelwe mollong." 
Matthew3:11 “Ha e le nna, ke le kolobeletsa pako ka metsi. Athe ya tlang kamorao ho nna o mpheta ka matla, hoo ke sa tshwaneleng ho mo rola meqathatso; yena o tla le kolobetsa ka Moya o Halalelang le ka mollo." 
Matthew3:12 Seoloso se letsohong la hae, mme o tla fiedisisa seotlo sa hae, a bokelle koro ya hae sesiung, mmoko wona a o tjhese mollong o sa timeng.”" 
Matthew3:13 Yaba Jesu o fihla nokeng ya Jorodane a etswa Galelea, a tla ho Johanne hore a kolobetswe ke yena." 
Matthew3:14 Empa Johanne a leka ho mo thiba, a re: “Eka kgona e be nna ya kolobetswang ke wena, athe wena o tla ho nna?”" 
Matthew3:15 Jesu a mo araba, a re: “Lesa, jwale, hobane ka tsela ena re lokela ho phethahatsa hohle ho lokileng.” Johanne a dumela." 
Matthew3:16 Hanghang hoba Jesu a kolobetswe, a tswa metsing, mme bonang, a bulelwa mahodimo, a bona Moya wa Modimo o theoha e ka leeba, o etla hodima hae;" 
Matthew3:17 ha utlwahala lentswe le tswang mahodimong, le reng: “Enwa ke Mora wa ka eo ke mo ratang, ya nkgahlang!”" 
Matthew4:1 Yaba Jesu o iswa ke Moya feelleng ho ya lekwa ke Diabolosi. 
Matthew4:2 A itima dijo ka matsatsi a mashome a mane, le ka masiu a mashome a mane, a nto lapa." 
Matthew4:3 Moleki a mo atamela, a re: “Haeba o Mora wa Modimo, ere majwe ana a fetohe bohobe!”" 
Matthew4:4 A mo araba, a re: “Ho ngotswe, ho thwe: “ Motho a ke ke a phela ka bohobe feela, empa o tla phela le ka polelo e nngwe le e nngwe e tswang molomong wa Modimo. ”" 
Matthew4:5 Yaba Diabolosi o mo nka a mo isa motseng a halalelang, mme a mmea tlhorong ya Tempele," 
Matthew4:6 a re ho yena: “Haeba o Mora wa Modimo, itihele, hobane ho ngotswe, ho thwe: “ O tla laela mangeloi a hae, mme a tla o kgakeletsa ka diatla, esere leoto la hao la kgoptjwa ke lejwe. ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu a re ho yena: “Le teng ho ngotswe, ho thwe: O se ke wa leka Morena Modimo wa hao. ”" 
Matthew4:8 Hape Diabolosi a mo nka, a mo isa thabeng e telelehadi, a mmontsha mebuso yohle ya lefatshe le maruo a yona," 
Matthew4:9 a re ho yena: “Tsena tsohle ke tla o fa tsona ha o ka itihela fatshe, wa nkgumamela.”" 
Matthew4:10 Empa Jesu a re ho yena: “Tloha, Satane! Ho ngotswe, ho thwe: “ O tla kgumamela Morena Modimo wa hao, o sebeletse yena a nnotshi. ”" 
Matthew4:11 Jwale Diabolosi a mo tlohela, mme bonang, mangeloi a atamela, a mo sebeletsa." 
Matthew4:12 Yare ha Jesu a utlwa hore Johanne o tshwerwe, a ya Galelea." 
Matthew4:13 A tloha Nasaretha, a tla aha Kapernauma e lebopong la letsha, tikolohong ya Sebulone le Nafthali," 
Matthew4:14 e le hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke moporofeta Esaya, ha a re:" 
Matthew4:15 “Lefatshe la Sebulone le lefatshe la Nafthali, nqa lewatle, mose ho Jorodane, Galelea ya baditjhaba," 
Matthew4:16 setjhaba se neng se dutse lefifing se bone lesedi le leholo, mme ba neng ba dutse lefatsheng la lefu le lefifing ba tjhabetswe ke lesedi.”" 
Matthew4:17 Ho tloha nakong eo, Jesu a qala ho ruta, a re: “Bakang, hobane Mmuso wa mahodimo o atametse!”" 
Matthew4:18 Yare ha Jesu a sika le letsha la Galelea, a bona bara ba babedi ba motho, Simone ya bitswang Petrose le Andrease ngwanabo, ba ntse ba akgela letlowa letsheng, hobane e ne e le batshwasi ba ditlhapi." 
Matthew4:19 A re ho bona: “Ntshaleng morao, mme ke tla le etsa batshwasi ba batho.”" 
Matthew4:20 Hanghang ba tlohela matlowa a bona, ba mo latela." 
Matthew4:21 Hoba a fetele pele, a bona bara ba bang ba babedi ba motho, Jakobo mora wa Sebedea le Johanne ngwanabo, ba ena le ntata bona Sebedea ka sekepeng, ba ntse ba lokisa matlowa a bona, mme a ba bitsa." 
Matthew4:22 Hanghang ba tlohela sekepe le ntata bona, ba latela Jesu." 
Matthew4:23 Jesu a tsamaya le Galelea yohle, a ntse a ruta matlung a thapelo a teng, a phatlalatsa molaetsa o molemo wa Mmuso, a fodisa mafu le malwetse wohle setjhabeng." 
Matthew4:24 Setumo sa hae sa utlwahala Siria yohle, mme ha tliswa ho yena bohle ba jewang ke mafu a mefutafuta, ba imetsweng ke mahloko, ba nang le bademona, ba shwang sethwathwa, le diritsa, mme a ba fodisa." 
Matthew4:25 A ba a latelwa ke matshwelehadi a tswang Galelea, Dekapolese, Jerusalema, Judea le mose ho Jorodane." 
Matthew4:25 A ba a latelwa ke matshwelehadi a tswang Galelea, Dekapolese, Jerusalema, Judea le mose ho Jorodane." 
Matthew5:1 Yare ha Jesu a bona matshwele, a nyolohela thabeng, mme hoba a dule, barutuwa ba hae ba tla ho yena;" 
Matthew5:2 a qala ho ba ruta, a re:" 
Matthew5:3 “Ho lehlohonolo ba futsanehileng moyeng, hobane Mmuso wa mahodimo ke wa bona." 
Matthew5:4 Ho lehlohonolo ba mahlomoleng, hobane ba tla tshediswa." 
Matthew5:5 Ho lehlohonolo ba mosa, hobane lefatshe e tla ba lefa la bona." 
Matthew5:6 Ho lehlohonolo ba lapetseng ho loka, ba ho nyoretsweng, hobane ba tla kgotsofatswa." 
Matthew5:7 Ho lehlohonolo ba mohau, hobane ba tla hauhelwa." 
Matthew5:8 Ho lehlohonolo ba pelo di hlwekileng, hobane ba tla bona Modimo." 
Matthew5:9 HO lehlohonolo ba bopang kgotso, hobane ba tla bitswa bana ba Modimo." 
Matthew5:10 Ho lehlohonolo ba hlorisetswang ho loka, hobane Mmuso wa mahodimo ke wa bona." 
Matthew5:11 “Le lehlohonolo ha le hlapaolwa, le hloriswa, le etseletswa ka mekgwa yohle ka baka la ka." 
Matthew5:12 Thabang, le nyakalle, hobane moputso wa lona o moholo mahodimong; etswe baporofeta ba bileng teng pele ho lona ba hlorisitswe jwalo.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Le letswai la lefatshe, empa ha letswai le ka tapa, le ka tswaifatswa kang? Ha le sa na thuso, haese hore le lahlelwe kantle, le hatakelwe ke batho." 
Matthew5:14 “Le lesedi la lefatshe. Motse o hahilweng hodima thaba o sitwa ho pateha; 
Matthew5:15 lebone le lona ha le ke be le hotetswe le kwahelwe ka nkgo, empa le bewa sedulwaneng sa lona, le kgantshetse bohle ba ka tlung." 
Matthew5:16 Lesedi la lona le ke le kganyetse batho jwalo, ba tle ba bone mesebetsi e metle ya lona, ba be ba tlotlise Ntata lona ya mahodimong.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Le se ke la nahana hore ke tlile ho fedisa Molao kapa Baporofeta; ha ke a tla ho di fedisa, ke mpa ke tlile ho di phethahatsa." 
Matthew5:18 Kannete ke a le bolella: ho fihlela lehodimo le lefatshe di fela, ha ho ka ke ha fetoha tlhakunyana e le nngwe leha e le letshwaonyana le le leng Molaong, ho fihlela tsohle di etsahala." 
Matthew5:19 Ha ho le jwalo, mang le mang ya tlolang leha e le nngwe ya ditaelo tsena tse nyenyane, mme a ruta batho ho etsa jwalo, o tla bitswa e monyenyane Mmusong wa mahodimo, empa mang le mang ya di phethang, mme a di ruta, yena o tla bitswa e moholo Mmusong wa mahodimo." 
Matthew5:20 Ke a le bolella, ha ho loka ha lona ho sa fete ha Ditsebi tsa Molao le Bafarisi, ha le ka ke la kena Mmusong wa mahodimo." 
Matthew5:21 “Le utlwile hore ho ile ha thwe ho ba boholoholo: O se ke wa bolaya; mang le mang ya bolayang o tla tshwanelwa ke kahlolo. 
Matthew5:22 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Mang kapa mang ya halefelang ngwanabo o tla tshwanelwa ke kahlolo, mme ya reng ho ngwanabo: Sethoto towe! o tla tshwanelwa ke ho iswa kgotla; ha e le ya reng: Tseketseke towe! o tla tshwanelwa ke ho ya mollong wa dihele." 
Matthew5:23 “Ha ho le jwalo, ha o nyehela ka mpho ya hao aletareng, mme teng o hopola hore ngwaneno o na le disuwa le wena," 
Matthew5:24 siya mpho ya hao moo pela aletare, o yo boelana le ngwaneno pele, o ntano kgutla ho tla nyehela ka mpho ya hao." 
Matthew5:25 “O utlwane kapelepele le eo le tsekisanang le yena le sa ntse le le tseleng, esere mohlomong ya o tsekisang a o neela moahlodi, moahlodi a o neela lepolesa, wa hlahlelwa tjhankaneng;" 
Matthew5:26 kannete ke a o bolella, ha o ka ke wa tswa teng ho fihlela ha o lefile tjheletana ya ho qetela." 
Matthew5:27 “Le utlwile hore ho ile ha thwe: O se ke wa feba. 
Matthew5:28 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Mang kapa mang ya tadimang mosadi ka ho mo lakatsa o se a mo febile pelong ya hae. 
Matthew5:29 Haeba leihlo la hao le letona le o dihela sebeng, le honye, o le lahle, hobane ho molemo ho wena ha ho ka timela setho se le seng sa hao, ho ena le hore mmele wohle wa hao o lahlelwe diheleng," 
Matthew5:30 mme haeba letsoho la hao le letona le o dihela sebeng, le pome, o le lahle, hobane ho molemo ho wena ha ho ka timela setho se le seng sa hao, ho ena le hore mmele wohle wa hao o ye diheleng." 
Matthew5:31 “Ho ile ha thwe: Mang le mang ya hlalang mosadi wa hae a mo fe lengolo la tlhalo. 
Matthew5:32 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Mang kapa mang ya hlalang mosadi wa hae, haese ka taba ya bohlola, o a mo febisa, mme ya nyalang mosadi ya hladilweng o a feba." 
Matthew5:33 “Le utlwile hape hore ho ile ha thwe ho ba boholoholo: O se ke wa ikana ka leshano, o mpe o phethe dikano tsa hao ho Morena." 
Matthew5:34 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Le se ke la hlapanya le hanyenyane, leha e le ka lehodimo, kahobane ke terone ya Modimo;" 
Matthew5:35 leha e le ka lefatshe, kahobane ke bonamelo ba maoto a hae; leha e le ka Jerusalema, kahobane ke motse wa Kgosi e kgolo;" 
Matthew5:36 leha e le ka hlooho ya hao, kahobane o sitwa ho sweufatsa kapa ho ntshofatsa qoba leha e le nngwe ya moriri." 
Matthew5:37 Ha le re e, le re e; ha le re tjhe, le re tjhe; ha e le ho fetang hoo, ho tswa ho E Mobe." 
Matthew5:38 “Le utlwile hore ho ile ha thwe: Leihlo le tla phetetswa ka leihlo, leino ka leino!" 
Matthew5:39 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Le se ka la hanyetsa motho e mobe, empa ya o jabelang lerameng le letona, o mo retelletse le le letshehadi;" 
Matthew5:40 ya ratang ho o qosa le ho nka seaparo sa hao, o mo tlohelle le yona kobo," 
Matthew5:41 mme ya o qophellang ho tsamaya le yena mehato e sekete, o ye le yena mehato e kete di pedi." 
Matthew5:42 Fa ya o kopang, mme o se ke wa furalla ya ratang ho adima ho wena." 
Matthew5:43 “Le utlwile hore ho ile ha thwe: Rata wa heno, o hloye sera sa hao." 
Matthew5:44 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Ratang dira tsa lona, le rapelle ba le hlorisang," 
Matthew5:45 hore le be bana ba Ntata lona ya mahodimong, hobane o tjhabisetsa ba kgopo le ba molemo letsatsi la hae, mme o nesetsa ba lokileng le ba sa lokang pula." 
Matthew5:46 Haeba le rata ba le ratang feela, le ka ba le moputso wa eng? Ana balekgetho le bona ha ba etse jwalo na?" 
Matthew5:47 Le teng haeba le dumedisa bana babo lona feela, le feta ba bang ka eng? Ana bahedene le bona ha ba etse jwalo na?" 
Matthew5:48 Ha ho le jwalo, phethehang jwalokaha Ntata lona ya mahodimong a phethehile." 
Matthew6:1 “Hlokomelang hore le se ke la etsa mesebetsi ya lona ya bodumedi pontsheng ho batho, hore ba le babatse; haeba le etsa jwalo ha le na ho ba le moputso o tswang ho Ntata lona ya mahodimong." 
Matthew6:2 “Ha ho le jwalo, ha o etsetsa mafutsana thuso, o se ke wa ipolela, jwalokaha baikaketsi ba etsa matlung a thapelo le ditseleng tsa motse, hore ba tlotliswe ke batho; kannete ke a le bolella, ba se ba amohetse moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:3 Empa ha o thusa mafutsana, letsoho la hao le letshehadi le se ke la tseba se etswang ke le letona," 
Matthew6:4 thuso ena ya hao e be ya sephiri, mme Ntatao ya bonang le sephiring o tla o buseletsa." 
Matthew6:5 “Hape ha le rapela, le se ke la etsisa baikaketsi, ba ratang ho rapela ba eme matlung a thapelo le mabaleng a motse, hore ba bonahale ho batho; kannete ke a le bolella, ba se ba amohetse moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:6 Empa wena ha o rapela, kena ka kamoreng ya hao, o kwale monyako, o rapele Ntatao ya leng teng le sephiring, mme Ntatao ya bonang le sephiring o tla o buseletsa." 
Matthew6:7 Jwale ha le rapela le se ke la ya lolololo jwaloka bahedene, ba hopolang hore ba tla utluwa ka baka la mantswe a bona a mangata." 
Matthew6:8 Le se ke la ba etsisa, hobane Ntata lona o sa ntsa tseba tseo le di hlokang, le eso mo kope." 
Matthew6:9 “Ha ho le jwalo, lona rapelang tjena: “ Ntata rona ya mahodimong, lebitso la hao le halaletswe;" 
Matthew6:10 Mmuso wa hao o tle; thato ya hao e etswe lefatsheng jwaloka lehodimong. 
Matthew6:11 O re fe kajeno bohobe ba rona ba tsatsi le leng le le leng; 
Matthew6:12 o re tshwarele ditshito tsa rona, jwalokaha le rona re tshwarela ba re sitetsweng;" 
Matthew6:13 o re phemise ho kena molekong, o mpe o re lopolle bobeng, hobane Mmuso ke wa hao, le matla, le tlotla, kamehla le mehla. Amen." 
Matthew6:14 “Ha le tshwarela batho diphoso tsa bona, le lona Ntata lona ya mahodimong o tla le tshwarela;" 
Matthew6:15 athe ha le sa tshwarele batho, Ntata lona le yena a ke ke a le tshwarela diphoso tsa lona." 
Matthew6:16 “Ha le itima dijo, le se ke la itlhonamisa jwaloka baikaketsi; ba sosobanya difahleho, hore ba bonahale ho batho hore ba itima dijo. Kannete ke a le bolella, ba se ba amohetse moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:17 Empa wena ha o itima dijo, o iphotle, o itlotse hlooho," 
Matthew6:18 hore o se ke wa bonahala ho batho hore o itima dijo, haese ho Ntatao ya leng teng le sephiring, mme Ntatao ya bonang le sephiring o tla o buseletsa." 
Matthew6:19 “Le se ke la ipokellela matlotlo lefatsheng, moo tshwele le mafoome di senyang, moo mashodu a thuang, a utswe;" 
Matthew6:20 le mpe le ipokellele matlotlo lehodimong, moo tshwele leha e le mafoome di sa senyeng, moo mashodu a sa thueng, a utswe," 
Matthew6:21 hobane moo letlotlo la hao le leng teng, le yona pelo ya hao e tla ba hona teng." 
Matthew6:22 “Leihlo ke lebone la mmele. Haeba leihlo la hao le hloka sepha, mmele wohle wa hao o tla ba leseding," 
Matthew6:23 empa haeba leihlo la hao le sa loka, mmele wohle wa hao o tla aparelwa ke lefifi. Ha ho le jwalo, ha lesedi le ka ho wena le fetoha lefifi, lefifi e tla ba le lekaakang!" 
Matthew6:24 “Ha ho motho ya ka sebeletsang marena a mabedi, hobane o tla hloya e mong, a rate e mong; kapa o tla kgomarela e mong, a nyedise e mong. Le ke ke la sebeletsa Modimo le Leruo." 
Matthew6:25 “Ka baka leo, ke re ho lona: Le se ke la itshwenya ka bophelo ba lona, hore na le tla jang, kapa le tla nwang, leha e le ka mmele ya lona, hore na le tla aparang. Ana bophelo ha bo fete dijo, le mmele ha o fete diaparo ka bohlokwa na?" 
Matthew6:26 Tadimang dinonyana tse fofang: ha di jale, ha di kotule, ha di bokellele disiung, empa Ntata lona ya mahodimong o a di fepa; ana lona ha le di fete hole ka bohlokwa na?" 
Matthew6:27 Ke mang ho lona eo, ka ho itshwenya, a ka tsebang ho lelefatsa bophelo ba hae, leha e le ka motsotswana feela?" 
Matthew6:28 “Hape le itshwenyetsang le ka diaparo? Ithuteng ka dikgahla hore na di hola jwang: ha di sebetse ka thata, ha di ohle," 
Matthew6:29 empa ke a le bolella, esita le Solomone tlotleng yohle ya hae ha a ka a apara jwaloka e nngwe ya tsona." 
Matthew6:30 Ha e le moo Modimo a apesa jwalo jwang ba naha, bo leng teng kajeno, mme kamoso bo lahlelwe seboping, na lona ba tumelo e fokolang, a ke ke a le apesa ho feta?" 
Matthew6:31 Ha ho le jwalo, le se ke la itshwenya, la re: Re tla jang? Re tla nwang? Re tla aparang?" 
Matthew6:32 Tsena tsohle di labalabelwa ke bahedene; athe Ntata lona ya mahodimong o tseba hore le di hloka tsohle. 
Matthew6:33 Jwale batlang Mmuso wa Modimo le ho loka ha hae pele, mme tsena tsohle le tla di ekeletswa." 
Matthew6:34 Ka baka leo, le se ke la itshwenya ka la hosasane, hobane la hosasane le tla itshwenya ka tsa lona; letsatsi ka leng le lekanwa ke bothata ba lona." 
Matthew7:1 “Se ahloleng ba bang, hore Modimo a tle a se ke a le ahlola," 
Matthew7:2 hobane le tla ahlolwa ka kahlolo eo le ahlolang ba bang ka yona, mme kahlolo eo ya lona e tla lekanyetswa ka tekanyo eo le lekanyetsang ba bang ka yona." 
Matthew7:3 “O tadimelang phatsa e ka leihlong la ngwaneno, empa o sa lemohe sekoqo se ka leihlong la hao?" 
Matthew7:4 Kapa o ka re jwang ho ngwaneno: Ere ke ntshe phatsa e ka leihlong la hao, athe sekoqo ke seo ka leihlong la hao?" 
Matthew7:5 Moikaketsi, ntsha sekoqo se ka leihlong la hao pele, mme ke hona o tla bona hantle ho ntsha phatsa e ka leihlong la ngwaneno." 
Matthew7:6 “Se neeng dintja dintho tse halalelang, esere mohlomong tsa reteleha, tsa le harola; leha e le ho lahlela mabenyane a lona a bohlokwa pela dikolobe, esere mohlomong tsa a hatakela ka maoto." 
Matthew7:7 “Kopang, le tla fuwa; batlang, le tla fumana; kokotang, le tla bulelwa," 
Matthew7:8 hobane mang kapa mang ya kopang o a fuwa, ya batlang o a fumana, mme ya kokotang o a bulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 “Ekaba ke mang ho lona, eo ekareng ha mora wa hae a mo kopa bohobe, yaba o mo fa lejwe?" 
Matthew7:10 Kapa ha a mo kopa tlhapi, ebe o mo fa noha?" 
Matthew7:11 Ha ho le jwalo, ha lona ba kgopo le tseba ho fana ka tse molemo ho bana ba lona, Ntata lona ya mahodimong o tla fana haholo hakaakang ka tse molemo ho ba mo kopang?" 
Matthew7:12 Ha ho le jwalo, tsohle tseo le ratang hore batho ba le etse tsona, le lona le ba etse tsona; ke wona Molao le Baporofeta." 
Matthew7:13 “Kenang ka kgoro e patisaneng, hobane kgoro e isang timelong e hebehebe, le tsela e yang teng e sephara, mme ba kenang ka yona ba bangata," 
Matthew7:14 empa kgoro e isang bophelong e patisane, le tsela e yang teng e boima, mme ba e fumanang ha ba bakae." 
Matthew7:15 “Hlokomelang baporofeta ba bohata, ba tlang ho lona ba ikgakantse eka ke dinku, empa kahare e le diphiri tse harolakang." 
Matthew7:16 Le tla ba tseba ka diketso tsa bona. Na batho ba ke ba kge morara meutlweng, kapa difeiye hlabahlabaneng?" 
Matthew7:17 Ka mokgwa o jwalo, sefate ka seng se monate se beha ditholwana tse monate, empa sefate se sebe se beha ditholwana tse mpe." 
Matthew7:18 Sefate se monate se sitwa ho beha ditholwana tse mpe, le ha e le sefate se sebe ho beha ditholwana tse monate." 
Matthew7:19 Sefate ka seng se sa beheng ditholwana tse monate se ye se rengwe, se lahlelwe mollong." 
Matthew7:20 Ka hona le tla ba tseba ka diketso tsa bona. 
Matthew7:21 “Hase mang kapa mang ya reng ho nna: Morena, Morena, ya tla kena Mmusong wa mahodimo, empa ho tla kena ya etsang thato ya Ntate ya mahodimong." 
Matthew7:22 Tsatsing leo ba bangata ba tla re ho nna: Morena, Morena, na ha re a ka ra porofeta ka lebitso la hao, ra leleka bademona ka lebitso la hao, ra etsa diketso tse ngata, tse hlollang, ka lebitso la hao na?" 
Matthew7:23 Mohlang oo ke tla ba bolella pepenene, ke re: Ha ke a ka ka le tseba; tlohang ho nna, lona ba etsang bokgopo!" 
Matthew7:24 “Ha ho le jwalo, mang le mang ya utlwang dipolelo tsena tsa ka, a di phetha, o tla tshwantshwa le motho ya bohlale, ya ileng a haha ntlo ya hae hodima letlapa." 
Matthew7:25 Sekgohola sa fihla, diphororo tsa matha, meya ya puka, ya kgahlela ntlo eo, empa ha ya ka ya wa, hobane e ne e theilwe hodima letlapa." 
Matthew7:26 Athe mang le mang ya utlwang dipolelo tsena tsa ka, a sa di phethe, o tla tshwantshwa le motho ya sethoto, ya ileng a haha ntlo ya hae lehlabatheng." 
Matthew7:27 Sekgohola sa fihla, diphororo tsa matha, meya ya puka, ya kgahlela ntlo eo, yaba e a wa, mme ho wa ha yona ya eba ho tshabehang.”" 
Matthew7:28 Ha Jesu a qetile dipolelo tsena, matshwele a tsota thuto ya hae," 
Matthew7:29 hobane o ne a ruta jwaloka ya nang le matla, e seng jwaloka Ditsebi tsa Molao tsa bona." 
Matthew8:1 Hoba Jesu a theohe thabeng, matshweletshwele a mo latela." 
Matthew8:2 Yaba molepera o tla ho yena, o a mo kgumamela, o re: “Morena, ha o rata o ka ntlhwekisa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu a otlolla letsoho, a mo ama, a re: “Ke a rata, hlweka!” Hanghang lepera la hae la hlwekiswa, a fola." 
Matthew8:4 Jesu a re ho yena: “Hlokomela o se bolelle motho, o mpe o yo itlhahisa ho moprista, o ntshe nyehelo e laetsweng ke Moshe, hore e be bopaki ho bona.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yare ha Jesu a kena Kaperenauma, molaodi wa lebotho la ba lekgolo a tla ho yena, a mo rapela," 
Matthew8:6 a re: “Morena, mohlanka wa ka o diphateng ha ka, o shwele ditho, o opelwa habohlokohloko.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu a re ho yena: “Ke tla ya mo fodisa.” 
Matthew8:8 Molaodi wa lebotho a mo araba, a re: “Morena, ha ke tshwanelwe ke hore o kene ka tlung ya ka; bua feela, mme mohlanka wa ka o tla fola." 
Matthew8:9 Le nna, ke le motho ya taolong ya ba bang, ke na le bahlabani tlasa ka; ha ke re ho e mong: Eya, o a ya; le ho e mong: Tloo, o a tla; le ho mohlanka wa ka, Etsa hona, o a etsa.”" 
Matthew8:10 Ha Jesu a mo utlwa a makala, a re ho ba mo latetseng: “Ruri ke a le bolella, ha ke eso fumane tumelo e kaalo le Iseraeleng." 
Matthew8:11 Ke a le bolella, ba bangata ba tla tswa botjhabela le bophirimela, ba be dijong le Aborahama, Isaka le Jakobo Mmusong wa mahodimo," 
Matthew8:12 empa bao e leng ba Mmuso oo ka tswalo ba tla lahlelwa kantle, lefifing, moo ho tla ba teng dillo le ditsikitlano tsa meno.”" 
Matthew8:13 Yaba Jesu o re ho molaodi wa lebotho: “Eya, o etsetswe jwalokaha o dumetse!” Mohlanka wa hae a fola ka yona nako eo." 
Matthew8:14 Ha Jesu a fihla ha Petrose, a bona mohwehadi wa Petrose a le diphateng, a tshwerwe ke feberu." 
Matthew8:15 Jesu a mo ama letsohong, mme feberu ya mo tlohela; a tsoha, a sebeletsa Jesu." 
Matthew8:16 Mantsiboya ha tliswa ho Jesu ba bangata ba nang le bademona; yaba o leleka meya eo ka lentswe feela, a fodisa bakudi bohle," 
Matthew8:17 hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke moporofeta Esaya, ha a re: “O ipelesitse mahloko a rona, a inkela malwetse a rona.”" 
Matthew8:18 Ha Jesu a bona letshwele le mo teetseng hare, a laela hore ho tshelelwe mose wane." 
Matthew8:19 Setsebi sa Molao sa tla ho yena, sa re: “Moruti, ke tla o latela hohle moo o ka yang teng.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu a re ho sona: “Diphokojwe di na le mesima, dinonyana tse fofang di na le dihlaha, empa Mora Motho ha a na moo a ka samelang hlooho teng.”" 
Matthew8:21 Jwale e mong wa barutuwa ba hae a re ho yena: “Morena, ako ntumelle ke yo pata ntate pele.”" 
Matthew8:22 Jesu a re ho yena: “Ntatele, lesa bafu ba pate bafu ba bona.”" 
Matthew8:23 Jesu a kena ka sekepeng, mme barutuwa ba hae ba mo latela." 
Matthew8:24 Ha tsoha sefefo se matla letsheng, hoo sekepe se neng se kwahelwa ke maqhubu, empa yena o ne a robetse." 
Matthew8:25 Barutuwa ba atamela, ba mo tsosa, ba re: “Morena, re pholose, re a timela!”" 
Matthew8:26 A re ho bona: “Le boi keng, lona ba tumelo e fokolang?” A tsoha, a kgalemela meya le letsha, mme ha kgutsa tu!" 
Matthew8:27 Jwale batho bao ba hlollwa, ba re: “Eo ke ya jwang, ha e le moo a mamelwa le ke meya le letsha?”" 
Matthew8:28 Hoba Jesu a tshelele mose wane, fatsheng la Bagadara, a kgahlanyetswa ke banna ba babedi ba nang le bademona, ba etswa mabitleng, ba le bohale bo tshabehang; hoo ho neng ho se ya sebete ho feta ka tsela eo." 
Matthew8:29 Ba ne ba howa, ba re: “O re kene kang, Mora wa Modimo? Na o tlile kwano ho re hlokofatsa pele ho nako?”" 
Matthew8:30 Sebakana le bona ho ne ho fula mohlapehadi wa dikolobe. 
Matthew8:31 Bademona ba rapela Jesu, ba re: “Ha o re leleka mona, o mpe o re romele mohlapeng wane wa dikolobe.”" 
Matthew8:32 A re ho bona: “Eyang!” Ba tswa, ba kena dikolobeng, mme mohlape kaofela wa tsubella selomong, wa itihela letsheng, wa shwela metsing." 
Matthew8:33 Badisa ba tsona ba baleha, ba ya beha taba tsohle motseng, le tsa ba neng ba ena le bademona." 
Matthew8:34 Yaba bohle ba motse ba tswa ho ya kgahlanyetsa Jesu, mme ha ba mmona ba mo rapela hore a tswe naheng ya bona." 
Matthew9:1 Jesu a kena ka sekepeng, a tshelela motseng wa habo." 
Matthew9:2 Batho ba mo tlisetsa monna ya shweleng ditho, ba mo nkile ka diphate. Ha Jesu a bona tumelo ya bona, a re ho ya shweleng ditho: “Ngwana ka, beta pelo, o tshwaretswe dibe tsa hao.”" 
Matthew9:3 Yaba Ditsebi tse ding tsa Molao di re ka dipelong tsa tsona: “Enwa o a nyefola!” 
Matthew9:4 Jesu, ka ho tseba mehopolo ya bona, a re: “Le hopolelang bobe ka dipelong tsa lona?" 
Matthew9:5 Hantle ho leng bonolo ke hofe, ha e le ho re: O tshwaretswe dibe tsa hao, kapa ho re: Tsoha, o tsamaye?" 
Matthew9:6 Jwale hore le tle le tsebe hore Mora Motho o na le matla lefatsheng a ho tshwarela dibe,” a re ho ya shweleng ditho: “Tsoha, o nke diphate tsa hao, o ye hae!”" 
Matthew9:7 A tsoha a ya hae. 
Matthew9:8 Yare ha matshwele a bona hoo, a tshoha, mme a tlotlisa Modimo ya neileng batho matla a jwalo." 
Matthew9:9 Ha Jesu a fetela pele, a bona monna ya bitswang Matheu a dutse tlung ya lekgetho. A re ho yena: “Ntatele!” Matheu a ema, mme a mo latela." 
Matthew9:10 Eitse ha Jesu a le dijong ka tlung, balekgetho le baetsadibe ba bangata ba ja le yena le barutuwa ba hae." 
Matthew9:11 Ha Bafarisi ba bona hoo, ba re ho barutuwa ba hae: “Ke ka baka lang moruti wa lona a jang le balekgetho le baetsadibe?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yena ha a utlwa, a re ho bona: “Ba hlokang ngaka ke ba kulang, e seng ba phelang hantle." 
Matthew9:13 Eyang, le ithute hore na ke ho reng ha ho thwe: Ke thabela mohau, e seng sehlabelo. Ke tlile ho bitsa baetsadibe, e seng ba lokileng.”" 
Matthew9:14 Jwale barutuwa ba Johanne ba tla ho Jesu, ba re: “Ke ka baka lang rona le Bafarisi re itimang dijo hangata, empa barutuwa ba hao ba sa itime?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu a ba araba, a re: “Na baetsana ba ye ba hlomohe ka nako eo monyadi a ntseng a ena le bona? Ho tla tla matsatsi ao ka wona monyadi a tla tloswa ho bona, e be hona ba itimang dijo." 
Matthew9:16 “Ha ho motho ya rokellang setsiba sa lesela le letjha seaparong sa kgale, hobane setsiba se ka nathola seaparo, mme sa eketsa ho taboha." 
Matthew9:17 Hape ha ho motho ya ka tshelang veine e ntjha makukeng a kgale, esere mohlomong makuka a phatloha, veine ya qhaleha, le wona makuka a senyeha, empa o ye a tshele veine e ntjha makukeng a matjha, mme bobedi ba tsona di bolokehe.”" 
Matthew9:18 Ha Jesu a ntse a ba bolella tsena, ha fihla e mong wa baokamedi ba ntlo ya thapelo, a mo kgumamela, a re: “Moradi wa ka o sa tswa hlokahala, empa tlo o mmee letsoho, mme o tla phela.”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu a ema, a mo latela, le barutuwa ba hae ba ya le yena." 
Matthew9:20 Yaba mosadi, eo e neng e se e le dilemo tse leshome le metso e mmedi lehatlelo la hae le sa kgaotse, o hlaha Jesu kamorao, o ama qola ya seaparo sa hae," 
Matthew9:21 hobane o ne a re ka pelong: “Ha nka mpa ka ama seaparo sa hae, ke tla fola.”" 
Matthew9:22 Jesu a reteleha, mme ha a mmona, a re: “Moradi, beta pelo, tumelo ya hao e o fodisitse.” Mosadi eo a fola ho tloha nakong yona eo." 
Matthew9:23 Ha Jesu a fihla tlung ya mookamedi, mme a bona diletsi tsa makodilo le letshwele le tlatsang lerata," 
Matthew9:24 a re: “Suthang! Ngwanana ha a a shwa, o mpa a robetse.” Ba mo ja ditsheho." 
Matthew9:25 Yare ha batho ba ntsheditswe kantle, Jesu a kena a tshwara ngwanana ka letsoho, mme a tsoha." 
Matthew9:26 Taba ena ya aparela lefatshe leo lohle. 
Matthew9:27 Ha Jesu a fetela pele, difofu tse pedi tsa mo latela, di ntse di howa, di re: “Mora Davida, re hauhele!”" 
Matthew9:28 Yare ha a kena ka tlung, difofu tseo tsa tla ho yena, mme Jesu a re ho tsona: “Na le dumela hore nka etsa hoo?” Tsa mo araba, tsa re: “E, Morena!”" 
Matthew9:29 Yaba o ama mahlo a tsona, o re: “Le etsetswe ho ya ka tumelo ya lona!”" 
Matthew9:30 Yaba mahlo a tsona a a bona. Jesu a di laya, a re: “Hlokomelang, ho se be motho ya ka tsebang!”" 
Matthew9:31 Empa hoba di tswe, tsa hasanya ditaba tsa Jesu lefatsheng leo lohle." 
Matthew9:32 Yare ha difofu di tswile, ha tliswa ho Jesu motho wa semumu ya nang le modemona." 
Matthew9:33 Hoba modemona o lelekwe, semumu sa bua. Matshwele a makala, a re: “Ha ho eso ka ho hlaha ntho e tjena Iseraeleng.”" 
Matthew9:34 Empa Bafarisi ba ne ba re: “O leleka bademona ka morena wa bademona.” 
Matthew9:35 Jesu o ne a eya le metse le metsana yohle, a ntse a ruta matlung a bona a thapelo, a phatlalatsa molaetsa o molemo wa Mmuso, a fodisa mafu le malwetse wohle." 
Matthew9:36 Ha a bona batho, a ba utlwela bohloko, hobane ba ne ba kgathetse matla, ba saretswe jwaloka dinku tse se nang modisa." 
Matthew9:37 Yaba o re ho barutuwa ba hae: “Kotulo e kgolo, empa basebetsi ha ba bakae;" 
Matthew9:38 ka baka leo, rapelang monga kotulo hore a romele basebetsi kotulong ya hae.”" 
Matthew10:1 Hoba Jesu a bitse barutuwa ba hae ba leshome le metso e mmedi, a ba nea matla a ho leleka meya e ditshila, le a ho fodisa mafu le malwetse wohle." 
Matthew10:2 Mabitso a baapostola ba leshome le metso e mmedi ke ana: wa pele ke Simone ya bitswang Petrose, le Andrease ngwanabo, le Jakobo mora wa Sebedea, le Johanne ngwanabo, le" 
Matthew10:3 Filipi le Baretholome, le Thomase le Matheu molekgetho, le Jakobo mora wa Alefiose le Thadaose, le" 
Matthew10:4 Simone Motjhesehi le Judase Isekariota, ya bileng a eka Jesu." 
Matthew10:5 Jesu a roma bao ba leshome le metso e mmedi, a ba laela, a re: “Le se ke la ya dinaheng tsa bahedene, leha e le ho kena metseng ya Basamaria;" 
Matthew10:6 le mpe le ye dinkung tse lahlehileng tsa ntlo ya Iseraele. 
Matthew10:7 Le ye, le ntse le phatlalatsa, le re: Mmuso wa mahodimo o atametse." 
Matthew10:8 Fodisang bakudi, tsosang bafu, hlwekisang balepera, lelekang bademona; le amohetse feela, fanang feela." 
Matthew10:9 Le se ke la nka tjhelete ya kgauta, ya silefera, kapa ya lethose dipatjheng tsa lona." 
Matthew10:10 Maetong a lona le se ke la nka thoto, leha e le seaparo sa bobedi, kapa meqathatso, kapa lere. Ya sebetsang o lokelwa ke dijo tsa hae." 
Matthew10:11 “Motseng kapa motsaneng ofe le ofe oo le kenang ho wona, le batle ya ka le amohelang, mme le hlole teng ho fihlela le tloha." 
Matthew10:12 Ha le kena ka tlung, le dumedise;" 
Matthew10:13 haeba ntlo eo e hlile e lokela, kgotso ya lona e be ho yona; athe ha e sa lokele, kgotso ya lona e kgutlele ho lona." 
Matthew10:14 Ha mang kapa mang a sa le amohele le ho mamela dipolelo tsa lona, tswang tlung eo kapa motseng oo, le hlohlore lerole maotong a lona." 
Matthew10:15 Ruri ke a le bolella, ka letsatsi la kahlolo ditaba tsa fatshe la Sodoma le Gomora di tla ba bobebe ho feta tsa motse oo.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Bonang, ke le roma jwaloka dinku hara diphiri; ha ho le jwalo le be masene jwaloka dinoha, mme le hloke mano jwaloka maeba." 
Matthew10:17 Hlokomelang batho, hobane ba tla neelana ka lona makgotleng, ba le shape matlung a bona a thapelo." 
Matthew10:18 Le tla hulelwa kapele ho babusi le mahosi ka baka la ka, hore e be bopaki ho bona le ho bahedene." 
Matthew10:19 Ha ba neelana ka lona, le se ke la itshwenya ka hore na le tla bua jwang, le reng. Ka yona nako eo le tla newa hore na le reng," 
Matthew10:20 hobane ho tla be ho sa bue lona, empa e tla be e le Moya wa Ntata lona o buang ka lona." 
Matthew10:21 “Motho o tla neelana ka ngwanabo hore a bolawe, ngwana ka ntatae; bana ba tla fetohela batswadi, ba etse hore ba bolawe." 
Matthew10:22 Le tla hlouwa ke bohle ka baka la lebitso la ka, empa ya tla tiisetsa ho isa qetellong, o tla pholoswa." 
Matthew10:23 Ha ba le hlorisa motseng o mong, balehelang ho o mong, hobane ruri ke a le bolella, ha le ka ke la qeta metse ya Iseraele Mora Motho a eso tle." 
Matthew10:24 “Morutuwa ha a kahodimo ho moruti wa hae, le lekgoba ha le kahodimo ho monga lona." 
Matthew10:25 Ho lekane ho morutuwa hore a be jwaloka moruti wa hae, le lekgoba jwaloka monga lona. Ha monga ntlo a bitswa Beele-Sebule, ba ntlo ya hae bona ba tla bitsollwa hampe hakaakang!" 
Matthew10:26 “Ka baka leo, le se ke la ba tshaba, hobane ha ho letho le kwahetsweng le ke keng la kwahollwa, le le patilweng le ke keng la tsejwa." 
Matthew10:27 Seo ke le bolellang sona lefifing, le se phete leseding; seo le se utlwang le se nyenyeletswa, le se phatlalatse le le hodima dihlohlolo." 
Matthew10:28 Le se ke la tshaba ba bolayang mmele, empa ba ke ke ba bolaya moya; le mpe le tshabe ya nang le matla a ho timetsa moya le mmele diheleng." 
Matthew10:29 O ka reka dirobele tse pedi ka sente, empa ha ho le se seng se ka welang fatshe Ntata lona a sa tsebe." 
Matthew10:30 Ha e le lona, esita le diqoba tsa moriri wa dihlooho tsa lona di badilwe kaofela." 
Matthew10:31 Kahoo le se ke la tshaba; lona le ba bohlokwa ho feta dirobele tse ngata. 
Matthew10:32 “Mang le mang ya mpakang pela batho, le nna ke tla mo paka pela Ntate ya mahodimong," 
Matthew10:33 empa ya ntatolang pela batho, le nna ke tla mo latola pela Ntate ya mahodimong." 
Matthew10:34 “Le se ke la hloma eka ke tlisitse kgotso lefatsheng; ha ke a tlisa kgotso, ke tlisitse sabole." 
Matthew10:35 “Ke tlile ho qabanya mora le ntatae, moradi le mmae, ngwetsi le matsalayo," 
Matthew10:36 mme ba ntlo ya motho e tla ba dira tsa hae. 
Matthew10:37 “Ya ratang ntatae kapa mmae ho mpheta ha a ntokele; ya ratang mora kapa moradi ho mpheta ha a ntokele," 
Matthew10:38 mme ya sa nkeng sefapano sa hae a ntatela ha a ntokele. 
Matthew10:39 Ya qenehelang bophelo ba hae bo tla mo senyehela, athe ya senyehelwang ke bophelo ka baka la ka o tla bo fumana." 
Matthew10:40 “Ya le amohelang o a nkamohela, mme ya nkamohelang o amohela ya nthomileng." 
Matthew10:41 Ya amohelang moporofeta kahobane e le moporofeta, o tla fumana moputso wa moporofeta, mme ya amohelang ya lokileng kahobane e le ya lokileng, o tla fumana moputso wa ya lokileng." 
Matthew10:42 Ya fang e mong wa ba banyenyane bana mohope wa metsi a phodileng kahobane e le morutuwa, ruri ke a le bolella, ha a ka ke a hloka moputso wa hae.”" 
Matthew11:1 Yare ha Jesu a qetile ho laela barutuwa ba hae ba leshome le metso e mmedi, a tloha moo ho ya ruta le ho phatlalatsa molaetsa o molemo metseng ya habo bona." 
Matthew11:2 Johanne ha a le ditlamong a utlwa tsa mesebetsi ya Kreste. A roma barutuwa ba hae 
Matthew11:3 ho mmotsa: “Na ke wena ya tlang, kapa re lebelle e mong?”" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu a ba araba, a re: “Eyang, le phetele Johanne tseo le di utlwang le tseo le di bonang:" 
Matthew11:5 Difofu di a bona, diritsa di a tsamaya, balepera ba a hlwekiswa, botsebetutu ba a utlwa, bafu ba a tsoha, mme mafutsana a bolellwa molaetsa o molemo." 
Matthew11:6 Ho lehlohonolo ya sa kgoptjweng ka baka la ka!” 
Matthew11:7 Hoba baromuwa bao ba tsamaye, Jesu a qala ho bua le matshwele ka Johanne, a re: “Le ne le ilo bona eng feelleng? Lehlaka le tsukutlwang ke moya?" 
Matthew11:8 Hantlentle le ne le ilo bona eng? Motho ya diaparo tse mabokoboko? Ba diaparo di mabokoboko ba matlung a mahosi. 
Matthew11:9 Ehlile le ne le ilo bona eng? Le ilo bona moporofeta? E, ke a le bolella, e moholo le ho feta moporofeta." 
Matthew11:10 Ke eo ho ngotsweng ka yena, ha thwe: “ Ke romela leqosa la ka ke leo, le tla o etella pele, le o lokisetse tsela." 
Matthew11:11 “Ruri ke a le bolella, hara ba tswetsweng ke basadi ha ho eso hlahe ya fetang Johanne Mokolobetsi ka boholo, empa e monyenyane Mmusong wa mahodimo o mo feta ka boholo." 
Matthew11:12 Ho tloha mehleng ya Johanne Mokolobetsi ho fihlela jwale, Mmuso wa mahodimo o nnile wa futuhelwa ka matla, mme ba dikgoka ba a o hapa." 
Matthew11:13 Baporofeta bohle hammoho le Molao ba nnile ba porofeta ho fihlela ho Johanne," 
Matthew11:14 mme ha le ka kgolwa taba eo, Johanne ke yena Elia ya neng a tshwanetse ho tla." 
Matthew11:15 Ya nang le ditsebe a utlwe! 
Matthew11:16 “Jwale moloko oo ke tla o tshwantsha le eng? O tshwana le bana ba dutseng mabaleng a metse, ba howeletsana," 
Matthew11:17 ba re: “ Re le letseditse diletsa, empa ha le a ka la etsa motjeko! Re le binetse kodi-ya-malla, empa ha le a ka la lla!" 
Matthew11:18 “Etswe Johanne o ile a tla a sa je, a sa nwe, yaba ho thwe: O na le modemona." 
Matthew11:19 Mora Motho yena o tlile a eja, a enwa, yaba ho thwe: Motho enwa ke monyollo le senwi sa veine, ke motswalle wa balekgetho le baetsadibe. Empa bohlale bo netefatswa ke mesebetsi ya bona.”" 
Matthew11:20 Yaba o qala ho nyatsa metse eo a neng a entse bongata ba diketso tsa hae tse hlollang ho yona, kahobane ha e a ka ya baka." 
Matthew11:21 A re: “O madimabe, wena Korasine! O madimabe, wena Bethesaida! hobane hoja diketso tse hlollang tse entsweng kahara lona di ne di entswe Tire le Sidone, batho ba teng ba ka be ba bakile kgale, ba apere tse mahwashe, ba itshetse ka molora." 
Matthew11:22 Empa ke a le bolella, ka letsatsi la kahlolo ditaba tsa Tire le Sidone di tla mamelleha ho feta tsa lona." 
Matthew11:23 Na le wena Kaperenauma, “ebe o tla phahamisetswa lehodimong? O tla theohela tlase lebitleng! “Hoja diketso tse hlollang tse entsweng kahare ho wena di ne di entswe kahara Sodoma, motse oo o ka be o sa le teng le kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
Matthew11:24 Empa ke a le bolella, ka letsatsi la kahlolo ditaba tsa naha ya Sodoma di tla mamelleha ho feta tsa hao.”" 
Matthew11:25 Ka nako eo, Jesu a tswela pele, a re: “Ke a o boka, Ntate, Morena wa lehodimo le wa lefatshe, hobane ditaba tsena o di patetse ba bohlale le ba sedi, mme o di senoletse ba jwaloka bana." 
Matthew11:26 E, Ntate, hobane o kgahlilwe jwalo." 
Matthew11:27 “Tsohle ke di neetswe ke Ntate, mme ha ho ya tsebang Mora haese Ntate, hape ha ho ya tsebang Ntate haese Mora, le eo Mora a ratang ho mo senolela yena." 
Matthew11:28 “Tloong ho nna, lona bohle ba kgathetseng, ba imetsweng, mme ke tla le kgatholla." 
Matthew11:29 Itjariseng joko ya ka, le ithute ka nna, kahobane ke mosa, ke na le pelo e ikokobeditseng, mme le tla fumana phomolo." 
Matthew11:30 Joko ya ka e bonolo, mme thoto ya ka e bobebe.”" 
Matthew12:1 Ka nako eo, Jesu a feta hara masimo a koro e le ka Sabatha. Barutuwa ba hae ba ne ba lapile, mme ba qala ho kga matshohlo, ba a ja." 
Matthew12:2 Yare ha Bafarisi ba bona hona ba re ho yena: “Bona, barutuwa ba hao ba etsa ho sa dumellwang ka Sabatha.”" 
Matthew12:3 A re ho bona: “Na ha le a ka la bala seo Davida a neng a se etse, ha a ne a lapile mmoho le bao a neng a ena le bona;" 
Matthew12:4 kamoo a neng a kene ka Tlung ya Modimo kateng, mme ba ja bohobe bo halalelang, e leng boo yena le bao a neng a ena le bona ba neng ba sa dumellwa ho bo ja, bo jewa ke baprista feela?" 
Matthew12:5 Kapa na ha le a ka la bala Molaong hore baprista ba tlola molao wa Sabatha Tempeleng ka Disabatha, empa ha ba na molato?" 
Matthew12:6 Ke a le bolella, mona ho teng ho fetang Tempele ka boholo." 
Matthew12:7 Hoja le ne le tsebile hore na ke ho reng ha ho thwe: Ke thabela mohau, e seng sehlabelo, le ka be le sa ka la ahlola ba se nang molato." 
Matthew12:8 Mora Motho ke morena wa Sabatha.” 
Matthew12:9 Jesu ha a tloha moo a kena ka tlung ya bona ya thapelo. 
Matthew12:10 Ho ne ho le teng motho ya shweleng letsoho. Hore ba tle ba qose Jesu, Bafarisi ba mmotsa, ba re: “Na ho a dumelleha ho fodisa batho ka Sabatha?”" 
Matthew12:11 A re ho bona: “Ekaba ke mang ho lona, ya nang le nku e le nngwe, eo ekareng ha e wetse ka lenkwaneng ka Sabatha, a ke keng a e tshwara, a e nyolla?" 
Matthew12:12 Ha ho le jwalo, motho o feta nku hakaakang ka bohlokwa! Ka baka leo, ho a dumelleha ho etsa ho molemo ka Sabatha.”" 
Matthew12:13 Yaba o re ho motho eo: “Otlolla letsoho la hao!” A le otlolla, la fola, mme la boela la loka jwaloka le leng." 
Matthew12:14 Bafarisi ba tswa, ba rera kamoo ba ka bolayang Jesu kateng." 
Matthew12:15 Ha Jesu a tsebile hoo, a tloha moo. Batho ba bangata ba mo latela, mme a ba fodisa bohle," 
Matthew12:16 a ba laya hore ba se ke ba etsa hore a tsejwe; 
Matthew12:17 e le hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke moporofeta Esaya, ha a re:" 
Matthew12:18 “Bonang, mohlanka wa ka eo, ke mo kgethileng ke eo, moratuwa wa ka ya nkgahlang! Ke theoletse Moya wa ka hodima hae, o tla tlisetsa ditjhaba toka." 
Matthew12:19 A ke ke a nganga, leha e le ho peroha, lentswe la hae le ke ke la utlwahala diterateng." 
Matthew12:20 A ke ke a roba lehlaka le tenyetsehileng, le lebone le taitsang a ke ke a le tima, ho fihlela a etsa hore toka e hlole." 
Matthew12:21 Ditjhaba di tla tshepa, di tshepe lebitso la hae.”" 
Matthew12:22 Yaba ho tliswa ho Jesu monna ya nang le modemona, e le sefofu se semumu. A mo fodisa, mme sefofu se semumu sa bua, sa bona." 
Matthew12:23 Matshwele kaofela a hlollwa, a re: “Na eo hase Mora Davida?”" 
Matthew12:24 Empa Bafarisi, ha ba utlwa hona, ba re: “Enwa ha a leleke bademona, haese ka Beele-Sebule, morena wa bademona.”" 
Matthew12:25 Ka ho tseba mehopolo ya bona, Jesu a re ho bona: “Mmuso o mong le o mong o ikarolang ho itwantsha o fetoha lesupi, mme ha ho motse kapa lelapa le ikarolang ho itwantsha le ka tiyang." 
Matthew12:26 Haeba Satane a leleka Satane, o ikarotse, o a itwantsha; ha ho le jwalo mmuso wa hae o ka tiya jwang?" 
Matthew12:27 Haeba nna ke leleka bademona ka Beele-Sebule, bara ba lona ba ba leleka ka mang? Ka baka leo, e tla ba bona baahlodi ba lona." 
Matthew12:28 Empa haeba ke leleka bademona ka Moya wa Modimo, ruri Mmuso wa Modimo o fihlile ho lona." 
Matthew12:29 “Kapa motho a ka kena jwang ka tlung ya seqhobane, a hapa thepa ya sona, haeba a sa tlama seqhobane seo pele, e be hona a hapang thepa yohle ya ntlo?" 
Matthew12:30 “Ya sa emang le nna o a ntwantsha, mme ya sa bokelleng le nna o a qhalanya." 
Matthew12:31 Ka baka leo, ke a le bolella, batho ba ka tshwarelwa sebe se seng le se seng le nyefolo e nngwe le nngwe, empa ha e le nyefolo e nyefolang Moya o Halalelang, ba ke ke ba e tshwarelwa." 
Matthew12:32 Mang kapa mang ya buang se lwantshang Mora Motho o tla tshwarelwa, empa mang kapa mang ya buang se lwantshang Moya o Halalelang, a ke ke a tshwarelwa mehleng ena, leha e le mehleng e tlang." 
Matthew12:33 “Haeba sefate se le monate, le ditholwana tsa sona di monate, empa haeba sefate se le sebe, le ditholwana sa sona di mpe, hobane sefate se tsejwa ka ditholwana tsa sona." 
Matthew12:34 Lona madinyane a marabe, le ka bolela jwang tse lokileng le le kgopo tjee? Molomo o bolela se tletseng ka pelong." 
Matthew12:35 Motho ya lokileng o ntsha tse lokileng letlotlong le lokileng; athe motho ya kgopo o ntsha tse kgopo letlotlong le lebe. 
Matthew12:36 Ke a le bolella, lentswe le leng le le leng la bosawana leo batho ba le buang, ba tla ikarabella hodima lona ka letsatsi la kahlolo," 
Matthew12:37 hobane o tla bewa ya lokileng ka dipolelo tsa hao, kapa o tla ahlolwa ka dipolelo tsa hao.”" 
Matthew12:38 Yaba tse ding tsa Ditsebi tsa Molao le ba bang ba Bafarisi ba a araba, ba re: “Moruti, re rata ho bona sesupo se tswang ho wena.”" 
Matthew12:39 Jesu a ba araba, a re: “Moloko o kgopo, wa bakwenehi, o batla sesupo, empa o ke ke wa newa sesupo, haese sa moporofeta Jonase." 
Matthew12:40 Jwalokaha Jonase a bile ka mpeng ya leruarua matsatsi a mararo le masiu a mararo, ka mokgwa o jwalo Mora Motho o tla ba ka mpeng ya lefatshe matsatsi a mararo le masiu a mararo." 
Matthew12:41 Mohla kahlolo batho ba Ninife ba tla ema, ba qose moloko ona, ba o ahlole, hobane ba ne ba bake ha ba rutwa ke Jonase, empa bonang, mona ho teng ya fetang Jonase." 
Matthew12:42 Mohla kahlolo Mofumahadi wa Borwa o tla ema, a qose moloko ona, a o ahlole, hobane o ile a tloha dipheletsong tsa lefatshe ho tla mamela bohlale ba Solomone, empa mona ho teng ya fetang Solomone." 
Matthew12:43 “Moya o ditshila ha o tswile ho motho, o solla mahwatateng, o batla phomolo, empa ha o e fumane." 
Matthew12:44 Ebe o re: Ke tla kgutlela tlung ya ka, moo ke tswileng teng. Jwale ha o fihla, o e fumana e le lephaka, e fietswe, e kgabisitswe." 
Matthew12:45 Ebe o ya lata meya e meng e supileng, e o fetang ka bokgopo, mme e kene, e ahe teng, hoo ditaba tsa motho eo tsa morao di bang mpe ho feta tsa pele. Ho tla ba jwalo le ho moloko ona o kgopo.”" 
Matthew12:46 Ha Jesu a ntse a bua le matshwele, mmae le bana babo Jesu ba ne ba eme kantle, ba batla ho bua le yena." 
Matthew12:47 Motho e mong a re ho yena: “Mmao le bana beno ke bana ba eme kantle, ba batla ho bua le wena.”" 
Matthew12:48 Empa Jesu a araba ya mmolellang, a re: “Mme ke mang? Bana beso ke bo-mang?”" 
Matthew12:49 Yaba o otlolella letsoho ho barutuwa ba hae, o re: “Bonang! Mme le bana beso ke bana." 
Matthew12:50 Mang kapa mang ya etsang thato ya Ntate ya mahodimong, ke yena eo e leng ngwaneso, le kgaitsedi, le mme.”" 
Matthew13:1 Hona tsatsing leo Jesu a tswa ka tlung, a ya dula pela letsha." 
Matthew13:2 Matshweletshwele a mo kgobokanela, hoo a bileng a kena ka sekepeng; a dula teng, letshwele lohle le le lebopong." 
Matthew13:3 A le bolella ditaba tse ngata ka ditshwantsho, a re: “Mojadi o ile a tswa ho ya jala." 
Matthew13:4 Ha a ntsa jala, peo e nngwe ya wela ka tseleng, mme dinonyana tsa tla, tsa e ja." 
Matthew13:5 E nngwe ya wela mokurutlaneng, moo ho se nang mobu o mongata. Ya phakisa ya mela, hobane mobu o ne o sa teba," 
Matthew13:6 empa hoba letsatsi le tjhabe, la e tjhesa, ya omella, hobane metso e ne e sa teba." 
Matthew13:7 E nngwe ya wela hara meutlwa, mme meutlwa ya hola, ya e bipetsa." 
Matthew13:8 Empa peo e nngwe ya wela mobung o motle, mme ya beha: E nngwe tse lekgolo, e nngwe tse mashome a tsheletseng, e nngwe tse mashome a mararo." 
Matthew13:9 “Ya nang le ditsebe a utlwe.” 
Matthew13:10 Barutuwa ba tla ho yena, ba re: “Ke ka baka lang o buang le bona ka ditshwantsho?”" 
Matthew13:11 A ba araba, a re: “Lona le neilwe ho tseba diphiri tsa Mmuso wa mahodimo, athe bona ha ba a ho newa." 
Matthew13:12 Ya nang le letho o tla ekeletswa, a be a hafe ka nkatana, empa ya se nang letho o tla amohuwa le seo a nang le sona." 
Matthew13:13 Ke ka baka lena ke buang le bona ka ditshwantsho, hobane leha ba bona, ha ba bone, mme leha ba utlwa, ha ba utlwe, leha e le ho utlwisisa." 
Matthew13:14 “Ke moo ho phethahalang ho bona boporofeta ba Esaya bo reng: “ Ho utlwa le tla utlwa, empa le ke ke la utlwisisa; ho sheba le tla sheba, empa le ke ke la bona." 
Matthew13:15 Dipelo tsa setjhaba sena di thotofetse, mme ditsebe tsa sona di thibane, se itutubaditse mahlo, esere mohlomong sa bona ka mahlo a sona sa utlwa ka ditsebe tsa sona, sa sokoloha, yaba ke a se fodisa." 
Matthew13:16 “Empa lona le lehlohonolo kahobane mahlo a lona a a bona, le ditsebe tsa lona di a utlwa." 
Matthew13:17 Etswe ruri ke a le bolella, baporofeta le ba lokileng ba bangata ba ne ba lakatsa ho bona seo le se bonang, empa ha ba a ka ba se bona, le ho utlwa seo le se utlwang, empa ha ba a ka ba se utlwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Ha ho le jwalo, lona, utlwang setshwantsho sa mojadi." 
Matthew13:19 Mang le mang ha a utlwa lentswe la Mmuso wa Modimo, mme a sa le utlwisise, E Mobe o ye a tle, a mo amohe se jetsweng pelong ya hae; enwa ke yona peo e jetsweng ka tseleng." 
Matthew13:20 Peo e jetsweng mokurutlaneng ke ya utlwang lentswe, a phakise a le amohele ka thabo," 
Matthew13:21 empa ha a na metso ka ho yena, ke motho ya mamellang ka nakwana, mme ha ho hlaha matshwenyeho kapa ditlhoriso ka baka la Lentswe la Modimo, o phakisa ho kweneha." 
Matthew13:22 Peo e jetsweng meutlweng ke ya utlwang lentswe, feela dikgathatso tsa mehla ya jwale le thetso ya maruo di bipetsa lentswe, le nyope." 
Matthew13:23 Peo e jetsweng mobung o motle ke ya utlwang lentswe, mme a le utlwisise. Enwa ke yena ya behang tse lekgolo, kapa tse mashome a tsheletseng, kapa tse mashome a mararo.”" 
Matthew13:24 Jesu a ba bolella setshwantsho se seng, a re: “Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwantshwa le motho ya jetseng peo e ntle tshimong ya hae." 
Matthew13:25 Yare ha ho robetswe, sera sa hae sa tla, sa jala mofoka hara koro, mme sa ikela." 
Matthew13:26 Ha lekgaba le se le metse, le bile le tswetse, mofoka le wona wa bonahala." 
Matthew13:27 “Basebeletsi ba monga tshimo ba tla ho yena, ba re: Monghadi, na o ne o sa jala peo e ntle tshimong ya hao? Jwale mofoka o tswa kae?" 
Matthew13:28 “A re ho bona: Hono ho entswe ke sera. “Basebeletsi ba re ho yena: Jwale na o rata hore re yo o fothola? 
Matthew13:29 “A re: Tjhe, esere ha le fothola mofoka la fotholella le koro." 
Matthew13:30 Di leseng di hole hammoho ho fihlela mohla kotulo, mme ka nako ya kotulo ke tla re ho bakotudi: Fotholang mofoka pele, le o tlame mangata, o tle o tjheswe, koro yona le e bokelle disiung tsa ka. ”" 
Matthew13:31 Jesu a ba bolella setshwantsho se seng hape, a re: “Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwana le tlhaku ya mosetareta, eo motho a ileng a e nka, a e jala tshimong ya hae." 
Matthew13:32 Ke yona e nyenyane ho feta dipeo tsohle, empa ha e se e hotse, e feta ditlama tse ding tsohle ka boholo, e be sefate seo dinonyana tse fofang di ahelang makaleng a sona.”" 
Matthew13:33 A ba bolella setshwantsho se seng hape, a re: “Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwana le tomoso, eo mosadi a ileng a e nka, a e dubella phofong ya koro e tekanyo di tharo, ho fihlela hlama kaofela e ba e lomoseha.”" 
Matthew13:34 Tseo tsohle Jesu a di bolella matshwele ka ditshwantsho, mme o ne a sa a bolelle letho haese ka ditshwantsho;" 
Matthew13:35 e le hore ho tle ho phethahale ho boletsweng ke moporofeta, ha a re: “Ke tla bua le bona ka ditshwantsho, ke bolele tse neng di patehile haesale fatshe le thewa.”" 
Matthew13:36 Yaba Jesu o tloha hara matshwele, o kena ka tlung. Barutuwa ba hae ba tla ho yena, ba re: “Ako re qaqisetse setshwantsho sa mofoka o tshimong.”" 
Matthew13:37 A ba araba, a re: “Ya jalang peo e ntle ke Mora Motho." 
Matthew13:38 Tshimo ke lefatshe; peo e ntle ke bao e leng bana ba Mmuso wa Modimo, mofoka ke bana ba E Mobe." 
Matthew13:39 Sera se o jetseng ke Diabolosi. Kotulo ke bofelo ba mehla ya jwale; bakotudi ke mangeloi. 
Matthew13:40 “Jwalokaha mofoka o ye o fotholwe, o tjheswe mollong, ho tla ba jwalo bofelong ba mehla ya jwale." 
Matthew13:41 Mora Motho o tla romela mangeloi a hae, mme a tla tlosa Mmusong wa hae tsohle tse kgopisang le ba etsang bokgopo;" 
Matthew13:42 a tla ba lahlela seboping sa mollo, moo ho tla ba teng dillo le ditsikitlano tsa meno." 
Matthew13:43 Mohlang oo ba lokileng ba tla kganya jwaloka letsatsi Mmusong wa Ntata bona. Ya nang le ditsebe a utlwe. 
Matthew13:44 “Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwana le letlotlo le patilweng tshimong, leo eitseng ha motho a le fumana, a le pata, mme thabong ya hae a ya rekisa tsohle tseo a nang le tsona, a reka tshimo eo." 
Matthew13:45 “Hape, Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwana le mohwebi ya batlang mabenyane a bohlokwa," 
Matthew13:46 eo ereng hoba a fumane le leng la bohlokwahadi, a yo rekisa tsohle tseo a nang le tsona, a le reke." 
Matthew13:47 “Hapehape, Mmuso wa mahodimo o tshwana le letlowa le akgetsweng lewatleng, le haharang ditlhapi tsa mefutafuta," 
Matthew13:48 leo ereng ha le se le tletse, batshwasi ba le hulele lebopong, ba dule fatshe, ba hlwaele tse ntle ka dipitseng, tse mpe tsona ba di lahle." 
Matthew13:49 Ho tla ba jwalo bofelong ba mehla ya jwale; mangeloi a tla tla a kgethe ba kgopo ho ba lokileng," 
Matthew13:50 a ba lahlele seboping sa mollo, moo ho tla ba teng dillo le ditsikitlano tsa meno.”" 
Matthew13:51 Jesu a ba botsa, a re: “Na le utlwisisa tsee tsohle?” Ba re ho yena: “E.”" 
Matthew13:52 A re ho bona: “Ka baka leo, Setsebi se seng le se seng sa Molao se rutilweng tsa Mmuso wa mahodimo se tshwana le monga ntlo ya ntshang tse ntjha le tsa kgale letlotlong la hae.”" 
Matthew13:53 Yare hoba Jesu a qete ho bolela ditshwantsho tsena, a tloha moo," 
Matthew13:54 a fihla motseng wa habo, mme a rutela batho tlung ya bona ya thapelo, hoo ba ileng ba hlollwa, mme ba re: “Bohlale boo le diketso tsee tse hlollang, eo o di nka kae?" 
Matthew13:55 Na hase mora wa mmetli wa mapolanka? Na mmae hase ya bitswang Maria, le baena ba hae hase bo-Jakobo, le Josefa, le Simone, le Juda?" 
Matthew13:56 Na dikgaitsedi tsa hae tsohle ha di hara rona moo? Ha ho le jwalo, tsena tsohle yena o di nka kae?”" 
Matthew13:57 Ba kgopiseha ke yena. Jesu a re ho bona: “Moporofeta o hlomphuwa hohle haese motseng wa habo le tlung yabo feela.” 
Matthew13:58 Moo teng ha a ka a etsa diketso tse matla, tse hlollang, ka baka la ho se dumele ha bona." 
Matthew14:1 Ka nako eo kgosi Heroda a utlwa botumo ba Jesu. 
Matthew14:2 A re ho basebeletsi ba hae: “Motho eo ke Johanne Mokolobetsi; o tsohile bafung; ka baka leo, matla a hlollang a sebetsa ka ho yena.”" 
Matthew14:3 Heroda o ne a ile a tshwara Johanne, a mo tlama, mme a mo kenya tjhankaneng ka baka la Herodiase, mohatsa moena hae Filipi." 
Matthew14:4 Johanne o ne a ile a re ho Heroda: “Ha ho dumellehe hore o mo nyale.” 
Matthew14:5 Heroda o ne a rata ho mmolaya, empa a tshaba batho, hobane ba ne ba tadima Johanne e le moporofeta." 
Matthew14:6 Mohla mokete wa kgopotso ya tswalo ya Heroda, moradi wa Herodiase a etsa motjeko pontsheng ho bona, mme a kgahlisa Heroda;" 
Matthew14:7 ka baka leo, a mo tshepisa ka ho ikana hore o tla mo fa eng kapa eng eo a ka e kopang." 
Matthew14:8 Ka ho susumetswa ke mmae, morwetsana a re: “Mphe hona mona, ka mokeke, hlooho ya Johanne Mokolobetsi.”" 
Matthew14:9 Mmusisi a swaba, empa ka baka la kano ya hae, le ka baka la ba leng dijong le yena, a laela hore a e newe." 
Matthew14:10 Yaba o laela hore Johanne a kgaolwe hlooho tjhankaneng. 
Matthew14:11 Hlooho ya hae ya tliswa ka mokeke, ya newa morwetsana, mme yena a e isa ho mmae." 
Matthew14:12 Barutuwa ba Johanne ba tla, ba nka setopo, ba se epela; ba nto ya tsebisa Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Yare ha Jesu a utlwa pehi eo, a tloha moo ka sekepe, a ikela nahathothe boinotshing. Matshwele ha a utlwa a mo latela ka maoto, a etswa metseng." 
Matthew14:14 Ha Jesu a etswa sekepeng, a bona letshwelehadi, a utlwela batho bohloko, mme a fodisa bakudi ba bona." 
Matthew14:15 Ha ho phirima, barutuwa ba hae ba tla ho yena, ba re: “Mona ke nahathothe, mme nako e se e ile; lokolla batho bana, ba tle ba yo ithekela dijo metseng.”" 
Matthew14:16 Empa Jesu a re ho bona: “Ha ho hlokahale hore ba tsamaye; ba fepeng e le lona.” 
Matthew14:17 Ba re ho yena: “Mona ha re na letho haese dinkgwa tse hlano le ditlhapi tse pedi.” 
Matthew14:18 A re: “Ntlisetseng tsona mona.” 
Matthew14:19 Hoba a laele matshwele ho dula jwanng, a nka dinkgwa tseo tse hlano le ditlhapi tseo tse pedi, a lelalla lehodimong, a boka, a ngwatha dinkgwa, a di nea barutuwa, mme ba di abela matshwele." 
Matthew14:20 Ba eja bohle, ba kgora; yaba ho bokellwa makumane a setseng, mme a tlatsa diroto tse leshome le metso e mmedi." 
Matthew14:21 Ba jeleng e ne e le banna ba ka bang dikete tse hlano, ho sa balwe basadi le bana." 
Matthew14:22 Kapelepele Jesu a laela barutuwa ba hae ho kena ka sekepeng, ho mo etella pele ho ya mose wane, ha yena a ntse a qhala matshwele." 
Matthew14:23 Hoba a a qhale, a nyolohela thabeng ho ya rapela boinotshing, ha ba ha phirima a ntse a le mong hona moo." 
Matthew14:24 Sekepe sona se ne se se se le hole le lebopo, se tsukutlwa ke maqhubu, hobane se ne se tobane le moya." 
Matthew14:25 Kameso, Jesu a ya ho bona a tsamaya hodima metsi." 
Matthew14:26 Ha barutuwa ba mmona a tsamaya hodima metsi, ba tshoha, ba re: “He! ke sethotsela!” mme ba bokolla ke ho tshaba." 
Matthew14:27 Yaba Jesu o phakisa a bua le bona, a re: “Kgobang matshwafo! Ke nna, se tshabeng!”" 
Matthew14:28 Petrose a mo araba, a re: “Morena, haeba ke wena, ntaele hore ke tle ho wena ke tsamaya hodima metsi.”" 
Matthew14:29 A re: “Tloo!” Yaba Petrose o tswa sekepeng, o tsamaya hodima metsi, o leba ho Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Empa ha a utlwa moya wa sefefo a tshoha, a qala ho teba, mme a howa, a re: “Morena, mpholose!”" 
Matthew14:31 Hanghang Jesu a nanabetsa letsoho, a mo phamola, a re ho yena: “Wena ya tumelo e fokolang! O belaetse ka lebaka lang?”" 
Matthew14:32 Hoba ba kene ka sekepeng, moya wa teba." 
Matthew14:33 Ba neng ba le ka sekepeng ba mo kgumamela, ba re: “Kannete o Mora wa Modimo!”" 
Matthew14:34 Yare ha ba se ba tsheletse mose, ba fihla lebopong la Genesareta." 
Matthew14:35 Ha banna ba sebaka seo ba se ba mo tsebile, ba hlaba mokgosi sebakeng seo sohle, mme batho ba mo tlisetsa bohle ba kulang." 
Matthew14:36 Ba mo kopa hore a ba dumelle ho ama feela qola ya seaparo sa hae mme bohle ba e amileng ba fola. 
Matthew15:1 Yaba Bafarisi ba bang le Ditsebi tse ding tsa Molao ba tla ho Jesu ba etswa Jerusalema, ba re:" 
Matthew15:2 “Ke ka baka lang ha barutuwa ba hao ba sa hlomphe moetlo wa baholoholo? Ha ba hatlele ha ba eja.” 
Matthew15:3 A ba araba, a re: “Ho ya kang ha lona, ka baka la ho boulela moetlo wa lona, le tlola taelo ya Modimo?" 
Matthew15:4 Modimo o itse: Hlompha ntatao le mmao, mme hape a re: Ya rohakang ntatae kapa mmae a bolawe." 
Matthew15:5 Empa lona le re, ha motho a ena le seo a ka thusang ntatae kapa mmae ka sona, feela a re: Hona ke mpho ho Modimo," 
Matthew15:6 ha ho sa hlokahala hore a hlomphe ntatae. Ka baka la moetlo wa lona he, le fetotse taelo ya Modimo lefeela." 
Matthew15:7 Baikaketsi ting! Esaya o porofetile hantle ka lona, ha a re:" 
Matthew15:8 “ Setjhaba sena se ntlhompha ka melomo ya sona feela, empa dipelo tsa sona di hole le nna;" 
Matthew15:9 se nkgumamella lefeela, empa se ruta dithuto tseo e leng ditaelo tsa batho! ”" 
Matthew15:10 Jesu a bitsa letshwele, a re ho lona: “Mamelang, le utlwisise!" 
Matthew15:11 Se kenang ka molomo ha se silafatse motho, empa se tswang ka molomo ke sona se mo silafatsang.”" 
Matthew15:12 Yaba barutuwa ba tla ho yena, ba re: “Na o a tseba hore Bafarisi ba kgopisitswe ke seo o ileng wa se bua?”" 
Matthew15:13 A ba araba, a re: “Semela se seng le se seng se sa lengwang ke Ntate ya mahodimong se tla motsulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Ba tloheleng, ke difofu tse tataisang difofu tse ding. Haeba sefofu se tataisa sefofu se seng, bobedi di tla wela ka lengopeng.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petrose a re ho yena: “Ako re qaqisetse se bolelwang ke setshwantsho sena.” 
Matthew15:16 Jesu a re: “Na le lona le ntse le hloka kutlwisiso? 
Matthew15:17 Na ha le utlwisise hore se kenang ka molomo se fetisetswa maleng, se nto lahlwa mohlabeng?" 
Matthew15:18 Empa tse tswang ka molomo di tswa pelong, mme ke tsona tse silafatsang motho;" 
Matthew15:19 hobane pelong ho tswa mehopolo e kgopo: polao ya sehloho, bofebe, bohlola, boshodu, bopaki ba leshano le diketseletso." 
Matthew15:20 Tsena ke tsona tse silafatsang motho, empa ho ja, motho a sa hlapa matsoho, ha ho mo silafatse.”" 
Matthew15:21 Jesu a tloha moo a ya dibakeng tsa Tire le Sidone. 
Matthew15:22 Yaba mosadi wa Mokanana, ya tswang teng, o tla a howa, a re: “Morena, Mora Davida, nkutlwele bohloko! Moradi wa ka o tshwenngwa hampe ke modemona.”" 
Matthew15:23 Empa Jesu a se ke a mo araba. Barutuwa ba hae ba tla, ba mo kopa, ba re: “Mo leleke! Bona kamoo a howang a re setse morao kateng!”" 
Matthew15:24 Jesu a araba, a re: “Ha ho moo ke romilweng, haese dinkung tsa ntlo ya Iseraele tse lahlehileng.”" 
Matthew15:25 Empa mosadi a tla, a itihela maotong a hae, a re: “Nthuse, Morena!”" 
Matthew15:26 Yaba Jesu o re: “Hase hantle ho nka bohobe ba bana, bo akgellwe dintja.”" 
Matthew15:27 Mosadi a re: “Ke nnete, Morena, empa le tsona dintja di ja makumane a wang tafoleng ya monga tsona.”" 
Matthew15:28 Jesu ha a utlwa hona, a re: “Mosadi, tumelo ya hao e kaakang! A ho etswe kamoo o lakatsang kateng!” Mme ho tloha nakong yona eo moradi wa hae a fola." 
Matthew15:29 Hoba Jesu a tlohe sebakeng seo, a nka tsela e tsamayang pela letsha la Galelea, a nyolohela thabeng, a dula teng." 
Matthew15:30 Matshweletshwele a tla ho yena, a tlisa dihlotsa, difofu, diritsa, dimumu, le ba bang ba bangata, a ba bea pela maoto a hae, mme Jesu a ba fodisa." 
Matthew15:31 Batho ba hlollwa haholo ha ba bona dimumu di bua, dihlotsa di fodile, diritsa di tsamaya, difofu di bona, mme ba tlotlisa Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu a bitsa barutuwa ba hae, a re ho bona: “Ke utlwela batho bana bohloko, kahobane ba bile le nna matsatsi a mararo, mme ha ba na letho leo ba ka le jang. Ha ke lakatse ho ba qhala ba eso je, esere mohlomong ba fellwa ke matla tseleng.”" 
Matthew15:33 Barutuwa ba re ho yena: “Ekaba hara lefeella lee re ka fumana hokae bohobe bo lekaneng ho kgorisa letshwele le lekaale?” 
Matthew15:34 Jesu a ba botsa, a re: “Le na le dinkgwa tse kae?” Ba re: “Ke dinkgwa tse supileng le ditlhatswana tse seng kaenyana.”" 
Matthew15:35 Hoba a laele batho hore ba dule fatshe," 
Matthew15:36 a nka dinkgwa tse supileng le ditlhatswana; a leboha Modimo, yaba o a ngwatha, o nea barutuwa ba hae, mme bona ba abela matshwele." 
Matthew15:37 Bohle ba eja, ba kgora, mme ha ba bokella makumane a setseng ba tlatsa diroto tse supileng tse kgolo." 
Matthew15:38 Ba jeleng e ne e le banna ba dikete tse nne, ho sa balwe basadi le bana." 
Matthew15:39 Yaba o qhala matshwele, o kena ka sekepeng, o ya naheng ya Magadane." 
Matthew16:1 Bafarisi le Basaduke ba tla ho Jesu, mme ka ho mo leka ba kopa hore a ke a ba bontshe sesupo se tswang lehodimong." 
Matthew16:2 A ba araba, a re: “Ha ho phirimile le ye le re: Letsatsi le tla ba letle, hobane lehodimo le lefubedu." 
Matthew16:3 Hoseng le re: Kajeno ho tla ba le sefefo, hobane lehodimo le bofubedu bo lefifi. Le tseba ho hlalosa sebopeho sa lehodimo; athe le sitwa ho hlalosa ditshupo tsa dinako tsee!" 
Matthew16:4 Moloko o kgopo, wa bakwenehi, o batla sesupo, empa o ke ke wa newa sesupo, haese sa Jonase.” Yaba o tloha ho bona, o a ikela." 
Matthew16:5 Ha barutuwa ba tshelela mose wane, ba lemoha hore ba lebetse ho inkela bohobe." 
Matthew16:6 Jesu a re ho bona: “Ebang sedi, le hlokomele tomoso ya Bafarisi le Basaduke.”" 
Matthew16:7 Ba buisana ba le bang, ba re: “Ke hobane ha re a tla le bohobe!”" 
Matthew16:8 Empa Jesu ka ho tseba mehopolo ya bona, a re: “Lona ba tumelo e fokolang! Keng ha le buisana, le re: Ke hobane ha re a tla le bohobe?" 
Matthew16:9 Na le jwale ha le eso utlwisise? Na ha le sa hopola dinkgwa tse hlano tseo le neng le di abele ba dikete tse hlano, le hore na le ne le bokelle diroto tse kae tse tletseng makumane?" 
Matthew16:10 Leha e le dinkgwa tse supileng tseo le neng le di abele ba dikete tse nne, le hore na le ne le bokelle diroto tse kae tse kgolo tse tletseng makumane?" 
Matthew16:11 Le sitwa keng ho utlwisisa hore ke ne ke sa bue le lona ka bohobe? Empa hlokomelang tomoso ya Bafarisi le Basaduke.” 
Matthew16:12 Jwale ba utlwisisa hore o ne a sa re ba hlokomele tomoso ya bohobe bo jewang, empa ba hlokomele thuto ya Bafarisi le Basaduke." 
Matthew16:13 Yare ha Jesu a fihla sebakeng sa Sesaria-Filipi, a botsa barutuwa ba hae, a re: “Batho ba re Mora Motho ke mang?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ba re: “Ba bang ba re: Ke Johanne Mokolobetsi, ba bang ba re: Ke Elia, mme ba bang ba re: Ke Jeremia kapa e mong wa baporofeta. ”" 
Matthew16:15 A re ho bona: “Empa lona le re nna ke mang?” 
Matthew16:16 Simone Petrose a araba, a re: “O Kreste, Mora wa Modimo ya phelang.”" 
Matthew16:17 Jesu a mo araba, a re: “O lehlohonolo, Simone mora Jona, kahobane hase motho wa nama le madi ya o senoletseng hona, empa ke Ntate ya mahodimong." 
Matthew16:18 Jwale le nna ke a o bolella, ke re: O Petrose, mme hodima lefika lena ke tla haha kereke ya ka, mme monyako wa Nqalo ya Bafu o ke ke wa e hlola." 
Matthew16:19 Ke tla o nea dinotlolo tsa Mmuso wa lehodimo; seo o se tlamang lefatsheng se tla tlangwa lehodimong, mme seo o se lokollang lefatsheng se tla lokollwa lehodimong.”" 
Matthew16:20 Yaba o laya barutuwa ba hae hore ba se ke ba bolella motho hore ke yena Kreste. 
Matthew16:21 Ho tloha ka nako eo Jesu a qala ho qaqisetsa barutuwa ba hae hore eka kgona a ye Jerusalema, a yo hlokofatswa haholo ke baholo, le baprista ba baholo, le Ditsebi tsa Molao, a bolawe, mme ka tsatsi la boraro a tsoswe bafung." 
Matthew16:22 Petrose a mo nkela kathoko, a mo kgalemela, a re: “Morena Modimo a hauhe! Hona ha ho ka ke ha etsahala ho wena.”" 
Matthew16:23 Empa Jesu a retelehela ho Petrose, a re: “Tloha ho nna, Satane! O sekgopi ho nna, kahobane ha o hopole tsa Modimo, o hopola tsa botho!”" 
Matthew16:24 Yaba Jesu o re ho barutuwa ba hae: “Haeba mang kapa mang a rata ho ntatela, a itele, a inkele sefapano, a ntatele." 
Matthew16:25 Mang le mang ya ratang ho baballa bophelo ba hae bo tla mo senyehela, empa mang le mang ya senyehelwang ke bophelo ba hae ka baka la ka o tla bo rua." 
Matthew16:26 Ebe motho a ka boellwa ke eng haeba a ka rua lefatshe lohle, empa a senyehelwa ke bophelo ba hae? Kapa motho a ka rekanya bophelo ba hae ka eng?" 
Matthew16:27 Mora Motho o tla tla ka tlotla ya Ntatae le mangeloi a hae, mme o tla putsa motho ka mong ka ho ya ka seo a se entseng." 
Matthew16:28 Ruri ke a le bolella: Ho na le ba bang hara ba emeng mona ba ke keng ba tseba lefu ho fihlela ba bona Mora Motho a etla ka Mmuso wa hae.” 
Matthew17:1 Kamora matsatsi a tsheletseng, Jesu a nka bo-Petrose, Jakobo le Johanne ngwanabo, a nyolohela le bona thabeng e telele, boinotshing." 
Matthew17:2 A fetoha tshobotsi a le pela bona, sefahleho sa hae sa kganya jwaloka letsatsi, diaparo tsa hae tsa eba tshweu jwaloka lesedi." 
Matthew17:3 Jwale Moshe le Elia ba iponahatsa ho bona, ba ntse ba bua le Jesu." 
Matthew17:4 Petrose a re ho Jesu: “Morena, ke hantle ha re le mona; ha o rata ke tla hloma maphephe a mararo mona, le leng e be la hao, le leng e be la Moshe, le leng e be la Elia.”" 
Matthew17:5 Yare a sa bua, leru le kganyang la ba kgurumetsa, lentswe la tswa lerung, la re: “Enwa ke Mora wa ka eo ke mo ratang, ya nkgahlang; mo mameleng.”" 
Matthew17:6 Ha barutuwa ba utlwa hoo, ba itihela fatshe ka difahleho, ba tshohile haholo." 
Matthew17:7 Jesu a tla ho bona, a ba ama, a re: “Emang, se tshabeng!”" 
Matthew17:8 Yare ha ba phahamisa mahlo a bona ba se ke ba bona motho haese Jesu feela. 
Matthew17:9 Yare ha ba ntse ba theoha thabeng, Jesu a ba laya, a re: “Le se ke la bolella motho ka pono ena, ho fihlela ha Mora Motho a se a tsositswe bafung.”" 
Matthew17:10 Barutuwa ba mmotsa, ba re: “Ke hobaneng Ditsebi tsa Molao di reng eka kgona Elia a tle pele?”" 
Matthew17:11 A ba araba, a re: “Elia o hlile o a tla, mme o tla busetsa dintho tsohle madulong." 
Matthew17:12 Empa nna ke re ho lona: Elia o se a ile a tla, mme ha ba a ka ba mo tseba, empa ba ile ba mo etsa kamoo ba ratang kateng; ka mokgwa o jwalo Mora Motho le yena o tla hlokofatswa ke bona.”" 
Matthew17:13 Jwale barutuwa ba utlwisisa hore o ne a bua le bona ka Johanne Mokolobetsi. 
Matthew17:14 Hoba ba fihle hara letshwele, monna e mong a tla ho Jesu, a kgumama kapele ho yena," 
Matthew17:15 a re: “Morena, hauhela mora wa ka, hobane o shwa sethwathwa, o utlwa bohloko ka ho fetisisa, mme o atisa ho wela mollong le metsing." 
Matthew17:16 Ke ile ka mo tlisa ho barutuwa ba hao, empa ba sitilwe ho mo fodisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Jesu a araba, a re: “A moloko o sa dumeleng, o kgopo! Ke tla ba le lona ho fihlela neng? Ke tla le mamella ho fihlela neneng? Mo tliseng ho nna mona!”" 
Matthew17:18 Jesu a mo kgalemela, mme modemona wa tswa ho yena, moshanyana a fola ka yona nako eo." 
Matthew17:19 Jwale barutuwa ba tla ho Jesu ka lekunutu, ba re: “Ke ka baka lang rona re sitilweng ho leleka modemona?”" 
Matthew17:20 A re ho bona: “Ke hobane tumelo ya lona e a fokola. Kannete ke a le bolella, ke re: Hoja le na le tumelo e kaa ka tlhaku ya mosetareta le ne le tla re ho thaba ena: Sutha mona, o ye mane, mme e ne e tla sutha. Ha ho letho le ka le sitang." 
Matthew17:21 Mofuta ona ha o tswe haese ka thapelo le ka ho itima dijo.” 
Matthew17:22 Ha ba ntse ba tsamaya hammoho Galelea, Jesu a re ho bona: “Mora Motho o se a tla neelwa matsohong a batho," 
Matthew17:23 mme ba tla mmolaya, empa o tla tsoha bafung ka tsatsi la boraro.” Yaba ba swaba haholo." 
Matthew17:24 Ha ba fihla Kaperenauma, babokelli ba lekgetho la Tempele ba tla ho Petrose, ba re: “Na moruti wa lona o ntsha lekgetho la Tempele?”" 
Matthew17:25 A re: “E, o a le ntsha.” Ha Petrose a kena ka tlung, Jesu a mo raka, a re: “Wena o reng, Simone? Mahosi a lefatshe a bokella lekgetho la kgwebo kapa la monna ho bomang? Ho bara ba wona kapa ho baditjhaba?”" 
Matthew17:26 Yare ha a re: “Ho baditjhaba,” Jesu a re ho yena: “Ha ho le jwalo, bara ba lokolohile." 
Matthew17:27 Empa hore re tle re se ke ra ba kgopisa, eya lewatleng, o akgele selope, mme tlhapi eo o tla e tshwasa pele, o e nke, o e ahlamolle, mme o tla fumana setatera; o se nke, o ba nee sona ho lefella rona le wena.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ka nako eo barutuwa ba tla ho Jesu, ba re: “E moholo Mmusong wa mahodimo ke mang?”" 
Matthew18:2 Jesu a bitsa ngwana, a mo emisa kapele ho bona," 
Matthew18:3 a re: “Ruri ke re ho lona, ha le sa fetohe la tshwana le bana, le ke ke la kena Mmusong wa mahodimo." 
Matthew18:4 Ka baka leo, ya ikokobetsang jwaloka ngwana enwa ke yena e moholo Mmusong wa mahodimo." 
Matthew18:5 Mang kapa mang ya amohelang ngwana ya jwaloka enwa lebitsong la ka, o a nkamohela." 
Matthew18:6 “Mang kapa mang ya dihelang sebeng e mong wa ba banyenyane bana ba dumelang ho nna, ho molemo ho yena hore a tlamellwe lelwala molaleng, mme a dihelwe bodibeng ba lewatle." 
Matthew18:7 Ho madimabe lefatshe ka baka la dikgopiso. Dikgopiso di tlameha ho hlaha, empa ho madimabe motho eo dikgopiso di hlahang ka yena." 
Matthew18:8 “Haeba letsoho la hao kapa leoto la hao le o dihela sebeng, le pome, o le lahle; ho molemo ho wena ho kena bophelong o le tsohane kapa kotwane ho ena le ho lahlelwa mollong o sa timeng o ena le matsoho a mabedi kapa maoto a mabedi." 
Matthew18:9 Ha leihlo la hao le o dihela sebeng, le honye, o le lahle; ho molemo ho wena ho kena bophelong o le moihlwe, ho ena le ho lahlelwa mollong wa dihele o le mahlo a mabedi." 
Matthew18:10 “Hlokomelang hore le se ke la nyedisa e mong wa ba banyenyane bana, hobane ke a le bolella: Mangeloi a bona a lehodimong, a bona sefahleho sa Ntate ya mahodimong kamehla." 
Matthew18:11 Mora Motho o tlile ho pholosa se neng se lahlehile. 
Matthew18:12 “Le reng na? Ha motho e ena le dinku tse lekgolo, mme e nngwe ya tsona e lahleha, na a ke ke a siya tse mashome a robong a metso e robong dithabeng, a ya batla e lahlehileng?" 
Matthew18:13 Haeba a ka e fumana, ruri ke re ho lona, o tla e thabela ho feta tse mashome a robong a metso e robong tse sa kang tsa lahleha." 
Matthew18:14 Ka mokgwa o jwalo, Ntata lona ya mahodimong ha a rate hore ho timele le ya mong wa ba banyenyane bana." 
Matthew18:15 “Ha ngwaneno a o sitetswe, eya, o mo nyatse le le inotshi. Haeba a o mamela, e tla ba o hapile pelo ya hae." 
Matthew18:16 Empa ha a sa o mamele, nka motho a le mong kapa ba babedi, e le hore taba efe kapa efe e tiiswe ka bopaki ba batho ba babedi kapa ba bararo," 
Matthew18:17 empa ha a hana ho ba mamela, bolella kereke; haeba a hana ho mamela le yona kereke, mo tadime e le mohedene le molekgetho." 
Matthew18:18 “Ruri ke re ho lona: Tsohle tseo le di tlamang lefatsheng di tla tlangwa lehodimong, mme tsohle tseo le di lokollang lefatsheng di tla lokollwa lehodimong." 
Matthew18:19 “Hape ke re ho lona: Haeba ba babedi ba lona ba eba ntsweleng nthong e nngwe le e nngwe eo ba e kopang lefatsheng, ba tla e etsetswa ke Ntate ya mahodimong," 
Matthew18:20 hobane moo ba babedi kapa ba bararo ba phuthehetseng teng ka lebitso la ka, ke teng hara bona.”" 
Matthew18:21 Jwale Petrose a tla ho yena, a re: “Morena, ngwaneso ha a ntse a ntshitelwa ke tla mo tshwarela hakae? Hasupa na?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu a re ho yena: “Ke re ho wena e seng hasupa, empa ha mashome a supileng hasupa." 
Matthew18:23 “Ka baka leo, Mmuso wa mahodimo o ka tshwantshwa le kgosi e itseng, e ratileng ho hlahlobisana boemo ba tshebetso le bahlanka ba yona." 
Matthew18:24 Eitse ha e qala ho etsa jwalo, ya tlisetswa e mong ya nang le molato wa tjhelete e ditalenta tse kete tse leshome." 
Matthew18:25 Kaha a ne a hloka seo a neng a ka lefa ka sona, monga hae a laela hore a rekiswe hammoho le mosadi wa hae, le bana ba hae, le tsohle tseo a nang le tsona, mme ho lefshwe." 
Matthew18:26 “Empa mohlanka a itihela maotong a hae, a re: Nkgauhele, ke tla o lefa tsohle." 
Matthew18:27 Monga mohlanka eo a mo utlwela bohloko, a mo lokolla, a mo leballa molato." 
Matthew18:28 “Empa hoba mohlanka eo a tswe, a kopana le e mong wa balekane ba hae ba bohlanka, ya neng a ena le molato wa didenare tse lekgolo ho yena. A mo tshwara, a mo kgama, a re: Lefa molato wa hao!" 
Matthew18:29 “Molekane wa hae a itihela maotong a hae, a mo rapela, a re: Nkgauhele, ke tla o lefa." 
Matthew18:30 Empa yena a hana, a ya mo hlahlela tjhankaneng ho fihlela a ka lefa molato." 
Matthew18:31 Ha balekane ba hae ba bohlanka ba bona se etsahetseng, ba swaba haholo, mme ba ya phetela monga bona tsohle tse etsahetseng." 
Matthew18:32 “Yaba monga hae o a mmitsa, o re ho yena: Mohlanka ya kgopo, ke o lebaletse molato wohle hobane o ile wa nthapela." 
Matthew18:33 Na e ne e se tshwanelo hore le wena o hauhele molekane wa hao, jwalokaha le nna ke ile ka o hauhela?" 
Matthew18:34 Monga hae a halefa, a mo neela bahlokofatsi ho fihlela a ka lefa molato kaofela." 
Matthew18:35 “Le Ntate ya mahodimong o tla le etsa jwalo, ha le sa tshwarelane bohle ka pelo tsa lona tsohle.”" 
Matthew19:1 Yare hoba Jesu a qete dipolelo tsena, a tloha Galelea, a fihla naheng ya Judea, mose ho Jorodane." 
Matthew19:1 Yare hoba Jesu a qete dipolelo tsena, a tloha Galelea, a fihla naheng ya Judea, mose ho Jorodane." 
Matthew19:2 Matshweletshwele a mo latela, mme a a fodisetsa teng." 
Matthew19:3 Bafarisi ba tla ho yena, ba mmotsa potso ho mo leka, ba re: “Na ho a dumelleha hore motho a hlale mosadi wa hae ka lebaka lefe kapa lefe?”"
