Acts4:14 Ha ba bona monna ya fodisitsweng a eme le bona, ba hloka seo ba ka se hanyetsang." 
Acts4:15 Ha ba se ba ba laetse ho tswela kantle ho lekgotla, ba buisana," 
Acts4:16 ba re: “Banna baa re tla ba etsa jwang? Baahi bohle ba Jerusalema ba tseba hore mohlolo o tumileng o entswe ke bona, mme re ke ke ra o latola." 
Acts4:17 Empa hore taba ena e tle se ke ya hasana haholo hara setjhaba, a re ba hlokomediseng ka ditshokelo, hore ba se hlole ba bua le motho le ya mong ka lebitso lena.”" 
Acts4:18 Yaba ba a ba bitsa, mme ba ba laela hore ho hang ba se hlole ba bua kapa ba ruta ka lebitso la Jesu." 
Acts4:19 Empa Petrose le Johanne ba ba araba, ba re: “Ahlolang e le lona hore na ho nepahetse mahlong a Modimo ho mamela lona, ho ena le ho mamela Modimo." 
Acts4:20 Rona ha re ka ke ra phetsa ho bua ka tseo re di boneng le tseo re di utlwileng.” 
Acts4:21 Yare hoba ba eketse ho ba hlokomedisa ka ditshokelo, ba ba lokolla. Ka baka la setjhaba ba hloka seo ba ka ba ahlolelang sona, hobane setjhaba sohle se ne se tlotlisa Modimo ka se etsahetseng." 
Acts4:22 Dilemo tsa monna eo mohlolo ona wa phodiso o neng o entswe ho yena, di ne di feta mashome a mane." 
Acts4:23 Ha Petrose le Johanne ba se ba lokolotswe, ba ya ho ba sehlopha sa bona, ba se tsebisa tsohle tseo baprista ba baholo, le baholo ba setjhaba ba di buileng ho bona." 
Acts4:24 Yare hoba ba utlwe, ba phahamisetsa mantswe ho Modimo ka maikutlo a le mang, ba re: “Monghadi, wena ya entseng lehodimo, le lefatshe, le lewatle, le dintho tsohle tse ho tsona;" 
Acts4:25 o ne o bue ka Moya o Halalelang, ka molomo wa mohlanka wa hao Davida, ntata rona, wa re: “ Moferefere ke wa eng hara ditjhaba? Matjhaba a rerelang ntho tsa mafeela?" 
Acts4:26 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe di eme ka maoto, le babusi ba kopane hammoho ho lwantsha Morena le Motlotsuwa wa hae." 
Acts4:27 “Ruri, motseng ona, Heroda le Pontiuse Pilato, le baditjhaba, le merabe ya Iseraele, ba kopane ho lwantsha Jesu, mohlanka wa hao ya halalelang, eo o mo tlotsitseng," 
Acts4:28 ho etsa hore tsohle tseo o di laotseng e sa le pele, ka matla a hao le thato ya hao, di phethahale." 
Acts4:29 Jwale, Morena, ako tadime ditshokelo tsa bona, mme o etse hore bahlanka ba hao ba bolele lentswe la hao ka sebete." 
Acts4:30 Otlolla letsoho la hao ho fodisa, mme mehlolo le dimakatso di etswe ka lebitso la Jesu, mohlanka wa hao ya halalelang.”" 
Acts4:31 Ha ba qetile ho rapela, sebaka seo ba neng ba kopanetse ho sona sa reketla, mme bohle ba tlala Moya o Halalelang, ba bolela lentswe la Modimo ka sebete." 
Acts4:32 Jwale bongata ba ba dumetseng ba eba pelonngwe le moyamong, mme ha se ke ha eba le ya mong ya reng tseo a nang le tsona ke tsa hae a le inotshi, empa tsohle ba di kopanela." 
Acts4:33 Baapostola ba paka tsa tsoho ya Morena Jesu ka matla a maholo, mme bohle ba thahasellwa haholo." 
Acts4:34 Ha se ke ha eba le ya hlokang, hobane bohle ba neng ba ena le masimo kapa matlo ba ne ba a rekisa, ba tlise tjhelete ya tse rekisitsweng," 
Acts4:35 ba e bee maotong a baapostola, ebe e abelwa e mong le e mong ho ya kamoo a hlokang kateng." 
Acts4:36 Josefa, eo baapostola ba neng ba mmitsa Baranabase, e leng ho re Tshediso, Molevi ya tswaletsweng Sipera," 
Acts4:37 o ne a ena le tshimo; a e rekisa, a tlisa tjhelete, a e bea maotong a baapostola." 
Acts5:1 Monna e mong ya bitswang Ananiase, le mosadi wa hae Safira, ba rekisa tshimo." 
Acts5:2 Ka tumellano le mosadi wa hae a itshiela karolo ya tjhelete ya thekiso, mme a isa e nngwe, a e bea maotong a baapostola." 
Acts5:3 Yaba Petrose o re: “Ananiase, ke ka baka lang Satane a keneng pelong ya hao hore o thetse Moya o Halalelang, mme o itshiele karolo ya tjhelete ya thekiso ya tshimo?" 
Acts5:4 Ha e eso rekiswe, na e ne e se ya hao na? Ha e se e rekisitswe, na tjhelete e ne e se matleng a hao na? Ke ka baka lang o ileng wa rera ka pelong ya hao ho etsa ketso ee? Ha o a thetsa batho, empa o thetsitse Modimo.”" 
Acts5:5 Yare ha Ananiase a utlwa mantswe ana, a re fatshe sihla! yaba o a shwa. Bohle ba utlwileng ba tlelwa ke tshabo." 
Acts5:6 Bahlankana ba ema, ba mo phutha, ba mo nkela kantle, ba mo epela." 
Acts5:7 Ha feta dihora tse ka bang tharo, mosadi wa hae a kena, a sa tsebe se etsahetseng." 
Acts5:8 Petrose a re ho yena: “Ako mpolelle, na le fela le rekisitse tshimo hakaalo?” Yena a re: “E, hakaalo.”" 
Acts5:9 Petrose a re ho yena: “Ke ka baka lang le dumellaneng ho leka Moya wa Morena? Utlwa diqi tsa ba tswa epela monna wa hao di monyako, le wena ba tla o nkela kantle.”" 
Acts5:10 Hanghang mosadi a wela maotong a hae, a shwa. Bahlankana ha ba kena ba fumana a shwele; ba mo nkela kantle, ba ya mo epela pela monna wa hae." 
Acts5:11 Kereke yohle le bohle ba utlwileng tsena ba tshoha haholo. 
Acts5:12 Ka matsoho a baapostola ha etswa mehlolo le dimakatso tse ngata hara setjhaba. Badumedi bohle ba phuthehela lethuleng la Solomone ba le maikutlo a le mang. 
Acts5:13 Empa ha e le ho ba bang, ho ne ho se le ya mong ya betang pelo ho ikopanya le bona, leha setjhaba se ne se ba rorisa." 
Acts5:14 Leha ho le jwalo, ba dumelang ho Morena ba nna ba eketseha, e le palo e kgolo ya banna le basadi." 
Acts5:15 Batho ba ne ba tlisa bakudi ditseleng, ba ba beile dibetheng, le diphateng, e le hore ha Petrose a feta, seriti sa hae bonyane se mpe se sire ba bang ba bona." 
Acts5:16 Le bongata bo tswang metseng e kathoko ho Jerusalema ba kgobokana, ba tlisa bakudi le ba tshwenngwang ke meya e ditshila, mme bohle ba fodiswa." 
Acts5:17 Moprista e Moholo le ba nang le yena, ba mokga wa Basaduke, ba ema lepaketla, ba tlala mohono," 
Acts5:18 ba tshwara baapostola, ba ba hlahlela tjhankaneng ya setjhaba." 
Acts5:19 Empa bosiu lengeloi la Morena la bula menyako ya tjhankana, la ba ntsha, la re:" 
Acts5:20 “Eyang, le eme ka Tempeleng, mme le bolelle setjhaba ditaba tsohle tsa bophelo bona.”" 
Acts5:21 Ha ba utlwile, ba kena ka Tempeleng e sa le hoseng, mme ba ruta. Ha Moprista e Moholo le ba nang le yena ba fihla, ba bitsa lekgotla le baholo bohle ba bana ba Iseraele, mme ha romelwa tjhankaneng hore ho yo latwa baapostola." 
Acts5:22 Empa bahlanka ha ba fihla, ba fumana ba le siyo ka tjhankaneng. Ha ba kgutlile ba bolela," 
Acts5:23 ba re: “Re fumane tjhankana e ntse e kwetswe ka thata, le balebedi ba eme menyako, empa ha re bula ra fumana ho se motho kahare.”" 
Acts5:24 Ha molaodi wa Tempele, le baprista ba baholo ba utlwa mantswe ana, ba ipotsa hore na ntho ena ya baapostola e tla fella kae." 
Acts5:25 Eaba e mong o fihla a re ho bona: “Helang! Banna bao le neng le ba kentse tjhankaneng, ba eme ka Tempeleng, ba ruta setjhaba.”" 
Acts5:26 Yaba molaodi o ya le bahlanka, mme ba ba tlisa, feela e se ka dikgoka, hobane ba ne ba tshaba setjhaba, esere sa ba tlepetsa ka majwe." 
Acts5:27 Ha ba ba tlisitse, ba ba emisa ka kgotla, mme Moprista e Moholo a ba botsa," 
Acts5:28 a re: “Re le laetse ka thata hore le se ke la ruta ka lebitso lena, empa bonang, le tlatsitse thuto ya lona Jerusalema, mme le batla ho re jarisa molato wa ho bolaya motho eo!”" 
Acts5:29 Yaba Petrose le baapostola ba a araba, ba re: “Eka kgona ho mamelwe Modimo ho ena le batho." 
Acts5:30 Modimo wa bo-ntata rona o tsositse Jesu bafung, eo le mmolaileng ka ho mo thakgisa sefapanong." 
Acts5:31 Monna enwa Modimo o mo phahamisitse ka letsoho la hae le letona hore e be Mmusi le Mopholosi, ya tla nea Iseraele pako le tshwarelo ya dibe." 
Acts5:32 Rona le Moya o Halalelang, oo Modimo a o neileng ba mo mamelang, re dipaki tsa ditaba tsena.”" 
Acts5:33 Ha lekgotla le utlwa, la hlabeha haholo, mme la rera ho ba bolaya." 
Acts5:34 Empa Mofarisi e mong ya bitswang Gamaleele, eo e neng e le moruti wa Molao, ya hlonetjhwang ke setjhaba sohle, a ema hara lekgotla, a laela hore banna bao ba ntshetswe kantle ho se hokae." 
Acts5:35 A nto re ho lekgotla: “Banna ba Iseraele, hlokomelang seo le hopotseng ho se etsa ho banna bana." 
Acts5:36 Pele ho matsatsi ana ho ile ha hlaha Theudase ya neng a re yena ke mangmang. Palo ya banna ba mo latelang e ne e ka ba makgolo a mane. A bolawa, mme bohle ba neng ba dumetse ho yena ba qhalana, ba fetoha lefeela." 
Acts5:37 Kamorao ho mona ha hlaha Judase, Mogalelea, mehleng ya ha ho ne ho balwa batho, mme a kgelosa batho, ba mo latela. Le yena monna eo a timela, mme bohle ba neng ba dumetse ho yena ba qhalana." 
Acts5:38 Jwale ke re ho lona: Kgaohanang le banna bana, le ba lese. Hobane haeba morero ona kapa mosebetsi ona ke wa batho, o tla senyeha," 
Acts5:39 empa haeba ke wa Modimo, ha le ka ke la ba fedisa, esere la fumanwa le le ba lwantshang Modimo.” Yaba ba a mo mamela." 
Acts5:40 Hoba ba bitse baapostola, ba ba shapa, ba ba laya hore ba se hlole ba bua ka lebitso la Jesu, ba nto ba lokolla." 
Acts5:41 Ha e le baapostola, ba tloha kgotla ba nyakaletse, hobane ba fumanwe ba lokelwa ke ho tlontlollwa ka baka la lebitso la Jesu." 
Acts5:42 Ka tsatsi le leng le le leng ha ba a ka ba phetsa ho ruta le ho kgothatsa ka Jesu Kreste, ka Tempeleng, le ka malapeng ka bonngwe." 
Acts6:1 Matsatsing ao, ha barutuwa ba ntse ba ngatafala, Bajuda ba buang Segerike ba ile ba ipelaetsa ka ba tswaletsweng Judea, ka hore bahlolohadi ba habo bona ba sekisetswa kabong ya dithuso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi." 
Acts6:1 Matsatsing ao, ha barutuwa ba ntse ba ngatafala, Bajuda ba buang Segerike ba ile ba ipelaetsa ka ba tswaletsweng Judea, ka hore bahlolohadi ba habo bona ba sekisetswa kabong ya dithuso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi." 
Acts6:2 Yaba ba leshome le metso e mmedi ba bitsa barutuwa bohle, ba re ho bona: “Ha se hantle ho tlohela lentswe la Modimo re ya fepa ditafoleng." 
Acts6:3 Ka baka leo, bana beso, kgethang banna ba supileng hara lona, ba botumo bo botle, ba tletseng Moya o Halalelang le bohlale, bao re tla ba nea mosebetsi ona," 
Acts6:4 empa ha e le rona re tla itahlela ka setotswana thapelong le tsebeletsong ya lentswe.” 
Acts6:5 Bohle ba amohela tlhahiso ena, mme ba kgetha Setefane, monna ya tletseng tumelo le Moya o Halalelang, le Filipi, le Porokore, le Nikanore, le Timone, le Paramenase, le Nikola, mosokolohi wa Antiokia." 
Acts6:6 Ba ba hlahisa kapele ho baapostola, mme ha ba se ba rapetse, ba ba bea matsoho." 
Acts6:7 Lentswe la Modimo la anafala, le palo ya barutuwa ya ngatafala haholo Jerusalema, le sehlophahadi sa baprista sa amohela tumelo." 
Acts6:8 Setefane, monna ya nang le dineo tse ngata le matla a maholo, a etsa dimakatso le mehlolo e meholo hara setjhaba." 
Acts6:9 Jwale ha hlaha ba bang ba ntlo ya thapelo e bitswang ya Balokollwa, e leng ba Sirene, le ba Alekesanderia, le ba tswang Silesia le Asia, ba phehisana kgang le Setefane." 
Acts6:10 Empa ba ne ba sitwa ho hlola bohlale le moya oo a neng a bua ka wona. 
Acts6:11 Yaba ba reka banna ba bang hore ba tle ba re: “Re mo utlwile a bua dipolelo tse nyefolang Moshe le Modimo.” 
Acts6:12 Ba fuduha setjhaba, le baholo, le Ditsebi tsa Molao, ba kgorohela Setefane, ba mo tshwara ba mo isa kgotla." 
Acts6:13 Ba hlahisa dipaki tsa bohata, tse reng: “Motho enwa ha a phetse ho bua dipolelo tse lwantshang Nqalo ena e halalelang le Molao." 
Acts6:14 Re mo utlwile a re: Jesu enwa wa Nasaretha o tla senya Nqalo ena, a fetole meetlo eo Moshe a re neileng yona! ”" 
Acts6:15 Bohle ba neng ba dutse ka kgotla, ba mo tjametse, ba bona sefahleho sa hae e ka sa lengeloi." 
Acts7:1 Yaba Moprista e Moholo o re: “Na ke tsona?” 
Acts7:2 Setefane a re: “Banna ba heso, le lona bo-ntate, mamelang! Modimo ya tlotlehang o ile a iponahatsa ho ntata rona Aborahama ha a sa le Mesopotamia, a eso ahe Kgarane;" 
Acts7:3 a re ho yena: Tloha naheng ya heno le ho bang ka wena, o ye naheng eo ke tla o supisa eona." 
Acts7:4 “Jwale a tloha naheng ya Bakalatiya a tla aha Kgarane. Hoba ntatae a shwe, Modimo a mo fallisetsa naheng ena eo le ahileng ho yona kajeno." 
Acts7:5 Teng ha a a ka a mo fa sebaka seo e leng sa hae, leha e le ho lekanang bohato ba leoto, empa a mo tshepisa hore o tla mo nea yona, e be leruo la hae le la ditloholo tsa hae kamora lefu la hae, le hoja a na se na ngwana." 
Acts7:6 Modimo a bua tjena, a re: Ditloholo tsa hao e tla ba bajaki naheng ya baditjhaba, mme di tla etswa makgoba, di sotlwe ka dilemo tse makgolo a mane." 
Acts7:7 Empa setjhaba se tla di etsa makgoba ke tla se ahlola, ha rialo Modimo, mme kamorao ho tsena di tla tloha, di tlo ntshebeletsa sebakeng sena." 
Acts7:8 Yaba Modimo o etsa selekane le yena, pontsho ya sona e le lebollo. Yare hoba Aborahama a tswale Isaka, a mmolotsa ka tsatsi la borobedi. Isaka a bolotsa Jakobo, mme Jakobo a bolotsa baholoholo ba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
Acts7:9 “Baholoholo ba honohela Josefa, ba mo rekisa Egepeta, empa Modimo o ne a ena le yena," 
Acts7:10 a mo namolela matshwenyehong wohle a hae. Modimo a mo nea leseho le bohlale pela Faro, kgosi ya Egepeta, mme Faro a mo kgetha ho ba mmusisi wa Egepeta le wa ntlo ya hae yohle." 
Acts7:11 “Jwale tlala ya wela Egepeta yohle le Kanana, matshwenyeho a eba maholo, mme bo-ntata rona ba hloka dijo." 
Acts7:12 Eitse ha Jakobo a utlwa hore dijo di teng Egepeta, a roma bo-ntata rona kgetlo la pele." 
Acts7:13 Ka kgetlo la bobedi Josefa a itsebisa bana babo, mme Faro a tseba leloko la Josefa." 
Acts7:14 Yaba Josefa o romela ho bitsa ntatae Jakobo le bang ka yena bohle, e le batho ba mashome a supileng a metso e mehlano." 
Acts7:15 Jakobo a theohela Egepeta, moo yena le bo-ntata rona ba hlokahaletseng teng." 
Acts7:16 Ditopo tsa bona tsa tliswa Shekeme, mme tsa epelwa lebitleng leo Aborahama a neng a le reke Shekeme ka silefera, ho bara ba Hemore." 
Acts7:17 “Yare ha nako ya tshepiso eo Modimo a e etseditseng Aborahama e atamela, setjhaba sa ata, sa ngatafala Egepeta," 
Acts7:18 ho fihlela ha ho busa kgosi e nngwe e neng e sa ka ya tseba Josefa. 
Acts7:19 Eo ya sebetsa leloko la rona ka mano, ya sotla bo-ntata rona, ya ba lahlisa masea a bona, hore a tle a se ke a phela." 
Acts7:20 “Ke ka nako ena Moshe a ileng a tswalwa, mme a kgahleha ho Modimo. A hodisetswa habo ka kgwedi tse tharo." 
Acts7:21 Ha a se a lahlilwe, moradi wa Faro a mo thola, a ikgodisetsa yena jwaloka hoja e le mora wa hae." 
Acts7:22 Moshe a rutwa bohlale bohle ba Baegepeta, mme a ba matla dipolelong le mesebetsing ya hae." 
Acts7:23 “Ha a ena le dilemo tse mashome a mane, pelong ya hae ha eba le takatso ya ho tjhakela bana babo, bana ba Iseraele." 
Acts7:24 Yare ha a bona e mong a etswa hampe, a mo thusetsa; a pheteletsa ya tlatlapuwang ka ho bolaya Moegepeta." 
Acts7:25 Jwale a hopola hore bana babo ba tla utlwisisa hore Modimo o tla ba pholosa ka letsoho la hae, empa ha ba a ka ba utlwisisa." 
Acts7:26 Ka letsatsi le hlahlamang, a fumana ba bang ba lwana, a leka ho ba boelanya hore ba etse kgotso, a re: Banna, le bana ba motho; le etsetsanang hampe?" 
Acts7:27 “Empa ya neng a etsa wa habo hampe a sutumeletsa Moshe thoko, a re: Ke mang ya o entseng mmusi le moahlodi hodima rona?" 
Acts7:28 O so rata ho mpolaya jwalokaha o bolaile Moegepeta maobane? 
Acts7:29 Moshe ha a utlwa polelo ena, a baleha ya eba mojaki naheng ya Midiane, moo a ileng a tswalla bara ba babedi teng." 
Acts7:30 “Ha ho fetile dilemo tse mashome a mane, lengeloi la iponahatsa ho yena lehwatateng la thaba ya Sinai, le le hara malakabe a sehlahla se meutlwa, se tukang." 
Acts7:31 Moshe ha a bona pono eo a e makalla. Ha a atamela ho shebisisa, lentswe la Morena la utlwahala, la re:" 
Acts7:32 Ke nna Modimo wa bo-ntatao, Modimo wa Aborahama, le wa Isaka, le wa Jakobo. Yaba Moshe o a thothomela, o hloka le sebete sa ho shebisisa." 
Acts7:33 “Morena a re ho yena: Rola meqathatso ya hao, hobane sebaka seo o emeng ho sona se a halalela." 
Acts7:34 Ruri ke bone tshotleho ya setjhaba sa ka se Egepeta, ke utlwile ho dumaela ha sona, mme ke theohetse lefatsheng ke hona ho tla se lopolla; jwale tloo, ke tla o roma Egepeta." 
Acts7:35 “Moshe enwa, eo ba neng ba mo latole, ba re: Ke mang ya o entseng mmusi le moahlodi? ke yena eo Modimo a mo romileng ka thuso ya lengeloi, le iponahaditseng sehlahleng, ho ba mmusi le molopolli." 
Acts7:36 Ke yena ya ba ntshitseng Egepeta, a etsa dimakatso le mehlolo naheng eo, le Lewatleng le Lefubedu, le lehwatateng, ka dilemo tse mashome a mane." 
Acts7:37 Ke yena Moshe enwa ya itseng ho bana ba Iseraele: Hara bana babo lona, Modimo o tla le hlahisetsa Moporofeta ya kang nna." 
Acts7:38 Ke yena ya ileng a ba teng phuthehong e lehwatateng, a ena le lengeloi le neng le bua le yena Thabeng ya Sinai, a ntse a ena le bo-ntata rona; ke yena ya amohetseng dipolelo tse phedisang ho le nea tsona." 
Acts7:39 “Empa bo-ntata rona ba ile ba hana ho mo mamela, ba mo sutumeletsa thoko, dipelo tsa bona tsa kgutlela Egepeta," 
Acts7:40 ba re ho Arone: Re etsetse medimo e tla re etella pele, hobane Moshe enwa, ya re ntshitseng naheng ya Egepeta, ha re tsebe se mo hlahetseng." 
Acts7:41 Matsatsing ao ba bopa namane, ba tlisetsa setshwantsho seo sehlabelo, ba thabela mesebetsi ya matsoho a bona." 
Acts7:42 Yaba Modimo o a ba furalla, o neelana ka bona ho sebeletsa lebotho la lehodimo, jwalokaha ho ngotswe bukeng ya baporofeta, ho thwe: “ Na lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, le nnyeheletse ka tse hlabilweng le ka dinyehelo ka dilemo tse mashome a mane lehwatateng?" 
Acts7:43 Le ile la jara tente ya Moloke, le naledi ya modimo o bitswang Refane, e leng ditshwantsho tseo le di etseditseng ho di kgumamela. Kahoo ke tla le fallisetsa ka nqane ho Babilona." 
Acts7:44 “Bo-ntata rona ba ne ba ena le Tente e pakang boteng ba Modimo lehwatateng, kamoo ho laetseng ya neng a bua le Moshe kateng, hore a e etse jwaloka setshwantsho seo a ileng a se bona." 
Acts7:45 Bo-ntata rona ba e amohela. Tlasa tsamaiso ya Joshua, ba tla le yona naheng ya baditjhaba, bao Modimo a ileng a ba leleka pela bo-ntata rona, ho fihlela mehleng ya Davida." 
Acts7:46 Davida a ratwa ke Modimo, mme a kopa ho fumanela Modimo wa Jakobo ntlo." 
Acts7:47 Empa ke Solomone ya ileng a mo hahela ntlo eo. 
Acts7:48 “Feela Ya Hodimodimo ha a dule matlung a hahilweng ka matsoho, jwalokaha moporofeta a re:" 
Acts7:49 “ Lehodimo ke terone ya ka, lefatshe ke bonamelo ba maoto a ka; lona le tla nkgahela ntlo e jwang, ho rialo Morena, kapa sebaka ke sefe seo nka phomolang ho sona?" 
Acts7:50 Na tsee tsohle ha di a etswa ke letsoho la ka na? 
Acts7:51 “Lona ba manganga, ba pelo di thata, le tsebe tse sa mameleng jwaloka tsa bahedene, kamehla le lona le hlola le hanyetsa Moya o Halalelang, jwaloka bo-ntata lona!" 
Acts7:52 Ke ofe wa baporofeta ya sa kang a hloriswa ke bo-ntata lona? Ba bolaile ba neng ba bolele pele ho tla ha Ya Lokileng, eo le lona le bileng baeki le babolai ba hae;" 
Acts7:53 lona ba amohetseng Molao oo le o neeleditsweng ke mangeloi, empa la se ke la o boloka.”" 
Acts7:54 Yare ha ba utlwa tsena, dipelo tsa bona tsa hlabeha, mme ba mo tsikitlanyetsa meno." 
Acts7:55 Empa kaha a ne a tletse Moya o Halalelang, a tadima lehodimong, a bona kganya ya Modimo, le Jesu a eme ka letsohong le letona la Modimo," 
Acts7:56 mme a re: “Bonang! Ke bona mahodimo a butswe, le Mora Motho a eme ka letsohong le letona la Modimo.”" 
Acts7:57 Jwale ba howa ka mantswe a phahameng, ba ithiba ditsebe, ba mo rutlolohela hong." 
Acts7:58 Ba mo kgarameletsa kantle ho motse, ba mo tlepetsa ka majwe. Dipaki tsa bea diaparo tsa tsona maotong a mohlankana ya bitswang Saule." 
Acts7:59 Ba tlepetsa Setefane ka majwe, a ntse a rapela, a re: “Morena Jesu, amohela moya wa ka!”" 
Acts7:60 Yaba o a kgumama, o howa ka lentswe le phahameng, o re: “Morena, o se ke wa ba balla sebe sena.” Hoba a rialo, a ithoballa." 
Acts8:1 Saule o ne a dumellana le polao ya Setefane. Ka tsatsi lona leo tlhoriso e kgolo ya hlahela kereke e Jerusalema, mme bohle, haese baapostola feela, ba qhalanela dinaheng tsa Judea le Samaria." 
Acts8:1 Saule o ne a dumellana le polao ya Setefane. Ka tsatsi lona leo tlhoriso e kgolo ya hlahela kereke e Jerusalema, mme bohle, haese baapostola feela, ba qhalanela dinaheng tsa Judea le Samaria." 
Acts8:2 Banna ba tshabang Modimo ba epela setopo sa Setefane, mme ba mo llela haholo." 
Acts8:3 Empa Saule yena a ripitla kereke, a kena ka tlung e nngwe le e nngwe, a hulanya banna le basadi, a ba hlahlela tjhankaneng." 
Acts8:4 Ha e le ba qhalantsweng, ba ya kahohle ba ntse ba bolela molaetsa o molemo wa lentswe la Modimo." 
Acts8:5 Filipi a theohela motseng wa Samaria, a phatlalletsa batho ba teng tsa Kreste." 
Acts8:6 Ka moya o le mong matshwele a ela hloko tse neng di bolelwa ke Filipi; a mo mamela, mme a bona mehlolo eo a e etsang." 
Acts8:7 Ba bangata ba ne ba ena le meya e ditshila; ya tswa ho bona e bokolla haholo. Le ba bangata ba ba shweleng ditho le ba diritsa ba fodiswa. 
Acts8:8 Thabo e kgolo ya eba teng motseng oo. 
Acts8:9 Monna e mong ya bitswang Simone, ya neng a se a ntse a le motseng oo e le senohe, a makatsa batho ba Samaria, a ipolela hore yena ke mangmang." 
Acts8:10 Bohle ba ne ba mo mamela ka hloko, ho tloha ho e monyenyane ho isa ho e moholo, ba re: “Enwa ke Matla a Modimo a bitswang a maholo.”" 
Acts8:11 Ba ne ba mo mamela ka hloko kahobane e ne e se e le kgale a ba makatsa ka bonohe ba hae. 
Acts8:12 Empa ha Filipi a se a ba bolelletse molaetsa o molemo wa tsa Mmuso wa Modimo le tsa lebitso la Jesu Kreste, ba dumela, mme ha kolobetswa banna le basadi." 
Acts8:13 Simone le yena a dumela. Hoba a kolobetswe, a kgomarela Filipi, a bona mehlolo le diketso tse kgolo, tse matla, tse etsahalang, mme a hlollwa." 
Acts8:14 Yare ha baapostola ba leng Jerusalema ba utlwa hore Samaria e amohetse lentswe la Modimo, ba roma Petrose le Johanne teng." 
Acts8:15 Bona ha ba fihla, ba rapella Basamaria hore ba amohele Moya o Halalelang," 
Acts8:16 hobane o ne o eso ka o theohela le ho ya mong wa bona, ba mpa ba kolobeditswe feela ka lebitso la Morena Jesu." 
Acts8:17 Yaba Petrose le Johanne ba ba bea matsoho, mme ba amohela Moya o Halalelang." 
Acts8:18 Ha Simone a bona hore Moya o Halalelang o newa ka peo ya matsoho a baapostola, a ba tlisetsa tjhelete," 
Acts8:19 a re: “Le nna mpheng matla ana, hore mang le mang eo ke mmeang matsoho a tle a amohele Moya o Halalelang.”" 
Acts8:20 Empa Petrose a re ho yena: “Tsamo shwela kwana le tjhelete ya hao! O lekanya hore mpho ya Modimo e rekwa ka tjhelete! 
Acts8:21 Ha o na kabelo leha e le seabo tabeng ena, hobane pelo ya hao ha e a loka mahlong a Modimo." 
Acts8:22 Ka baka leo, bakela bokgopo bona ba hao, mme o rapele Morena hore mohlomong o tle o tshwarelwe mohopolo wa pelo ya hao;" 
Acts8:23 etswe ke bona hore o na le takatso e mpe, mme o ditlamong tsa bokgopo.”" 
Acts8:24 Simone a araba, a re: “Lona a le ke le nthapelle ho Morena, hore ke se ke ka hlahelwa ke letho la tseo le di boletseng.”" 
Acts8:25 Hoba ba pake, mme ba bolele lentswe la Morena, ba kgutlela Jerusalema, ba ntse ba phatlalatsa molaetsa o molemo metseng e mengata ya Basamaria." 
Acts8:26 Lengeloi la Morena la bua ho Filipi, la re: “Tsamaya o ye nqa borwa, tseleng e theohang Jerusalema e yang Gasa, e bodutu.”" 
Acts8:27 A ema, a tsamaya. Ho ne ho ena le monna wa Mokushe wa lehaole, e le letona la Kandake, mofumahadi wa Bakushe, le modisa wa matlotlo a hae wohle. O ne a tlile Jerusalema ho tla kgumamela Modimo." 
Acts8:28 Jwale o ne a boela hae, a palame kariki ya hae, a bala bukeng ya moporofeta Esaya." 
Acts8:29 Yaba Moya o Halalelang o re ho Filipi: “Eya, o tsamaye le kariki eno.”" 
Acts8:30 Filipi a mathela ho yona, a mo utlwa a bala bukeng ya moporofeta Esaya. A re ho yena: “Na o utlwisisa seo o se balang?”" 
Acts8:31 Yena a re: “Nka utlwisisa jwang ho se motho ya ntlhalosetsang?” Yaba o kopa Filipi hore a hlwe, mme a dule le yena." 
Acts8:32 Temana ya Mangolo eo a neng a e bala e ne e le ena: “O ila iswa moo a ilo hlabelwa teng, mme jwaloka konyana e kgutsitseng, e kgutsitseng pela mokuti wa yona, le yena ha ho letho leo a ila le bua." 
Acts8:33 A kokobetswa, a hlokelwa toka. Ke mang ya tla bolela leloko la hae, ha e le moo bophelo ba hae bo fedisitswe lefatsheng?”" 
Acts8:34 Yaba lehaole le re ho Filipi: “Ke a o botsa hle, moporofeta o bolela see ka mang? Na o bua ka yena, kapa ka e mong osele?”" 
Acts8:35 Jwale Filipi a bua, a qala ka temana ena, a mmolella molaetsa o molemo wa Jesu." 
Acts8:36 Ha ba ntse ba tsamaya tseleng, ba fihla moo metsi a leng teng, mme lehaole la re: “Metsi ke ana! Nka thibelwa keng hore ke kolobetswe?”" 
Acts8:37 Filipi a re: “Haeba o dumela ka pelo ya hao yohle, hoo ho ka etswa.” La araba, la re: “Ke a dumela hore Jesu Kreste ke Mora wa Modimo.”" 
Acts8:38 La laela hore kariki e emiswe. Filipi le lehaole ba theohela metsing hammoho, mme Filipi a le kolobetsa." 
Acts8:39 Hoba ba nyolohe metsing Moya wa Morena wa nka Filipi, mme lehaole ha le a ka la hlola le mmona; la tswela pele leetong la lona le nyakaletse." 
Acts8:40 Empa Filipi a iphumana a se a le Ashedode, a ntse a bolela molaetsa o molemo metseng yohle eo a fetang ho yona, ho fihlela a kena Sesaria." 
Acts9:1 Saule, a sa ntse a pipitlellane ke moya wa ho sokela le wa ho bolaya barutuwa ba Morena, a ya ho Moprista e Moholo." 
Acts9:2 A kopa mangolo a yang Damaseka, matlung a thapelo, e le hore ha a ka fumana bao e leng ba Tsela ena ya Bokreste, leha e le banna kapa basadi, a ba tlame, a ba tlise Jerusalema." 
Acts9:3 Ha a ntse a tsamaya, a se a le haufi le Damaseka, hanghang ha phatsima lesedi le tswang lehodimong, la mo teela hare." 
Acts9:4 A wela fatshe, a utlwa lentswe le reng ho yena: “Saule! Saule! O ntlhorisetsang na?”" 
Acts9:5 A botsa, a re: “O mang, Morena?” Lentswe la re: “Ke nna Jesu, eo o mo hlorisang," 
Acts9:6 empa tsoha, o kene motseng, mme teng o tla bolellwa seo o lokelang ho se etsa.”" 
Acts9:7 Jwale banna ba tsamayang le yena ba ema tlekelele! kaha ba ne ba fela ba utlwile lentswe, empa ba sa bone motho." 
Acts9:8 Saule a tsoha fatshe, mme ha a tutuboloha, o ne a se a sa bone. Ba mo tataisa ka letsoho, ba mo isa Damaseka." 
Acts9:9 A qeta matsatsi a mararo a sa bone, a sa je, a sa nwe." 
Acts9:10 Ho ne ho ena le morutuwa e mong Damaseka, ya bitswang Ananiase; Morena a mmolella ka pono, a re: “Ananiase!” Yena a re: “Ke nna enwa, Morena!”" 
Acts9:11 Morena a re ho yena: “Ema, o ye seterateng se bitswang Se Otlolohileng, mme ka tlung ya Juda o batle monna ya bitswang Saule wa Tarasuse. Bona, o a rapela," 
Acts9:12 mme ponong o bone monna ya bitswang Ananiase a kena, a mmea matsoho hore a tle a boele a bone.”" 
Acts9:13 Ananiase a araba, a re: “Morena, ke utlwile ka ba bangata kamoo monna eo a entseng tse ngata, tse mpe, ho badumedi ba hao ba Jerusalema," 
Acts9:14 mme le mona o filwe matla ke baprista ba baholo, ho tlama bohle ba o rapelang.”" 
Acts9:15 Empa Morena a re ho yena: “Eya, hobane monna eo ke mohlanka eo ke mo kgethileng ho tsebisa baditjhaba, le dikgosi, le bana ba Iseraele lebitso la ka." 
Acts9:16 Nna ke tla mmontsha tsohle, tseo eka kgonang a di hlokofaletswe ka baka la lebitso la ka.”" 
Acts9:17 Ananiase a ya, a kena ka tlung eo, a mmea matsoho, a re: “Saule ngwaneso, Morena, e leng Jesu ya ileng a iponahatsa ho wena tseleng eo o neng o etla ka yona, o nthomile hore o tle o boele o bone, o be o tlale Moya o Halalelang.”" 
Acts9:18 Hanghang mahlong a hae ha wa ho kang makgekgebu, mme a boela a bona. A ema, a kolobetswa." 
Acts9:19 Yare hoba a je, a boela a matlafala. Saule a hlola nakwana le barutuwa ba leng Damaseka," 
Acts9:20 mme kapelepele a phatlalatsa matlung a thapelo hore Jesu ke Mora wa Modimo. 
Acts9:21 Bohle ba mo utlwang ba makala, ba re: “Na eo hase yena ya ileng a fedisa bohle ba rapelang Jesu, Jerusalema, ya bileng a tlileng moo ka hona hoo, hore a ba tlame, a ba ise ho baprista ba baholo na?”" 
Acts9:22 Empa Saule yena a eketsa ho ipha matla le ho ferekanya Bajuda ba ahileng Damaseka, ka ho ba bontsha hore Jesu ke yena Mesia." 
Acts9:23 Ha ho fetile matsatsi a mangata, Bajuda ba rera ho bolaya Saule," 
Acts9:24 empa morero oo wa bona a o tseba. Bosiu le motsheare ba lebela dikgoro tsa motse, hore ba tle ba mmolaye," 
Acts9:25 empa bosiu barutuwa ba hae ba mo nka, ba mo nka, ba mo ntsha le lerakong la motse ka ho mo lepeletsa a le ka sesiung." 
Acts9:26 Yare hoba Saule a fihle Jerusalema, a leka ho ikopanya le barutuwa, empa bohle ba ne ba mo tshaba, ba sa dumele hore ke morutuwa." 
Acts9:27 Baranabase a mo nka, a mo isa ho baapostola, mme a ba hlalosetsa kamoo Saule a ileng a bona Morena kateng tseleng, le hore o ile a bua le yena, le kamoo a ileng a bua kateng phatlalatsa Damaseka ka lebitso la Morena." 
Acts9:28 Jwale a tsamaya a ena le bona Jerusalema yohle, a bua phatlalatsa ka lebitso la Morena." 
Acts9:29 O ne a bua, a phehisana kgang le Bajuda ba buang Segerike, mme ba leka ho mmolaya." 
Acts9:30 Ha badumedi ba tsebile, ba mo theolela Sesaria, ba mo romela Tarasuse." 
Acts9:31 Kereke ya eba le kgotso Judea yohle, le Galelea, le Samaria; ya bopeha, ya phela ka ho tshaba Morena, mme ya anafala ka kgothatso ya Moya o Halalelang." 
Acts9:31 Kereke ya eba le kgotso Judea yohle, le Galelea, le Samaria; ya bopeha, ya phela ka ho tshaba Morena, mme ya anafala ka kgothatso ya Moya o Halalelang." 
Acts9:32 Petrose o ne a tsamaya hohle, mme ka mohlomong a theoha ho ya bona le badumedi ba ahileng Lida." 
Acts9:33 Teng a fumana monna e mong ya bitswang Enea, ya neng a qetile dilemo tse robedi a robetse diphateng, a shwele ditho." 
Acts9:34 Petrose a re ho yena: “Enea, Jesu Kreste o a o fodisa; tsoha o alole diphate tsa hao.” A tsoha hanghang." 
Acts9:35 Baahi bohle ba Lida le Sarone ba mmona, mme ba sokolohela ho Morena." 
Acts9:36 Motseng wa Jopo ho ne ho ena le morutuwa ya bitswang Tabitha, e leng ho re Dorokase. Mosadi enwa o ne a etsa mesebetsi e mengata, e molemo, a etsetsa le mafutsana dithuso tse ngata." 
Acts9:37 Matsatsing wona ao a kula, mme a shwa. Hoba a hlatsuwe, a bewa kamoreng e kahodimo." 
Acts9:38 Kaha Lida e le haufi le Jopo, barutuwa ha ba utlwa hore Petrose o Lida, ba roma banna ba babedi ho yena, ba mo rapela, ba re: “O se ke wa dieha ho tla ho rona.”" 
Acts9:39 Petrose a ema, a ya le bona. Ha a fihla, ba mo isa kamoreng e kahodimo, mme bahlolohadi bohle ba mo teela hare ba ntse ba lla, ba mmontsha mefuta ya diaparo eo Dorokase a neng a di etse ha a sa ntse a phela." 
Acts9:40 Hoba Petrose a ntshetse bohle kantle, a kgumama, a rapela; a ntano retelehela setopong, a re: “Tabitha, tsoha!” Tabitha a tutuboloha, mme ha a bona Petrose, a dula." 
Acts9:41 Petrose a mo tshwara ka letsoho, a mo emisa; yare hoba a bitse badumedi le bahlolohadi, a mo hlahisa ho bona a phela." 
Acts9:42 Taba ena ya tsejwa hohle Jopo, mme ba bangata ba dumela ho Morena." 
Acts9:43 Petrose a hlola Jopo matsatsi a mangata, ha motho e mong ya bitswang Simone, sesuhi sa matlalo." 
Acts10:1 Monna e mong o ne a le teng Sesaria, ya bitswang Kornele, e le molaodi wa ba lekgolo lebothong le bitswang la Italia." 
Acts10:2 E ne e le morapedi ya tshabang Modimo, yena le lelapa la hae lohle, a etsetsa setjhaba sa Bajuda dithuso tse ngata, a rapela Modimo kamehla." 
Acts10:3 Ha e batla e eba hora ya boraro motsheare wa mantsiboya, a bona ponong, ka mokgwa o hlakileng, lengeloi la Modimo le kena ka ho yena, le re: “Kornele!”" 
Acts10:4 A le tadima, a tshoha, mme a re: “Keng, Morena?” La re ho yena: “Dithapelo le dithuso tsa hao ho mafutsana di amohelehile ho Modimo, mme o o hopotse." 
Acts10:5 Jwale romela banna Jopo, o bitse Simone ya bitswang Petrose;" 
Acts10:6 ke moeti wa motho e mong, ya bitswang Simone, sesuhi sa matlalo, ya nang le ntlo pela lewatle.”" 
Acts10:7 Yare hoba lengeloi le buang le yena le tlohe, a bitsa bahlanka ba hae ba babedi le mohlabani e mong wa ba mo lebelang, ya hlomphang Modimo," 
Acts10:8 a ba hlalosetsa tsohle tse etsahetseng, a nto ba roma Jopo." 
Acts10:9 Ka la hosasane, ha bao ba ntse ba le tseleng, mme ba se ba atametse motse, Petrose a hlwella kahodima ntlo ho ya rapela; e ne e ka ba hara mpa ya motsheare." 
Acts10:10 A lapa, a lakatsa ho ja. Yare ha ho ntse ho lokiswa dijo, a ba le pono." 
Acts10:11 A bona lehodimo le bulehile, mme ho theoha ntho e nngwe e kang lesela le leholo, le lepelletswang fatshe le tshwerwe ka diqola tse nne." 
Acts10:12 Ka ho lona ho ne ho ena le diphoofolo tsohle tse maotomane, dihahabi tsa lefatshe le dinonyana tse fofang." 
Acts10:13 Lentswe la re ho yena: “Petrose, ema, o hlabe, o je!”" 
Acts10:14 Empa Petrose a re: “Tjhe, le kgale, Morena! Ha ke eso ka ke eja letho le ilehang, le sa hlwekang.”" 
Acts10:15 Lentswe la bua le yena kgetlo la bobedi, la re: “Tseo Modimo a di hlwekisitseng, wena o se ke wa re di a ileha.”" 
Acts10:16 Hona ha etsahala ka makgetlo a mararo, mme hanghang ntho eo ya nkelwa hape lehodimong." 
Acts10:17 Yare ha Petrose a ntse a ipotsa hore na pono eo a e boneng e bolelang, banna ba romilweng ke Kornele, hoba ba batle, ba botse hore na ha Simone ke kae, ba fihla monyako." 
Acts10:18 Ba howeletsa, ba botsa hore na ho na le moeti ya bitswang Simone Petrose moo." 
Acts10:19 Ha Petrose a ntse a nahana ka pono eo, Moya wa re ho yena: “Bona, banna ba babedi ba a o batla." 
Acts10:20 Ema he, o theohe, o ye le bona o sa qeaqee, hobane ba romilwe ke nna.”" 
Acts10:21 Petrose a theohela ho banna bao, a re: “Ke nna eo le mmatlang! Lebaka leo le tlileng ka lona ke lefe?”" 
Acts10:22 Ba re: “Molaodi wa lebotho la ba lekgolo, Kornele, monna ya lokileng, ya tshabang Modimo, ya pakwang ke setjhaba sohle sa Bajuda, o lemositswe ke lengeloi le halalelang, hore a o bitsetse ha hae, a tle a utlwe seo o tla mmolella sona.”" 
Acts10:23 Yare hoba a re ba kene, a ba amohela. Ka la hosasane a itokisa, a ya le bona, mme badumedi ba bang ba Jopo ba mo felehetsa." 
Acts10:24 Ka le hlahlamang a kena Sesaria. Kornele o ne a ba lebeletse, a bitsitse bang ka yena le metswalle ya hae ya hlooho ya kgomo." 
Acts10:25 Yare ha Petrose a fihla, Kornele a mo kgahlanyetsa, a itihela maotong a hae, a kgumama." 
Acts10:26 Empa Petrose a mo emisa, a re: “Ema; le nna ke motho.”" 
Acts10:27 Petrose a kena ha Kornele a ntse a buisana le yena, mme a fumana ho phuthehile batho ba bangata." 
Acts10:28 A re ho bona: “Ha ke re le tseba kamoo ho sa dumellehang kateng hore monna wa Mojuda a tlwaelane le moditjhaba, kapa a mo tjhakele? Empa nna Modimo o mpontshitse hore ha ho motho ya ilehang kapa ya sa hlwekang." 
Acts10:29 Ka baka leo, ke tlile ke se na pelaelo ha ke bitswa. Ha ho le jwalo, ke botsa hore na le mpitseditseng?”" 
Acts10:30 Kornele a re: “Maobeng, ha ke ne ke ntse ke rapela ka tlung ya ka, ka nako e ka bang yona ena, e leng hora ya boraro motsheare wa mantsiboya, monna ya apereng seaparo se hadimang, a ema kapele ho nna." 
Acts10:31 Eaba o re: Kornele, thapelo ya hao e utlwilwe, mme dithuso tsa hao ho mafutsana di hopotswe ke Modimo." 
Acts10:32 Ka baka leo, romela Jopo, o bitse Simone ya bitswang Petrose: ke moeti ha Simone, sesuhi sa matlalo, ya ahileng pela lewatle." 
Acts10:33 Ka hona ke ile ka romela ho wena ka potlako, mme o entse hantle ha o tlile. Jwale rona bohle re teng mona pela Modimo, ho utlwa tseo o di laetsweng ke Morena.”" 
Acts10:34 Petrose a bua, a re: “Kannete ke a hlokomela hore Modimo ha a ye ka tshobotsi," 
Acts10:35 empa, ditjhabeng tsohle, ya mo tshabang, ya etsang toka, o a amoheleha ho yena." 
Acts10:36 O ile a romela lentswe la hae ho bana ba Iseraele ka ho bolela molaetsa o molemo wa kgotso ka Jesu Kreste, eo e leng Morena wa bohle." 
Acts10:37 Le tseba se etsahetseng Judea yohle, ho qala Galelea, kamora kolobetso e ileng ya phatlalatswa ke Johanne;" 
Acts10:37 Le tseba se etsahetseng Judea yohle, ho qala Galelea, kamora kolobetso e ileng ya phatlalatswa ke Johanne;" 
Acts10:38 kamoo Modimo a neng a tlotse Jesu wa Nasaretha kateng, ka Moya o Halalelang le ka matla. Jesu a tsamaya hohle a ntse a etsa tse molemo, a fodisa ba neng ba hateletswe ke Diabolosi, hobane Modimo o ne a ena le yena." 
Acts10:39 “Re dipaki tsa dintho tsohle tseo a ileng a di etsa naheng ya Bajuda le Jerusalema; yena eo ba mmolaileng ka ho mo thakgisa sefapanong. 
Acts10:40 Empa Modimo o ile a mo tsosa bafung ka letsatsi la boraro, mme a etsa hore a iponahatse," 
Acts10:41 e seng ho batho bohle, empa ho dipaki tse kgethilweng ke Modimo e sa le pele, e leng rona ba ileng ba eja, ba enwa le yena kamora ho tsoha ha hae bafung." 
Acts10:42 O ile a re laela ho phatlalletsa setjhaba le ho paka hore ke ya beilweng ke Modimo ho ba moahlodi wa ba phelang le ba shweleng. 
Acts10:43 Baporofeta bohle ba a mo paka, ba re e mong le e mong ya dumelang ho yena o tla amohela tshwarelo ya dibe ka lebitso la hae.”" 
Acts10:44 Yare Petrose a sa ntse a bua mantswe ana, Moya o Halalelang wa theohela hodima bohle ba mametseng lentswe." 
Acts10:45 Badumedi bohle ba bolotseng, e leng Bajuda, ba feleheditseng Petrose, ba hlollwa ha mpho ya Moya o Halalelang e theolelwa le ho baditjhaba," 
Acts10:46 hobane ba ne ba utlwa ba bua dipuopuo, ba tlotlisa Modimo. Jwale Petrose a re:" 
Acts10:47 “Na ho ka ba teng ya ka thibelang hore batho baa, ba amohetseng Moya o Halalelang jwaloka rona, ba kolobetswe ka metsi na?”" 
Acts10:48 A laela hore ba kolobetswe ka lebitso la Jesu Kreste. Yaba ba mo kopa hore a hlole le bona matsatsi a se makae. 
Acts11:1 Baapostola le badumedi ba neng ba le Judea ba utlwa hore le baditjhaba ba amohetse lentswe la Modimo. 
Acts11:1 Baapostola le badumedi ba neng ba le Judea ba utlwa hore le baditjhaba ba amohetse lentswe la Modimo. 
Acts11:2 Yare ha Petrose a nyolohetse Jerusalema, ba bolotseng, e leng Bajuda, ba mo tsekisa," 
Acts11:3 ba re: “O kene ha banna ba maqai, wa ja le bona!”" 
Acts11:4 Petrose a qala ho ba qaqisetsa tsohle ka ho hlahlamana, a re:" 
Acts11:5 “Ke ne ke rapela ke le motseng wa Jopo, mme ka bona pono. Ha theoha ntho e nngwe e kang lesela le leholo le tswang lehodimong, le lepeletswang, le tshwerwe ka diqola tse nne, mme ya tla ho nna." 
Acts11:6 Ha ke tadimisisa ka ho yona, ka bona diphoofolo tsa lefatshe tse maotomane, le dibatana, le dihahabi, le dinonyana tse fofang." 
Acts11:7 Ka utlwa le lentswe le re ho nna: Petrose, ema, o hlabe, o je!" 
Acts11:8 “Yaba ke re: Tjhe, le kgale, Morena! Hobane ka hanong la ka ha ho eso ka ho kena letho le ilehang, kapa le sa hlwekang." 
Acts11:9 “Lentswe le tswang lehodimong la bua kgetlo la bobedi, la re: Tseo Modimo a di hlwekisitseng, o se ke wa re di a ileha." 
Acts11:10 Hona ha etsahala ka makgetlo a mararo, yaba tsohle di nkelwa hape lehodimong." 
Acts11:11 “Bonang, hanghang ha fihla banna ba bararo tlung eo ke neng ke le ka ho yona, ba romilweng ho nna, ba etswa Sesaria." 
Acts11:12 Moya wa re ho nna ke tsamaye le bona ke sa qeaqee ka letho. Le bana beso bana ba tsheletseng ba ya le nna, mme ra kena ka tlung ya monna eo." 
Acts11:13 A re tsebisa kamoo a ileng a bona lengeloi le eme ka tlung ya hae kateng, le re: Romela Jopo, o bitse Simone ya bitswang Petrose." 
Acts11:14 O tla o bolella mantswe a tla o pholosa, wena le lelapa la hao lohle." 
Acts11:15 “Yare ke sa qala ho bua, Moya o Halalelang wa theohela hodima bona, jwaloka ho rona, qalehong." 
Acts11:16 Jwale ka hopola polelo ya Morena, kamoo a itseng kateng: Johanne o fela a kolobeditse ka metsi, empa lona le tla kolobetswa ka Moya o Halalelang." 
Acts11:17 Ka baka leo, ha Modimo a ba neile mpho e lekanang le eo a e neileng rona ba dumelang ho Morena Jesu Kreste, nna ke ne ke le mang nka thibelang Modimo?”" 
Acts11:18 Yare ha ba utlwa tsena, ba thola. Jwale ba tlotlisa Modimo, ba re: “Efela le baditjhaba Modimo o ba neile pako e isang bophelong.”" 
Acts11:19 Badumedi ba neng ba qhalantswe ke tlhoriso e bileng teng ho Setefane, ba fetela Fenisia, le Sipera, le Antiokia, ba sa bolelle motho lentswe la Modimo, haese Bajuda feela." 
Acts11:20 Empa ba bang ba bona e ne e le matswallwa a Sipera le ba Sirene, bao eitseng ha ba fihla Antiokia ba bua le bahedene, ba ba ruta molaetsa o molemo wa Jesu Kreste." 
Acts11:21 Letsoho la Morena le ne le ena le bona, mme palo e kgolo ya ba dumelang ya sokolohela ho Morena." 
Acts11:22 Jwale taba ena ya fihla tsebeng tsa kereke, Jerusalema, mme ba romela Baranabase, Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Ha a fihla, mme a bona mohau wa Modimo, a thaba, a kgothaletsa bohle hore ba kgomarele Morena ka pelo tse tiileng," 
Acts11:24 kahobane e ne e le monna ya molemo, ya tletseng Moya o Halalelang le tumelo. Yaba letshwelehadi le sokolohela ho Morena." 
Acts11:25 Jwale Baranabase a ya Tarasuse ho ya batla Saule," 
Acts11:26 mme hoba a mo fumane, a mo tlisa Antiokia. Ha fela selemo se tletseng ba ntse ba phutheha le kereke, ba ruta letshwelehadi. Ke hona Antiokia moo barutuwa ba qadileng ho bitswa Bakreste teng." 
Acts11:27 Matsatsing ao baporofeta ba bang ba theoha Jerusalema, ba ya Antiokia." 
Acts11:28 E mong wa bona ya bitswang Agabuse, a ema, a dupa ka Moya o Halalelang hore ho se ho tla ba le tlala e kgolo lefatsheng lohle; ya fela ya eba teng mehleng ya ha ho ne ho busa Tlelaudiose." 
Acts11:29 Yaba barutuwa ba rera ho romela dithuso ho badumedi ba ahileng Judea, ho ya kamoo e mong le e mong wa bona a ka kgonang kateng." 
Acts11:29 Yaba barutuwa ba rera ho romela dithuso ho badumedi ba ahileng Judea, ho ya kamoo e mong le e mong wa bona a ka kgonang kateng." 
Acts11:30 Ba fela ba etsa jwalo, ba di romela ho baholo ka Baranabase le Saule." 
Acts12:1 Ka nako eo, kgosi Heroda a tshwara batho ba bang ba kereke, ho ba hlokofatsa." 
Acts12:2 A bolaya Jakobo ngwanabo Johanne ka sabole. 
Acts12:3 Yare ha a bona hore taba eo e kgahlile Bajuda, a eketsa ka ho tshwara Petrose. E ne e le matsatsi a mokete wa bohobe bo sa lomoswang." 
Acts12:4 Hoba a mo tshware, a mo kenya tjhankaneng, a mo neela dihlopha tse nne tsa bahlabani ba bane sehlopheng ka seng, hore ba mo lebele, a hopotse ho mo hlahisa kapele ho setjhaba kamora Paseka." 
Acts12:5 Ka baka leo, Petrose a bolokwa tjhakaneng, empa kereke e ne e mo rapella ho Modimo e tiile." 
Acts12:6 Bosiung boo Heroda a neng a tla tsoha a mo hlahisa ho setjhaba ka bona, Petrose o ne a robetse pakeng tsa bahlabani ba babedi, a tlamilwe ka mahlaahlela a mabedi, mme balebedi ba lebetse monyako wa tjhankana." 
Acts12:7 Hanghang lengeloi la Morena la ema moo, mme lesedi la kganya ka tjhankaneng. Lengeloi la sisinya Petrose lehlakoreng, la mo tsosa, la re: “Tsoha kapele!” Mahlaahlela a matsohong a hae a wa." 
Acts12:8 Lengeloi la re ho yena: “Tena, o rwale meqathatso ya hao.” A etsa jwalo. La re ho yena hape: “Apara seaparo sa hao, o ntatele.”" 
Acts12:9 A tswa, a le latela, a sa tsebe hore se etswang ke lengeloi ke nnete: A mpa a lekanya hore o bona pono." 
Acts12:10 Yare hoba ba fete molebedi wa pele le wa bobedi, ba fihla monyakong wa tshepe o tswelang motseng; wa ipula, yaba ba a tswa, ba theosa ka seterata se le seng, mme hanghang lengeloi la tloha ho yena." 
Acts12:11 Petrose ha a re qwatsi! Yaba o re: “Jwale ke tseba kannete hore Morena o romile lengeloi la hae, mme o nnamoletse matsohong a Heroda le ho tsohle tse neng di lebeletswe ke setjhaba sa Bajuda.”" 
Acts12:12 Hoba a elellwe jwalo, a ya tlung ya Maria, mma Johanne ya bitswang Mareka, moo ba bangata ba neng ba phuthehetse teng, ba rapela." 
Acts12:13 Ha a kokota lemating la mathule, lekgabunyane le bitswang Roda la atamela, ho tla mamela." 
Acts12:14 La tseba lentswe la Petrose, mme ka baka la thabo, la se ke la bula lemati, la mpa la mathela ka tlung, la ba tsebisa hore Petrose o eme mathuleng." 
Acts12:15 Empa ba re ho yena: “O a hlanya!” Yena a tiisa ka matla hore ho jwalo. Yaba ba re: “Ke lengeloi la hae.” 
Acts12:16 Empa Petrose a nna a kokota; ha ba bula, ba mmona, mme ba makala." 
Acts12:17 A ba phoka ka letsoho hore ba kgutse, a ba phetela kamoo Morena a mo ntshitseng tjhankaneng kateng, a ba a re: “Tsebisang Jakobo le badumedi ditaba tsena.” A tswa, a ya sebakeng se seng." 
Acts12:18 Yare ha bo esa, ha eba le moferefere o se kaa ka letho hara bahlabani, ba re na hantlentle ho etsahetseng ka Petrose." 
Acts12:19 Ha Heroda a mmatla, mme a sa mo fumane, a botsisisa balebedi, a nto laela hore ba bolawe. Yaba Heroda o theoha Judea, o ya Sesaria, mme a dula teng." 
Acts12:19 Ha Heroda a mmatla, mme a sa mo fumane, a botsisisa balebedi, a nto laela hore ba bolawe. Yaba Heroda o theoha Judea, o ya Sesaria, mme a dula teng." 
Acts12:20 Jwale Heroda o ne a halefetse ba Tire le Sidone haholo. Ba tla ho yena ba le ntsweleng, mme hoba ba qekise Belasetose, modisa wa ntlo ya kgosi ya ho robala, ba kopa kgotso, hobane naha ya bona e ne e phediswa ke ya kgosi." 
Acts12:21 Ka letsatsi le kgethilweng, Heroda a apara seaparo sa hae sa bokgosi, a dula setulong sa hae, a bua le batho." 
Acts12:22 Letshwele la howa, la re: “Lentswe lena ke la modimo, e seng la motho!”" 
Acts12:23 Hanghang lengeloi la Morena la mo otla, kahobane a sa ka a hlompha Modimo, mme a jewa ke diboko, a shwa." 
Acts12:24 Empa lentswe la Modimo la ata, la anafala." 
Acts12:25 Ha Baranabase le Saule ba se ba phethile mosebetsi wa bona, ba kgutla Jerusalema, ba tla le Johanne ya bitswang Mareka." 
Acts13:1 Kerekeng ya Antiokia ho ne ho ena le baporofeta le baruti, e leng Baranabase le Simeone, ya neng a bitswa Botsho, le Losaniase wa Sirene, le Manaene, ya hodisitsweng le kgosi Heroda, le Saule." 
Acts13:2 Ha ba ntse ba phetha tshebeletso ya Morena Jesu, mme ba itima dijo, Moya o Halalelang wa re: “Nkgetheleng Baranabase le Saule bakeng sa mosebetsi oo ke ba bitseditseng wona.”" 
Acts13:3 Yare hoba ba itime dijo, mme ba rapele, ba ba bea matsoho, ba re ba tsamaye." 
Acts13:4 Kaha ba ne ba romilwe ke Moya o Halalelang, ba theohela Selekose; ho tloha moo ba tshelela Sipera ka sekepe." 
Acts13:5 Yare ha ba fihla Salamise, ba phatlalatsa lentswe la Modimo matlung a thapelo a Bajuda. Ba ne ba ena le Johanne, e le mothusi wa bona." 
Acts13:6 Ha ba se ba tsamaile le sehlekehleke sohle ho ya fihla Pafose, ba fumana monna e mong wa senohe, e le moporofeta wa bohata, wa Mojuda, ya bitswang Barejesu." 
Acts13:7 E ne e le lehlahana la mmusisi Seregiose Paulosi, monna ya sedi. Mmusisi enwa a bitsa Baranabase le Saule, hobane a ne a rata ho utlwa lentswe la Modimo." 
Acts13:8 Empa Elemase wa senohe, kaha lebitso la hae le hlaloswa jwalo, a ba hanyetsa, a batla ho kgelosa mmusisi tumelong." 
Acts13:9 Jwale Saule, ya bileng a bitswang Paulosi, a tletse Moya o Halalelang, a mo tadimisisa, a re:" 
Acts13:10 “Ngwana Diabolosi! Wena ya tletseng thetso le bokgopo bohle! Sera sa toka yohle! Na ha o sa tla kgaotsa ho kgopamisa ditsela tse lokileng tsa Morena? 
Acts13:11 Jwale, bona, letsoho la Morena le a o otla: o tla foufala, o se ke wa bona letsatsi ka nako e itseng.” Hanghang mohodi le lefifi tsa mo aparela, mme a nna a phopholetsa ho batla ya ka mo tataisang ka letsoho." 
Acts13:12 Yare ha mmusisi a bona se etsahetseng, a dumela, a makalla thuto ya Morena." 
Acts13:13 Paulosi le ba nang le yena ba tloha Pafose ka sekepe, ba ya fihla Perege e Pamfilea. Johanne a kgaohana le bona, a kgutlela Jerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Bona ba phunyeletsa ho tloha Perege, ho ya fihla Antiokia e Pisidia. Ba kena ka tlung ya thapelo ka letsatsi la Sabatha, ba dula fatshe." 
Acts13:15 Yare hoba ba bale Molao le Baporofeta, baokamedi ba ntlo ya thapelo ba romela ho bona, ba re: “Banna ba heso, haeba le ena le lentswe le leng la ho kgothatsa batho bana, buang.”" 
Acts13:16 Paulosi a ema, a phoka ka letsoho, a re: “Banna ba Iseraele, le lona ba tshabang Modimo, mamelang!" 
Acts13:17 Modimo wa setjhaba sena sa Iseraele a na a kgetha bo-ntata rona moholo, a ba etsa setjhaba se seholo ha ba ntse ba jakile naheng ya Egepeta, mme a ba ntsha teng ka letsoho le matla." 
Acts13:18 Ka dilemo tse ka bang mashome a mane a mamella mekgwa ya bona ha ba le lehwatateng. 
Acts13:19 Ha a se a timeditse ditjhaba tse supileng naheng ya Kanana, a ba nea naha eo hore e be lefa la bona" 
Acts13:20 ka dilemo tse ka bang makgolo a mane le mashome a mahlano. “Kamora tsena a ba nea baahlodi, ho fihlela mehleng ya moporofeta Samuele." 
Acts13:21 Ho tloha moo ba ikopela ho fuwa kgosi, mme Modimo a ba nea Saule, mora wa Kishe, wa leloko la Benjamine, ya ileng a busa ka dilemo tse mashome a mane." 
Acts13:22 Ha Modimo a se a mo tlositse, a bea Davida ho ba kgosi ya bona, eo a bileng a mo paka, a re: Ke fumane Davida, mora wa Jese, e le monna eo ke mo ratang, ya tla phetha thato ya ka yohle." 
Acts13:23 “Ke ka ditloholo tsa monna enwa Modimo a ileng a tlisetsa Iseraele Mopholosi, e leng Jesu, ho ya ka tshepiso ya hae." 
Acts13:24 Jesu a eso tle, Johanne o ne a ile a ruta batho bohle ba Iseraele hore ba bake, ba kolobetswe." 
Acts13:25 Ha Johanne a qetile tsa thomo ya hae, a re: Le lekanya hore nna ke mang? Ha ke Yena, empa bonang, kamora ka ho tla eo ke sa tshwanelang ho lokolla meqathatso maotong a hae." 
Acts13:26 “Banna ba heso, bana ba Aborahama, le lona ba tshabang Modimo, lentswe lena la pholoho le rometswe ho rona," 
Acts13:27 hobane ba ahileng Jerusalema le babusi ba bona ba ne ba sa tsebe monna enwa le mantswe a baporofeta, a neng a balwa ka Sabatha se seng le se seng, empa ba a phethahaditse ka ho mo ahlola." 
Acts13:28 Leha ba sa ka ba fumana a ena le molato o lokelang lefu, ba kopa Pilato hore a bolawe." 
Acts13:29 Ha ba se ba phethile tsohle tse ngotsweng ka yena, ba mo theola sefapanong, ba mmea ka lebitleng." 
Acts13:30 Empa Modimo a mo tsosa bafung. 
Acts13:31 Ka matsatsi a mangata a iponahatsa ho ba neng ba nyolohile le yena ho tloha Galelea ho tla Jerusalema, bao jwale e leng dipaki tsa hae ho batho." 
Acts13:32 “Rona re le bolella molaetsa o molemo: Seo Modimo a neng a se tshepisitse bo-ntata rona," 
Acts13:33 o se phethahaditse ho rona, bana ba bona, ka ho tsosa Jesu bafung, jwalokaha ho ngotswe Pesalemeng ya bobedi, ho thwe: “ O Mora wa ka, kajeno ke o tswetse;" 
Acts13:34 “le hore Modimo o mo tsositse bafung, hore a se ke a hlola a boela ho boleng, ke seo a se boletseng ha a re: “ Ke tla le nea mahlohonolo a halalelang a sebele, a tiisitsweng a Davida." 
Acts13:35 “Hape sebakeng se seng o re: “ Ha o ka ke wa tlohella Ya Halalelang wa hao hore a bole. 
Acts13:36 “Efela Davida hoba a sebeletse moloko wa hae, a phethe thato ya Modimo bophelong ba hae, o ile a ithoballa, a epelwa pela bo-ntatae, a bola." 
Acts13:37 Athe ya tsositsweng bafung ke Modimo ha a ka a bola. 
Acts13:38 “Ka baka leo, tsebang he, bana beso, hore ka Jesu le phatlalletswa tshwarelo ya dibe. Le dinthong tsohle tseo le neng le sitwa ho fumanwa le se molato ho tsona ka Molao wa Moshe," 
Acts13:39 mang le mang ya dumelang ho Jesu o fumanwa a se molato ho tsona. 
Acts13:40 Ka baka leo, hlokomelang, esere la hlahelwa ke se neng se bolelwe ke baporofeta:" 
Acts13:41 “ Tadimang, lona banyedisi ting! Makalang, le be le timele! Ke etsa ho hong mehleng ena ya hao; ke etsa hoo o neng o ke ke wa ho dumela, leha o ne o ka ba wa ho bolellwa. ”" 
Acts13:42 Yare ha ba etswa, batho ba ba kopa hore ba tle ba ba bolelle ditaba tseo le ka Sabatha se latelang." 
Acts13:43 Jwale ha phutheho e se e qhalane, Bajuda ba bangata le basokolohi ba hlomphang Modimo, ba sala Paulosi le Baranabase morao. Bona ba bua le bona, ba ba kgothaletsa ho tiisetsa mohaung wa Modimo." 
Acts13:44 Ka Sabatha se hlahlamang motse wa batla o phutheha kaofela ho tla utlwa lentswe la Modimo. 
Acts13:45 Empa Bajuda ha ba bona matshwele, ba kenwa ke mona, ba hanyetsa tse builweng ke Paulosi, ba mo nyefola." 
Acts13:46 Yaba Paulosi le Baranabase ba bua ka sebete, ba re: “Ho ne ho tshwanetse hore lentswe la Modimo le bolelwe ho lona pele, empa erekaha le le hana, le ikahlola hore ha le lokelwe ke bophelo bo sa feleng; bonang, re ya ho baditjhaba." 
Acts13:47 Morena o re laetse tjena: “ Ke o entse lesedi la ditjhaba, hore o ise pholoho le dipheletsong tsa lefatshe! ”" 
Acts13:48 Yare ha baditjhaba ba utlwa ba thaba, mme ba tlotlisa lentswe la Morena. Bohle ba kgethetsweng bophelo bo sa feleng ba dumela." 
Acts13:49 Lentswe la Modimo la anetswa sebakeng seo. 
Acts13:50 Empa Bajuda ba kenya moya ho basadi ba hlomphehang, ba hlomphang Modimo, le ho banna ba ka sehloohong ba motse, hore ba hlorise Paulosi le Baranabase, mme ba ba leleka naheng ya bona." 
Acts13:51 Yaba bona ba ba hlohlorela lerole le maotong a bona, ba ya Ikonione." 
Acts13:52 Ha e le barutuwa bona ba tlala thabo le Moya o Halalelang. 
Acts14:1 Ha etsahala hore ha Paulosi le Baranabase ba le Ikonione, ba kene hammoho ka tlung ya thapelo ya Bajuda. Ba bua hoo palo e kgolo ya Bajuda le Bagerike e ileng ya dumela." 
Acts14:2 Empa Bajuda ba sa dumeleng ba hlohleletsa, ba senya maikutlo a baditjhaba hore a hanane le badumedi." 
Acts14:3 Ka baka leo, bo-Paulosi le Baranabase ba qeta nako e telele ba bua ka sebete ka Morena. Morena a paka bonnete ba lentswe le bolelang mohau wa hae, ka ho ba nea matla a ho etsa mehlolo le dimakatso." 
Acts14:4 Empa baahi ba motse ba arohana; ba bang ba dumellana le Bajuda, ba bang le baapostola." 
Acts14:5 Hara baditjhaba le Bajuda, hammoho le babusi ba bona, ha eba le morero wa ho ba etsa hampe le ho ba tlepetsa ka majwe." 
Acts14:6 Ha baapostola ba lemoha taba eo, ba tshabela metseng ea Lokaonia, le Lesitera le Derebe, le tikolohong ya yona," 
Acts14:7 mme ba bolela molaetsa o molemo teng. 
Acts14:8 Moo Lesitera ho ne ho ena le monna e mong, ya holofetseng maoto, e le seritsa sa tswalo, se dulang feela, se eso ka se tsamaya." 
Acts14:9 Monna enwa a mamela Paulosi ha a bua. Ha Paulosi a mo tadima, mme a bona hore o na le tumelo ya hore a ka fodiswa," 
Acts14:10 a bua ka lentswe le phahameng, a re: “Ema ka maoto, o otlolohe!” Yaba o tlolela hodimo, o a tsamaya." 
Acts14:11 Matshwele ha a bona seo Paulosi a se entseng, a howa ka puo ya Selokaonia, a re: “Medimo e theohetse ho rona ka sebopeho sa batho!”" 
Acts14:12 Yaba a bitsa Baranabase Seuse, le Paulosi Heremese, kaha e ne e le yena molomo wa bona." 
Acts14:13 Moprista wa Seuse, eo tempele ya hae e neng e le haufi le motse, a tlisa dipoho tse meqhaka dikgorong tsa motse, mme yena a lakatsa ho etsa sehlabelo mmoho le matshwele." 
Acts14:14 Empa ha baapostola Baranabase le Paulosi ba utlwa hoo, ba hahola diaparo tsa bona, ba ikakgela hara letshwele, ba howa," 
Acts14:15 ba re: “Banna, le etsetsang jwalo? Le rona re batho jwaloka lona. Re le bolella molaetsa o molemo, e le hore le furalle mafeela ana, le sokolohele ho Modimo ya phelang, ya entseng lehodimo, le lefatshe, le lewatle, le dintho tsohle tse ho tsona." 
Acts14:16 Melokong e fetileng o ile a tlohella ditjhaba tsohle ho latela mekgwa ya tsona. 
Acts14:17 Leha ho le jwalo, ha a a ka a lesa ho ipaka ka ho etsa tse molemo, ka ho le fa pula e tswang lehodimong le kotulo ka nako ya yona, ho le kgorisa, le ho nyakalatsa dipelo tsa lona.”" 
Acts14:18 Leha ba buile jwalo, ya eba bothata ho thibela matshwele ho ba etsetsa sehlabelo." 
Acts14:19 Yaba ho fihla Bajuda, ba etswa Antiokia le Ikonione, mme hoba ba kgodise matshwele, ba tlepetsa Paulosi ka majwe, ba mo hulanyetsa kantle ho motse, ba hloma eka o shwele." 
Acts14:20 Yare ha barutuwa ba sa ntsane ba mmokanetse, a ema, a kena motseng. Ka la hosasane a tloha le Baranabase, ba ya Derebe." 
Acts14:21 Hoba ba bolelle motse wa Derebe molaetsa o molemo, mme ba sokolle ba bangata hore e be barutuwa, ba boela Lesitera le Ikonione le Antiokia." 
Acts14:22 Ba matlafatsa dipelo tsa barutuwa, ba ba kgothaletsa ho tiisetsa tumelong, ba re: “Eka kgona re kene Mmusong wa Modimo ka ho feta hara matshwenyeho a mangata.”" 
Acts14:23 Ha ba se ba ba kgethetse baholo kerekeng e nngwe le e nngwe, ba rapela, ba itima dijo, mme ba ba bea matsohong a Morena eo ba dumetseng ho yena." 
Acts14:24 Hoba ba fete le Pisidia, ba fihla Pamfilea." 
Acts14:25 Ha ba se ba boletse lentswe la Modimo Perege, ba theohela Ataleya." 
Acts14:26 Ba tloha teng ka sekepe, ba tshelela Antiokia, e leng moo ba neng ba ile ba bewa kalosong ya mohau wa Modimo ka baka la mosebetsi oo jwale ba o phethileng." 
Acts14:27 Ha ba fihla, ba phutha kereke, ba beha tsohle tseo Modimo a di entseng ka bona, le hore o buletse baditjhaba monyako wa tumelo." 
Acts14:28 Jwale ba dula nako e telele le barutuwa. 
Acts15:1 Batho ba bang ba neng ba theoha Judea ba ne ba ruta badumedi, ba re: “Ha le sa bolotswe ka moetlo wa Moshe, le ke ke la pholoswa.”" 
Acts15:1 Batho ba bang ba neng ba theoha Judea ba ne ba ruta badumedi, ba re: “Ha le sa bolotswe ka moetlo wa Moshe, le ke ke la pholoswa.”" 
Acts15:2 Hoba Paulosi le Baranabase ba be le phapang le kgang e kgolo le bona, ha rerwa hore Paulosi le Baranabase le ba bang ba bona ba nyolohele Jerusalema ho baapostola le baholo ka taba ena." 
Acts15:3 Ba neng ba romilwe ke kereke ba feta Fenisia le Samaria, ba ntse ba bolela tsa tshokoloho ya baditjhaba, mme ba thabisa badumedi bohle haholo." 
Acts15:4 Ha ba fihlile Jerusalema, ba amohelwa ke kereke le baapostola le baholo, mme ba beha tsohle tseo Modimo a ileng a di etsa ka bona." 
Acts15:5 Empa ba bang ba mokga wa Bafarisi, ba dumetseng, ba ema, ba re: “Eka kgona ba bolotswe, mme ba laelwe ho boloka Molao wa Moshe.”" 
Acts15:6 Jwale baapostola le baholo ba kopana ho hlahlobisana taba ena. 
Acts15:7 Kamora kgang e kgolo, Petrose a ema, a re ho bona: “Bana beso, le a tseba hore e se e le nako Modimo a nkgethile hara lona hore ka molomo wa ka baditjhaba ba utlwe lentswe la molaetsa o molemo, mme ba dumele." 
Acts15:8 Modimo ya tsebang dipelo tsa batho o ile a ba ananela ka ho ba nea Moya o Halalelang jwaloka rona. 
Acts15:9 Ha a a ka a kgetholla pakeng tsa rona le bona, o hlwekisitse dipelo tsa bona hobane ba ile ba dumela." 
Acts15:10 Jwale ekaba le lekelang Modimo ka ho jarisa barutuwa joko eo rona le bo-ntata rona re sitilweng ho e jara? 
Acts15:11 Empa re dumela hore ke ka mohau wa Morena Jesu re pholoswang jwaloka bona.” 
Acts15:12 Jwale phutheho yohle ya kgutsa, mme ya mamela Baranabase le Paulosi ha ba bolela mehlolo le dimakatso tsohle tseo Modimo a ileng a di etsa ka bona hara baditjhaba." 
Acts15:13 Yare hoba ba kgutse, Jakobo a bua, a re: “Bana beso, mmameleng!" 
Acts15:14 Simone o boletse kamoo Modimo a qadileng kateng ho bontsha paballo ya hae ho baditjhaba ka ho ikgethela setjhaba hara bona. 
Acts15:15 Mantswe a baporofeta a bile a dumellana le taba ena, jwalokaha ho ngotswe, ho thwe:" 
Acts15:16 “ Kamora tsena ke tla kgutla, mme ke tla tsosa ntlo ya Davida e weleng; dithako tsa yona ke tla di tsosa, ke boele ke di emise hape," 
Acts15:17 hore batho bohle ba tle ba batle Morena, esita le baditjhaba bohle ba reng ka nna, “ho rialo Morena ya etsang tsena," 
Acts15:18 tse tsebilweng ho tloha mehleng ya boholoholo. 
Acts15:19 “Ka baka leo, nna ke hopola hore eka kgona ho se ke ha kgathatswa ba sokolohelang ho Modimo ba etswa ho baditjhaba." 
Acts15:20 Ba mpe ba ngollwe hore ba ile tse silafaditsweng ke medimo ya bohata, le bohlola, le dintho tse fenethilweng, le madi," 
Acts15:21 hobane ho tloha melokong ya kgalekgale, ho bile le ba rutang tsa Moshe motseng o mong le o mong, di balwa matlung a thapelo ka Sabatha se seng le se seng.”" 
Acts15:22 Yaba baapostola le baholo le kereke yohle ba rera ho roma banna ba kgethilweng hara bona ho ya Antiokia le Paulosi le Baranabase: e leng Juda ya bitswang Baranabase le Silase, banna ba baetapele hara badumedi." 
Acts15:23 Ba ba neeletsa lengolo le reng: “Baapostola le baholo, e leng bana babo lona, ba dumedisa badumedi ba leng Antiokia le Siria le Silesia, ba tswang ho baditjhaba." 
Acts15:24 Re utlwile hore ba bang ba rona, ba neng ba sa laelwa ke rona, ba ile ba le tshwenya ka dipolelo, ba ferekanya maikutlo a lona." 
Acts15:25 Kahona re rerile ka moya o le mong ho roma ho lona banna ba kgethilweng, ba ena le baratuwa ba rona Baranabase le Paulosi," 
Acts15:26 e leng banna ba tetseng bophelo ba bona ka baka la Morena wa rona Jesu Kreste. 
Acts15:27 Ka baka leo, re romile Juda le Silase, mme ba tla le tsebisa ditaba tseo ka molomo." 
Acts15:28 Ho rerile Moya o Halalelang le rona hore re se ke ra le jarisa boima bo bong hape, haese tsena tse hlokahalang:" 
Acts15:29 ho ila tse hlabetsweng medimo ya bohata, le madi, le dintho tse fenethilweng, le bohlola. Ha le ila tsena, e tla ba le etsa hantle. Salang ka kgotso.”" 
Acts15:30 Yare hoba ba lokollwe, ba theohela Antiokia, ba bokella badumedi bohle, mme ba ba nea lengolo." 
Acts15:31 Hoba ba le bale, ba thabela kgothatso ya lona." 
Acts15:32 Juda le Silase, bao le bona e neng e le baporofeta, ba kgothatsa badumedi ka puo e telele, ba ba matlafatsa." 
Acts15:33 Hoba ba hlole teng nakwana, badumedi ba ba lokolla ka kgotso, ho boela ho ba ba romileng." 
Acts15:34 Leha ho le jwalo, Silase a itherela ho sala moo." 
Acts15:35 Paulosi le Baranabase ba hlola Antiokia. Bona, le ba bang ba bangata, ba nna ba ruta, mme ba bolela molaetsa o molemo wa lentswe la Morena." 
Acts15:36 Jwale, kamora matsatsinyana, Paulosi a re ho Baranabase: “A re boele re tjhakele badumedi motseng o mong le o mong oo re ileng ra phatlalatsa lentswe la Morena ho wona, re bone hore na ba phela jwang.”" 
Acts15:37 Jwale Baranabase o ne a lakatsa hore ba ye le Johanne ya bitswang Mareka," 
Acts15:38 empa Paulosi a fumana ho sa lokele hore ba ye le enwa ya ileng a ikgula ho bona ha ba ne ba le Pamfilea, a se ke a ya le bona mosebetsing." 
Acts15:39 Ha eba le phapang e kgolo hoo ba ileng ba arohana; Baranabase a nka Mareka, ba kena ka sekepeng ho tshelela Sipera." 
Acts15:40 Yare hoba Paulosi a kgethe Silase, a tloha a beilwe kalosong ya mohau wa Morena ke badumedi." 
Acts15:41 A feta le Siria le Silesia, a ntse a matlafatsa dikereke." 
Acts16:1 Paulosi a fihla Derebe le Lesitera. Teng ho ne ho ena le morutuwa e mong ya bitswang Timothea, mmae e le mosadi wa Mojuda, wa modumedi, empa ntatae e le Mogerike." 
Acts16:2 Timothea o ne a pakwa ke badumedi ba leng Lesitera le Ikonione. 
Acts16:3 Paulosi a rata ho tsamaya le yena, yaba o mo nka a mmolotsa ka baka la Bajuda ba leng dibakeng tseo, hobane ba ne ba tseba bohle hore ntatae ke Mogerike." 
Acts16:4 Ha ba ntse ba eya le metse, ba ne ba neela batho ba teng ditaelo tse beilweng ke baapostola le baholo ba leng Jerusalema, hore ba di boloke." 
Acts16:5 Yaba dikereke di matlafatswa tumelong, mme tsa ngatafala ka letsatsi le leng le le leng." 
Acts16:6 Ba haola naheng ya Firigia le Galatia, kaha Moya o Halalelang o no ba hanetse ho bolela lentswe la Modimo Asia." 
Acts16:7 Yare ha ba fihla pela Misia, ba leka ho kena Bithinia, empa Moya wa Jesu wa se ke wa ba dumella." 
Acts16:8 Yaba ba feta Misia, ba theohela Terowase." 
Acts16:9 Paulosi a hlahelwa ke pono bosiu. A bona monna e mong wa Masedonia a eme pela hae, a mo rapela, a re: “Ako tshelele Masedonia, o re thuse!”" 
Acts16:10 Yare hoba a bone pono eo, hanghang ra batla ho ya Masedonia, re kgodisehile hore Modimo o re bitseditse ho ya bolela molaetsa o molemo teng." 
Acts16:11 Yare hoba re tlohe Terowase ka sekepe, ra toba Samotherake; ka le hlahlamang ra ya Neapolese." 
Acts16:12 Ho tloha moo ra ya Filipi, e leng motse wa sehlooho wa karolo eo ya Masedonia, o buswang ke Roma. Ra qeta matsatsinyana motseng oo." 
Acts16:13 Ka tsatsi la Sabatha ra tswela kantle ho kgoro ya motse e pela noka, moo re neng re lekanya hore ho rapellwa teng. Hoba re dule, ra bua le basadi ba phuthehileng." 
Acts16:14 Mosadi e mong wa motse wa Thiatira, ya bitswang Lidia, ya rekisang masela a perese, ya tshabang Modimo, a mamela, mme Morena a bula pelo ya hae hore a ele hloko tse bolelwang ke Paulosi." 
Acts16:15 Ha a se a kolobeditswe le ba lelapa la hae, a re rapela, a re: “Haeba le kgotsofetse hore ke dumetse ho Morena, kenang ka tlung ya ka, le hlole teng.” A re qophella." 
Acts16:16 Yare ha re ntse re eya thapelong, ha etsahala hore re kgahlanyetswe ke lekgabunyane le nang le moya wa bonohe, le neng le fumantsha beng ba lona leruo le lengata ka bonohe ba lona." 
Acts16:17 La re latela re ena le Paulosi, la howa, la re: “Batho bana ke bahlanka ba Modimo ya hodimodimo, ba le phatlalletsang tsela ya pholoho!”" 
Acts16:18 La etsa hona ka matsatsi a mangata. Empa Paulosi ha a se a tenehile, a reteleha, a re ho moya oo: “Ke o laela ka lebitso la Jesu Kreste hore o tswe ho yena!” Wa tswa ka yona nako eo." 
Acts16:19 Yare ha beng ba lona ba bona hore tshepo ya bona ya ho rua e fedile, ba tshwara Paulosi le Silase, ba ba hulanyetsa lebaleng la motse, ho babusi." 
Acts16:20 Ba ba isa ho baahlodi, ba re: “Batho bana, ere e le Bajuda, ba ferekanya motse wa rona!" 
Acts16:21 Ba ruta meetlo eo rona re le Baroma, re sa dumellweng ho e amohela, leha e le ho e phetha.”" 
Acts16:22 Letshwele la kopana, la ba tsohela matla, baahlodi ba ba tabolela diaparo, mme ba laela hore ba shapuwe." 
Acts16:23 Ha ba se ba ba ntshitse metopa e mengata, ba ba hlahlela tjhankaneng, ba laela molebedi ho ba lebela ka thata." 
Acts16:24 Yena ha a fumane taelo e jwalo, a ba hlahlela kaharehare ho tjhankana, a tlamella maoto a bona pakeng tsa dikoqo." 
Acts16:25 Ka seroko, Paulosi le Silase ba rapela, ba tlotlisa Modimo ka difela, mme batshwaruwa ba ba mamela." 
Acts16:26 Hanghang ha eba le tshisinyeho e kgolo ya lefatshe, hoo metheo ya tjhankana e bileng ya reketla, mme ka ho panya ha ntshi menyako yohle ya buleha, mahlaahlela a bohle a lokoloha." 
Acts16:27 Yare ha molebedi wa tjhankana a phaphama, mme a bona menyako ya tjhankana e butswe, a tsomula sabole ya hae, a re o a ipolaya, ka ho lekanya hore batshwaruwa ba phonyohile." 
Acts16:28 Empa Paulosi a mo howeletsa ka lentswe le phahameng, a re: “Se intshe kotsi, hobane re teng bohle!”" 
Acts16:29 Molebedi a re a tlisetswe mabone; a itahlela ka tjhankaneng a ntse a thothomela, a itihela kapele ho Paulosi le Silase." 
Acts16:30 A ba isa kantle, a re: “Benghadi, eka kgona ke etse eng hore ke tle ke pholoswe?”" 
Acts16:31 Ba re: “Dumela ho Morena Jesu, mme wena le ba lelapa la hao le tla pholoswa.”" 
Acts16:32 Ba mmolella lentswe la Morena le bohle ba lelapa la hae. 
Acts16:33 A ba nka ka yona nako eo ya bosiu, a thoba metopa ya bona, a ba a kolobetswa kapelepele le bohle ba lelapa la hae." 
Acts16:34 A ba isa tlung ha hae, a ba fepa, a nyakalla le ba lelapa la hae bohle, kahobane ba dumetse ho Modimo." 
Acts16:35 Ha bo esa, baahlodi ba roma mapolesa, ba re: “Lokollang batho bano.”" 
Acts16:36 Jwale molebedi wa tjhankana a tsebisa Paulosi taba ena, a re: “Baahlodi ba laetse hore le lokollwe; ka baka leo tswang, le ye ka kgotso.”" 
Acts16:37 Empa Paulosi a arabela ka ho re: “Re Baroma, empa re shapilwe pontsheng re sa ka ra ahlolwa, ra hlahlelwa tjhankaneng; jwale ba se ba re lokolla ka lekunutu? Tjhe, le ho ka! A ho tle bona, ba re ntshe!”" 
Acts16:38 Mapolesa a tsebisa baahlodi mantswe ana. Ba tshoha ha ba utlwa hore ke Baroma. 
Acts16:39 Ba tla, ba inyatsa, ba ba ntsha tjhankaneng, ba nto ba kopa hore ba tlohe motseng." 
Acts16:40 Ha ba etswa tjhankaneng ba kena ha Lidia, ba bona badumedi, ba ba kgothatsa, ba nto tsamaya." 
Acts17:1 Ha ba fetile Amfipolese le Apolonia, ba fihla Thesalonika, moo ho neng ho ena le ntlo ya thapelo ya Bajuda." 
Acts17:2 Ho ya ka tlwaelo ya hae, Paulosi a kena ho bona, mme ka Disabatha tse tharo a buisana le bona ka tsa Mangolo." 
Acts17:3 A ba hlalosetsa le ho ba bontsha hore ho ne ho tshwanetse hore Mesia a hlokofatswe, mme a tsohe bafung, le hore “Jesu enwa, eo ke le tsebisang yena, ke Mesia.”" 
Acts17:4 Ba bang ba bona ba dumela, mme ba sebedisana le Paulosi le Silase, le bongata bo boholo ba Bagerike ba kgumamelang Modimo, le basadi ba bangata ba ka sehloohong." 
Acts17:5 Empa Bajuda ba eba mona, ba phutha banna ba bang ba kgopo, ba lebaleng la motse, ba ya le bona, ba tsosa moferefere motseng; ba futuhela ntlo ya Jasone, ba batla Paulosi le Silase ho ba tlisa kapela pitso ya setjhaba." 
Acts17:6 Ha ba sa ba fumane, ba hulanyetsa Jasone le badumedi ba bang kapela bo-ramotse, ba ntse ba howa, ba re: “Banna bana ba ferekantseng dibaka tsohle, le mona ba tlile," 
Acts17:7 mme Jasone o ba amohetse. Batho bana bohle ba etsa se lwantshanang le ditaelo tsa Sesare, ba re ho na le kgosi e nngwe, e leng Jesu!”" 
Acts17:8 Ba ferekanya letshwele le bo-ramotse ba utlwang ditaba tsena," 
Acts17:9 mme yare hoba Jasone le ba bang ba lefe tjhelete ya tebeletso, ba ba lokolla." 
Acts17:10 Hanghang badumedi ba thobisetsa Paulosi le Silase Berea, bosiu. Hoba ba fihle teng, ba kena ka tlung ya thapelo ya Bajuda." 
Acts17:11 Bao ba ne ba ena le maikutlo a matle ho feta ba Thesalonika, ba amohela lentswe la Modimo ka thahasello yohle, ba fuputsa Mangolong ka letsatsi le leng le le leng ho bona hore na ditaba tseo di jwalo." 
Acts17:12 Ka baka leo, ba bangata ba bona ba dumela, le basadi ba hlomphehang ba Bagerike, le banna ba bangata." 
Acts17:13 Empa Bajuda ba Thesalonika ha ba utlwa hore Paulosi o boletse lentswe la Modimo le Berea, le teng ba ya, ba tsosa moferefere, ba ferekanya matshwele." 
Acts17:14 Yaba hanghang badumedi ba balehisetsa Paulosi lewatleng, empa Silase le Timothea ba sala moo." 
Acts17:15 Batho ba feleheditseng Paulosi ba mo fihlisa Athene, mme hoba ba newe taelo e yang ho Silase le Timothea, e reng bao ba tle ho Paulosi kapelepele, ba kgutla." 
Acts17:16 Paulosi ha a ntse a emetse Silase le Timothea, Athene, a fela pelo ha a bona hore motseng ho tletse ditshwantsho tsa medimo ya bohata." 
Acts17:17 Kahoo ka tsatsi le leng le le leng a buisana le Bajuda ba tshabang Modimo ka tlung ya thapelo, le ba ka tshohang ba eba teng lebaleng la motse." 
Acts17:18 Jwale bahlalefi ba bang ba Baepikure le ba Basetoike ba ngangisana le yena, mme ba bang ba re: “Ekaba moberaberi eo o rata ho reng?” Ba bang bona ba re: “E ka ka ke mmuelli wa medimo esele,” hobane o ne a bolela molaetsa o molemo wa Jesu le wa tsoho ya bafu." 
Acts17:19 Ba mo nka, ba mo isa lekgotleng la Areopagose, ba re: “Na re ka tseba hore na thuto ee e ntjha eo o e bolelang ke efe?" 
Acts17:20 O re tlisetsa ditaba ding, tse re hlohlontshang ditsebe? Ka baka leo, re rata ho tseba hore na ekaba tsena di bolela eng.”" 
Acts17:21 Baathene bohle le bajaki ba melata ba ne ba sa etse letho, haese ho bolela kapa ho utlwa ho hong ho hotjha." 
Acts17:22 Jwale Paulosi a ema hara lekgotla la Areopagose, a re: “Banna ba Athene, ke hlokomela hore ka mekgwa yohle le hlompha medimo ya lona haholo." 
Acts17:23 Ha ke ntse ke itsamaela, mme ke hlahloba moo le rapellang teng, ke ile ka fumana le aletare eo ho ngotsweng ho yona: ho modimo ya sa tsejweng. Sena seo le se rapelang le sa se tsebe, ke le tsebisa sona." 
Acts17:24 “Modimo ya entseng lefatshe le tsohle tse ho lona, eo e leng Morena wa lehodimo le wa lefatshe, ha a dule ditempeleng tse hahilweng ka matsoho." 
Acts17:25 Hape ha a hloke ho sebeletswa ka matsoho a batho, jwaloka hoja a hloka ho hong, hobane ke yena ya neang bohle bophelo, moya le dintho tsohle." 
Acts17:26 O entse ditjhaba tsohle ka madi a motho a le mong, hore di ahe lefatsheng lohle; a di beela dinako e sa le pele, le meedi ya boaho ba tsona," 
Acts17:27 e le hore di batle Modimo, haeba di ka mo phopholetsa, tsa mo fumana, le hoja ruri a se hole le e mong le e mong wa rona." 
Acts17:28 “Re phela ka yena, re tsamaya ka yena, re teng ka yena, jwalokaha le baroki ba bang ba lona ba itse: “ Hobane re bile re bana ba hae." 
Acts17:29 “Kaha re le bana ba Modimo, ha re a tshwanela ho hopola hore bomodimo bo tshwana le kgauta, silefera kapa lejwe le betlilweng ka tsebo le ka bohlale ba motho." 
Acts17:30 Modimo o itebaditse dinako tsa ho se tsebe ha batho, empa jwale o laela hore kahohle batho bohle ba bake," 
Acts17:31 hobane o beile letsatsi leo ka lona a tla ahlola lefatshe ka toka, ka monna eo a mo kgethileng, mme o neetse bohle bopaki ka ho mo tsosa bafung.”" 
Acts17:32 Yare ha ba utlwa tsa tsoho ya bafu, ba bang ba soma, ba bang ba re: “Re sa tla o utlwa hape ka taba ena.”" 
Acts17:33 Yaba Paulosi o tloha hara bona. 
Acts17:34 Empa banna ba bang ba mo kgomarela, ba dumela. Hara bona ho ne ho ena le Dionisiose, setho sa lekgotla la Areopagose, le mosadi ya bitswang Damarise, ba ena le ba bang." 
Acts18:1 Kamora tsena, Paulosi a tloha Athene, a ya Korinthe." 
Acts18:2 Teng a fumana Mojuda e mong ya bitswang Akulase, ya tswaletsweng Ponto, ya neng a sa tswa fihla, a etswa Italia le mosadi wa hae Prisilla, hobane Tlelaudiose o ne a laetse hore Bajuda bohle ba tlohe Roma. Paulosi a ya ho bona," 
Acts18:3 mme kaha e ne e le batho ba mosebetsi o le mong, a hlola le bona, mme ba sebetsa mmoho. Mosebetsi wa bona e ne e le wa ho etsa ditente." 
Acts18:4 A buisana le batho ka tlung ya thapelo ka Sabatha se seng le se seng, a leka ho kgodisa Bajuda le Bagerike." 
Acts18:5 Yare ha Silase le Timothea ba fihla ba etswa Masedonia, Paulosi a hapeha ke lentswe la Modimo ka ho tlala, a paka ho Bajuda hore Jesu ke Mesia." 
Acts18:6 Empa yare ha ba mo hanyetsa, ba mo nyefola, a hlohlora diaparo tsa hae, a re ho bona: “Madi a lona a be hodima dihlooho tsa lona; nna ha ke na molato. Ho tloha jwale ke tla ya ho baditjhaba.”" 
Acts18:7 Yaba o tloha teng, o ya ha motho ya bitswang Tite Jusetose, ya hlomphang Modimo, eo ntlo ya hae e neng e bapile le ntlo ya thapelo." 
Acts18:8 Jwale Kerisepose, mookamedi wa ntlo ya thapelo, a dumela ho Morena, yena le lelapa la hae lohle. Le ba bangata ba Bakorinthe ha ba utlwa, ba dumela, mme ba kolobetswa." 
Acts18:9 Jwale Morena a bua le Paulosi ka pono, bosiu, a re: “O se ke wa tshaba, empa o nne o bue, o se ke wa kgutsa." 
Acts18:10 Ke na le wena, mme ha ho ya tla o lwantsha, le ho o etsa hampe, hobane ke na le batho ba bangata motseng ona.”" 
Acts18:11 A dula moo selemo le kgwedi tse tsheletseng a ntsa ruta lentswe la Modimo hara bona. 
Acts18:12 Ha Galeo e le mmusisi wa Akaya, Bajuda ba tsohela Paulosi matla ka maikutlo a le mang, mme ba mo isa kgotla," 
Acts18:13 ba re: “Monna enwa o kgothaletsa batho hore ba hlomphe Modimo ka mokgwa o hananang le Molao.” 
Acts18:14 Yare ha Paulosi a re o tla bua, Galeo a re ho Bajuda: “Bajuda ting, haeba ho ne ho hlile ho ena le molato o itseng kapa bolotsana bo bobe, ho ka be ho lokela hore ke le mamelle," 
Acts18:15 empa haeba ke kgang ya mantswe, ya mabitso le ya Molao wa lona, le ka bona e le lona; ha nka ke ka ba moahlodi wa tsena.”" 
Acts18:16 Yaba o ba leleka kgotla. 
Acts18:17 Jwale bohle ba tshwara Sosethenese, mookamedi wa ntlo ya thapelo, ba mo teteka kapela lekgotla, empa Galeo a se ke a tsotella letho la ditaba tsena." 
Acts18:18 Paulosi ha a se a hlotse Korinthe matsatsi a mangata, a dumedisa badumedi, a kena ka sekepeng ho tshelela Siria, a ena le Prisilla le Akulase. Ha a le Kenkeria a ikuta lekorana, hobane o ne a entse kano." 
Acts18:19 Jwale ba theohela Efese, moo a ileng a ba siya teng. Empa yena a kena ka tlung ya thapelo, mme a buisana le Bajuda." 
Acts18:20 Bona ba mo kopa hore a hlole nako e teletsana, empa a se ke a dumela," 
Acts18:21 a mpa a ba dumedisa, a re: “Ke tla boela ho lona ha Modimo a rata.” A tloha Efese ka sekepe." 
Acts18:22 Ha a fihla Sesaria, a nyolohela Jerusalema ho ya dumedisa kereke, a nto theohela Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Hoba a hlole teng nako e itseng a tloha, a tsamaya hohle naheng ya Galatia le Firigia ka ho latelana, a ntse a matlafatsa barutuwa bohle." 
Acts18:24 Moo Efese ha fihla Mojuda e mong ya bitswang Apolosi, ya tswaletsweng Alekesanderia, e le monna wa kgeleke, ya neng a hlalefetse Mangolo ka ho tlala." 
Acts18:25 O ne a rutilwe Tsela ya Morena. A bua ka ho tjheseha moyeng, a ruta ditaba tse amanang le Jesu ka hloko, le hoja a ne a tseba kolobetso ya Johanne feela." 
Acts18:26 A qala ho bua ka sebete ka tlung ya thapelo, mme ha Prisilla le Akulase ba mo utlwile ba mo isa ha bona, ba mo hlalosetsa Tsela ya Modimo ka hloko e fetang." 
Acts18:27 Yare ha a rera ho ya Akaya, badumedi ba mo kgothaletsa, mme ba ngolla barutuwa hore ba mo amohele. Ha a se a fihlile, a ba le thuso e kgolo ho bao e bileng badumedi ka mohau wa Modimo," 
Acts18:28 hobane o ne a hlola Bajuda pontsheng, ka matla a maholo, a supa ka Mangolo hore Jesu ke Mesia." 
Acts19:1 Ha Apolosi a ntse a le Korinthe, Paulosi yena a tsamaya hodima dihlaba, a ya fihla Efese, mme a fumana barutuwa ba bang hona teng." 
Acts19:2 A re ho bona: “Na le ne le amohele Moya o Halalelang mohla le dumelang na?” Ba araba, ba re: “Ha re eso ka re utlwa hore ho na le Moya o Halalelang.”" 
Acts19:3 A re: “Ha ho le jwalo le kolobeditswe ka kolobetso efe?” Ba re: “Ka kolobetso ya Johanne.” 
Acts19:4 Yaba Paulosi o re: “Johanne o ile a kolobetsa ka kolobetsa ya pako, a ntse a bolella batho hore ba dumele ho ya tlang kamorao ho yena, e leng ho Jesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Ha ba utlwa hona, ba kolobetswa ka lebitso la Jesu." 
Acts19:6 Ha Paulosi a ba bea matsoho, Moya o Halalelang wa theohela hodima bona, ba bua dipuopuo, mme ba porofeta." 
Acts19:7 Banna bao kaofela ba ne ba ka ba leshome le metso e mmedi. 
Acts19:8 Ka dikgwedi tse tharo Paulosi a nna a kena ka tlung ya thapelo ya Bajuda. A bua ka sebete, a arabisana le bona, mme a ba kgodisa ka tsa Mmuso wa Modimo." 
Acts19:9 Empa ha ba bang ba ithatafatsa dipelo, ba hana ho dumela, mme ba bua hampe ka Tsela ya Morena kapele ho badumedi bohle, a tloha ho bona a tsamaya le barutuwa ba hae. A buisana le batho ka tsatsi le leng le le leng sekolong sa Tiranose." 
Acts19:10 Hona ha etsahala ka lemo tse pedi, hoo bohle ba ahileng Asia, Bajuda le Bagerike, ba ileng ba utlwa lentswe la Morena." 
Acts19:11 Modimo a etsa diketso tse matla, tse sa tlwaelehang, ka matsoho a Paulosi," 
Acts19:12 hoo ha dituku kapa diforesekoto tse amileng mmele wa hae di ne di bewa hodima bakudi, malwetse a ne a ye a fole, le meya e mebe e tswe ho bona." 
Acts19:13 Bajuda ba bang ba baleleri, ba lelekang meya e mebe, le bona ba leka ho bitsa lebitso la Morena Jesu hodima ba nang le meya e mebe, ba re: “Ke le laela ka lebitso la Jesu ya bolelwang ke Paulosi.”" 
Acts19:14 Ba etsang hona e ne e le bara ba supileng ba Moprista e Moholo wa Mojuda ya bitswang Sekefa. 
Acts19:15 Empa moya o mobe wa araba, wa re ho bona: “Jesu ke a mo tseba, esita le yena Paulosi ke a mo tseba, empa lona le bo-mang?”" 
Acts19:16 Yaba monna ya nang le moya o mobe o a ba tlolella, mme a ba hlola bohle ka matla, ba ba ba baleha tlung eo ba tsotse, ba le maqeba." 
Acts19:17 Bohle ba phelang Efese, Bajuda le Bagerike, ha ba utlwa taba ena, kaofela ba tshoha, mme lebitso la Morena Jesu la tumiswa." 
Acts19:18 Ba bangata ba badumedi ba tla, ba bolela diketso tsa bona tsa boloi pepeneneng." 
Acts19:19 Ba bangata ba neng ba loya ba bokella dibuka, ba di tjhesa pontsheng ya bohle. Ha ba kopanya theko ya dibuka, ba fumana e le dikete tse mashome a mahlano tsa silefera." 
Acts19:20 Ka mokgwa oo lentswe la Morena la ata, mme la matlafala." 
Acts19:21 Hoba tsena di phethahale, Paulosi a rera ka pelong ya hae ho feta Masedonia le Akaya ho ya Jerusalema, a re: “Ha ke se ke fihlile teng, eka kgona ke etele le Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Kahoo a roma batlatsi ba hae ba babedi, e leng Timothea le Erasetose, ho ya Masedonia; yena a ka a sala Asia nakwana." 
Acts19:23 Ka nako eo ha tsoha moferefere o moholo Efese ka baka la Tsela ya Morena. 
Acts19:24 Monna e mong wa setei sa silefera, ya bitswang Demetriose, o ne a etsa ditempelana tsa Aretemise ka silefera, mme a fumantsha basebetsi mouno o mongata." 
Acts19:25 A ba phutha mmoho le basebetsi ba tse jwalo, a re: “Banna, le a tseba hore katleho ya rona e tswa kgwebong ena." 
Acts19:26 Le a bona, mme le a utlwa hore Paulosi enwa o re medimo e entsweng ke batho hase medimo, mme o kgelositse letshwelehadi, e seng mona Efese feela, empa e batla e le Asia yohle." 
Acts19:27 Hase kgwebo ena ya rona feela e kotsing ya ho nyediseha, empa le yona tempele ya mofumahadi Aretemise, modimo o moholo, e lekgatheng la ho tadingwa e le lefeela, le boholo ba hae bo nyenyefatswe, yena eo naha yohle ya Asia le lefatshe lohle le mo hlomphang.”" 
Acts19:28 Ha ba utlwa tsena, ba halefa haholo, ba howa, ba re: “O moholo Aretemise wa Baefese!”" 
Acts19:29 Motse wa tlala pherekano, mme batho ba phallela lebaleng la dipapadi mmoho, ba tshwere banna ba babedi, Gaiose le Arisetarekose, ba tswang Masedonia, ba neng ba feleheditse Paulosi leetong." 
Acts19:30 Yare ha Paulosi a rata ho kena mokgoping oo, barutuwa ba mo hanela." 
Acts19:31 Ba bang ba ka sehloohong pusong ya Asia, bao e neng e le metswalle ya hae, le bona ba mo romela molaetsa, ba mo rapela hore a se ke a ya itlhahisa lebaleng la dipapadi." 
Acts19:32 Jwale ba bang ba howa dintho tse fapaneng, hobane phutheho e ne e ferekane, mme bongata bo sa tsebe hore na bo phuthehetseng." 
Acts19:33 Ba bang ba letshwele ba re Alekesandere a bue, ha Bajuda ba ntse ba mo sutumeletsa kapele. Alekesandere a phoka ka letsoho, a rata ho ikarabella ho letshwele." 
Acts19:34 Empa ha ba lemoha hore ke Mojuda, bohle ba howa ka ntswe le le leng, dihora tse ka bang pedi, ba re: “O moholo Aretemise wa Baefese!”"
